import RightPanelStore from \\\"../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore\\\";\\n25: import { RightPanelPhases } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStorePhases';\\n26: import { IRightPanelCardState } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\\n27: import { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../../../stores/AsyncStore';\\n28: import { NotificationColor } from '../../../stores/notifications/NotificationColor';\\n29: \\n30: export enum HeaderKind {\\n31:   Room = \\\"room\\\",\\n32: }\\n33: \\n34: interface IState {\\n35:     headerKind: HeaderKind;\\n36:     phase: RightPanelPhases;\\n37:     threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\\n38:     globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\\n39: }\\n40: \\n41: interface IProps {}\\n42: \\n43: export default abstract class HeaderButtons<P = {}> extends React.Component<IProps & P, IState> {\\n44:     private unmounted = false;\\n45:     private dispatcherRef: string;\\n46: \\n47:     constructor(props: IProps & P, kind: HeaderKind) {\\n48:         super(props);\\n49: \\n50:         const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\\n51:         this.state = {\\n52:             headerKind: kind,\\n53:             phase: rps.currentCard.phase,\\n54:             threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\\n55:             globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\\n56:         };\\n57:     }\\n58: \\n59:     public componentDidMount() {\\n60:         RightPanelStore.instance.on(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\\n61:         this.dispatcherRef = dis.register(this.onAction.bind(this)); // used by subclasses\\n62:     }\\n63: \\n64:     public componentWillUnmount() {\\n65:         this.unmounted = true;\\n66:         RightPanelStore.instance.off(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\\n67:         if (this.dispatcherRef) dis.unregister(this.dispatcherRef);\\n68:     }\\n69: \\n70:     protected abstract onAction(payload);\\n71: \\n72:     public setPhase(phase: RightPanelPhases, cardState?: Partial<IRightPanelCardState>) {\\n73:         const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\\n74:         if (rps.currentCard.phase == phase && !cardState && rps.isOpen) {\\n75:             rps.togglePanel(null);\\n76:         } else {\\n77:             RightPanelStore.instance.setCard({ phase, state: cardState });\\n78:             if (!rps.isOpen) rps.togglePanel(null);\\n79:         }\\n80:     }\\n81: \\n82:     public isPhase(phases: string | string[]): boolean {\\n83:         if (!RightPanelStore.instance.isOpen) return false;\\n84:         if (Array.isArray(phases)) {\\n85:             return phases.includes(this.state.phase);\\n86:         } else {\\n87:             return phases === this.state.phase;\\n88:         }\\n89:     }\\n90: \\n91:     private onRightPanelStoreUpdate = () => {\\n92:         if (this.unmounted) return;\\n93:         this.setState({ phase: RightPanelStore.instance.currentCard.phase });\\n94:     };\\n95: \\n96:     // XXX: Make renderButtons a prop\\n97:     public abstract renderButtons(): JSX.Element;\\n98: \\n99:     public render() {\\n100:         return <div className=\\\"mx_HeaderButtons\\\" role=\\\"tablist\\\">\\n101:             { this.renderButtons() }\\n102:         </div>;\\n103:     }\\n104: }\\n105: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/components/views/right_panel/HeaderButtons.tsx\"}",

limitations under the License.\n19: */\n20: \n21: import React from 'react';\n22: \n23: import dis from '../../../dispatcher/dispatcher';\n24: import RightPanelStore from \"../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore\";\n25: import { RightPanelPhases } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStorePhases';\n26: import { IRightPanelCardState } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\n27: import { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../../../stores/AsyncStore';\n28: import { NotificationColor } from '../../../stores/notifications/NotificationColor';\n29: \n30: export enum HeaderKind {\n31:   Room = \"room\",\n32: }\n33: \n34: interface IState {\n35:     headerKind: HeaderKind;\n36:     phase: RightPanelPhases;\n37:     threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\n38:     globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\n39: }\n40: \n41: interface IProps {}\n42: \n43: export default abstract class HeaderButtons<P = {}> extends React.Component<IProps & P, IState> {\n44:     private unmounted = false;\n45:     private dispatcherRef: string;\n46: \n47:     constructor(props: IProps & P, kind: HeaderKind) {\n48:         super(props);\n49: \n50:         const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\n51:         this.state = {\n52:             headerKind: kind,\n53:             phase: rps.currentCard.phase,\n54:             threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\n55:             globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\n56:         };\n57:     }\n58: \n59:     public componentDidMount() {\n60:         RightPanelStore.instance.on(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\n61:         this.dispatcherRef = dis.register(this.onAction.bind(this)); // used by subclasses\n62:     }\n63: \n64:     public componentWillUnmount() {\n65:         this.unmounted = true;\n66:         RightPanelStore.instance.off(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\n67:         if (this.dispatcherRef) dis.unregister(this.dispatcherRef);\n68:     }\n69: \n70:     protected abstract onAction(payload);\n71: \n72:     public setPhase(phase: RightPanelPhases, cardState?: Partial<IRightPanelCardState>) {\n73:         const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\n74:         if (rps.currentCard.phase == phase && !cardState && rps.isOpen) {\n75:             rps.togglePanel(null);\n76:         } else {\n77:             RightPanelStore.instance.setCard({ phase, state: cardState });\n78:             if (!rps.isOpen) rps.togglePanel(null);\n79:         }\n80:     }\n81: \n82:     public isPhase(phases: string | string[]): boolean {\n83:         if (!RightPanelStore.instance.isOpen) return false;\n84:         if (Array.isArray(phases)) {\n85:             return phases.includes(this.state.phase);\n86:         } else {\n87:             return phases === this.state.phase;\n88:         }\n89:     }\n90: \n91:     private onRightPanelStoreUpdate = () => {\n92:         if (this.unmounted) return;\n93:         this.setState({ phase: RightPanelStore.instance.currentCard.phase });\n94:     };\n95: \n96:     // XXX: Make renderButtons a prop\n97:     public abstract renderButtons(): JSX.Element;\n98: \n99:     public render() {\n100:         return <div className=\"mx_HeaderButtons\" role=\"tablist\">\n101:             { this.renderButtons() }\n102:         </div>;\n103:     }\n104: }\n105: ",

27. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": "src/components/views/right_panel/PinnedMessagesCard.tsx",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7"
}
Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import React, { useCallback, useContext, useEffect, useState } from \\\"react\\\";\\n18: import { Room, RoomEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\\\";\\n19: import { MatrixEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\\\";\\n20: import { EventType, RelationType } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event';\\n21: import { logger } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\\\";\\n22: import { RoomStateEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-state\\\";\\n23: \\n24: import { Icon as ContextMenuIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/context-menu.svg';\\n25: import { Icon as EmojiIcon } from \\\"../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/emoji.svg\\\";\\n26: import { Icon as ReplyIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/reply.svg';\\n27: import { _t } from \\\"../../../languageHandler\\\";\\n28: import BaseCard from \\\"./BaseCard\\\";\\n29: import Spinner from \\\"../elements/Spinner\\\";\\n30: import MatrixClientContext from \\\"../../../contexts/MatrixClientContext\\\";\\n31: import { useTypedEventEmitter } from \\\"../../../hooks/useEventEmitter\\\";\\n32: import PinningUtils from \\\"../../../utils/PinningUtils\\\";\\n33: import { useAsyncMemo } from \\\"../../../hooks/useAsyncMemo\\\";\\n34: import PinnedEventTile from \\\"../rooms/PinnedEventTile\\\";\\n35: import { useRoomState } from \\\"../../../hooks/useRoomState\\\";\\n36: import RoomContext, { TimelineRenderingType } from \\\"../../../contexts/RoomContext\\\";\\n37: import { ReadPinsEventId } from \\\"./types\\\";\\n38: import Heading from '../typography/Heading';\\n39: import { RoomPermalinkCreator } from \\\"../../../utils/permalinks/Permalinks\\\";\\n40: \\n41: interface IProps {\\n42:     room: Room;\\n43:     permalinkCreator: RoomPermalinkCreator;\\n44:     onClose(): void;\\n45: }\\n46: \\n47: export const usePinnedEvents = (room: Room): string[] => {\\n48:     const [pinnedEvents, setPinnedEvents] = useState<string[]>([]);\\n49: \\n50:     const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\\n51:         if (!room) return;\\n52:         if (ev && ev.getType() !== EventType.RoomPinnedEvents) return;\\n53:         setPinnedEvents(room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \\\"\\\")?.getContent()?.pinned || []);\\n54:     }, [room]);\\n55: \\n56:     useTypedEventEmitter(room?.currentState, RoomStateEvent.Events, update);\\n57:     useEffect(() => {\\n58:         update();\\n59:         return () => {\\n60:             setPinnedEvents([]);\\n61:         };\\n62:     }, [update]);\\n63:     return pinnedEvents;\\n64: };\\n65: \\n66: export const useReadPinnedEvents = (room: Room): Set<string> => {\\n67:     const [readPinnedEvents, setReadPinnedEvents] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\\n68: \\n69:     const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\\n70:         if (!room) return;\\n71:         if (ev && ev.getType() !== ReadPinsEventId) return;\\n72:         const readPins = room.getAccountData(ReadPinsEventId)?.getContent()?.event_ids;\\n73:         setReadPinnedEvents(new Set(readPins || []));\\n74:     }, [room]);\\n75: \\n76:     useTypedEventEmitter(room, RoomEvent.AccountData, update);\\n77:     useEffect(() => {\\n78:         update();\\n79:         return () => {\\n80:             setReadPinnedEvents(new Set());\\n81:         };\\n82:     }, [update]);\\n83:     return readPinnedEvents;\\n84: };\\n85: \\n86: const PinnedMessagesCard = ({ room, onClose, permalinkCreator }: IProps) => {\\n87:     const cli = useContext(MatrixClientContext);\\n88:     const roomContext = useContext(RoomContext);\\n89:     const canUnpin = useRoomState(room, state => state.mayClientSendStateEvent(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, cli));\\n90:     const pinnedEventIds = usePinnedEvents(room);\\n91:     const readPinnedEvents = useReadPinnedEvents(room);\\n92: \\n93:     useEffect(() => {\\n94:         const newlyRead = pinnedEventIds.filter(id => !readPinnedEvents.has(id));\\n95:         if (newlyRead.length > 0) {\\n96:             // clear out any read pinned events which no longer are pinned\\n97:             cli.setRoomAccountData(room.roomId, ReadPinsEventId, {\\n98:                 event_ids: pinnedEventIds,\\n99:             });\\n100:         }\\n101:     }, [cli, room.roomId, pinnedEventIds, readPinnedEvents]);\\n102: \\n103:     const pinnedEvents = useAsyncMemo(() => {\\n104:         const promises = pinnedEventIds.map(async eventId => {\\n105:             const timelineSet = room.getUnfilteredTimelineSet();\\n106:             const localEvent = timelineSet?.getTimelineForEvent(eventId)?.getEvents().find(e => e.getId() === eventId);\\n107:             if (localEvent) return PinningUtils.isPinnable(localEvent) ? localEvent : null;\\n108: \\n109:             try {\\n110:                 // Fetch the event and latest edit in parallel\\n111:                 const [evJson, { events: [edit] }] = await Promise.all([\\n112:                     cli.fetchRoomEvent(room.roomId, eventId),\\n113:                     cli.relations(room.roomId, eventId, RelationType.Replace, null, { limit: 1 }),\\n114:                 ]);\\n115:                 const event = new MatrixEvent(evJson);\\n116:                 if (event.isEncrypted()) {\\n117:                     await cli.decryptEventIfNeeded(event); // TODO await?\\n118:                 }\\n119: \\n120:                 if (event && PinningUtils.isPinnable(event)) {\\n121:                     // Inject sender information\\n122:                     event.sender = room.getMember(event.getSender());\\n123:                     // Also inject any edits we've found\\n124:                     if (edit) event.makeReplaced(edit);\\n125: \\n126:                     return event;\\n127:                 }\\n128:             } catch (err) {\\n129:                 logger.error(\\\"Error looking up pinned event \\\" + eventId + \\\" in room \\\" + room.roomId);\\n130:                 logger.error(err);\\n131:             }\\n132:             return null;\\n133:         });\\n134: \\n135:         return Promise.all(promises);\\n136:     }, [cli, room, pinnedEventIds], null);\\n137: \\n138:     let content;\\n139:     if (!pinnedEvents) {\\n140:         content = <Spinner />;\\n141:     } else if (pinnedEvents.length > 0) {\\n142:         const onUnpinClicked = async (event: MatrixEvent) => {\\n143:             const pinnedEvents = room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \\\"\\\");\\n144:             if (pinnedEvents?.getContent()?.pinned) {\\n145:                 const pinned = pinnedEvents.getContent().pinned;\\n146:                 const index = pinned.indexOf(event.getId());\\n147:                 if (index !== -1) {\\n148:                     pinned.splice(index, 1);\\n149:                     await cli.sendStateEvent(room.roomId, EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, { pinned }, \\\"\\\");\\n150:                 }\\n151:             }\\n152:         };\\n153: \\n154:         // show them in reverse, with latest pinned at the top\\n155:         content = pinnedEvents.filter(Boolean).reverse().map(ev => (\\n156:             <PinnedEventTile\\n157:                 key={ev.getId()}\\n158:                 event={ev}\\n159:                 onUnpinClicked={canUnpin ? () => onUnpinClicked(ev) : undefined}\\n160:                 permalinkCreator={permalinkCreator}\\n161:             />\\n162:         ));\\n163:     } else {\\n164:         content = <div className=\\\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_wrapper\\\">\\n165:             <div className=\\\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty\\\">\\n166:                 { /* XXX: We reuse the classes for simplicity, but deliberately not the components for non-interactivity. */ }\\n167:                 <div className=\\\"mx_MessageActionBar mx_PinnedMessagesCard_MessageActionBar\\\">\\n168:                     <div className=\\\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\\\">\\n169:                         <EmojiIcon />\\n170:                     </div>\\n171:                     <div className=\\\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\\\">\\n172:                         <ReplyIcon />\\n173:                     </div>\\n174:                     <div className=\\\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton mx_MessageActionBar_optionsButton\\\">\\n175:                         <ContextMenuIcon />\\n176:                     </div>\\n177:                 </div>\\n178: \\n179:                 <Heading size=\\\"h4\\\" className=\\\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_header\\\">{ _t(\\\"Nothing pinned, yet\\\") }</Heading>\\n180:                 { _t(\\\"If you have permissions, open the menu on any message and select \\\" +\\n181:                     \\\"<b>Pin</b> to stick them here.\\\", {}, {\\n182:                     b: sub => <b>{ sub }</b>,\\n183:                 }) }\\n184:             </div>\\n185:         </div>;\\n186:     }\\n187: \\n188:     return <BaseCard\\n189:         header={<div className=\\\"mx_BaseCard_header_title\\\">\\n190:             <Heading size=\\\"h4\\\" className=\\\"mx_BaseCard_header_title_heading\\\">{ _t(\\\"Pinned messages\\\") }</Heading>\\n191:         </div>}\\n192:         className=\\\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard\\\"\\n193:         onClose={onClose}\\n194:     >\\n195:         <RoomContext.Provider value={{\\n196:             ...roomContext,\\n197:             timelineRenderingType: TimelineRenderingType.Pinned,\\n198:         }}>\\n199:             { content }\\n200:         </RoomContext.Provider>\\n201:     </BaseCard>;\\n202: };\\n203: \\n204: export default PinnedMessagesCard;\\n205: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/components/views/right_panel/PinnedMessagesCard.tsx\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import React, { useCallback, useContext, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n18: import { Room, RoomEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\n19: import { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\n20: import { EventType, RelationType } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event';\n21: import { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n22: import { RoomStateEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-state\";\n23: \n24: import { Icon as ContextMenuIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/context-menu.svg';\n25: import { Icon as EmojiIcon } from \"../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/emoji.svg\";\n26: import { Icon as ReplyIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/reply.svg';\n27: import { _t } from \"../../../languageHandler\";\n28: import BaseCard from \"./BaseCard\";\n29: import Spinner from \"../elements/Spinner\";\n30: import MatrixClientContext from \"../../../contexts/MatrixClientContext\";\n31: import { useTypedEventEmitter } from \"../../../hooks/useEventEmitter\";\n32: import PinningUtils from \"../../../utils/PinningUtils\";\n33: import { useAsyncMemo } from \"../../../hooks/useAsyncMemo\";\n34: import PinnedEventTile from \"../rooms/PinnedEventTile\";\n35: import { useRoomState } from \"../../../hooks/useRoomState\";\n36: import RoomContext, { TimelineRenderingType } from \"../../../contexts/RoomContext\";\n37: import { ReadPinsEventId } from \"./types\";\n38: import Heading from '../typography/Heading';\n39: import { RoomPermalinkCreator } from \"../../../utils/permalinks/Permalinks\";\n40: \n41: interface IProps {\n42:     room: Room;\n43:     permalinkCreator: RoomPermalinkCreator;\n44:     onClose(): void;\n45: }\n46: \n47: export const usePinnedEvents = (room: Room): string[] => {\n48:     const [pinnedEvents, setPinnedEvents] = useState<string[]>([]);\n49: \n50:     const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\n51:         if (!room) return;\n52:         if (ev && ev.getType() !== EventType.RoomPinnedEvents) return;\n53:         setPinnedEvents(room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \"\")?.getContent()?.pinned || []);\n54:     }, [room]);\n55: \n56:     useTypedEventEmitter(room?.currentState, RoomStateEvent.Events, update);\n57:     useEffect(() => {\n58:         update();\n59:         return () => {\n60:             setPinnedEvents([]);\n61:         };\n62:     }, [update]);\n63:     return pinnedEvents;\n64: };\n65: \n66: export const useReadPinnedEvents = (room: Room): Set<string> => {\n67:     const [readPinnedEvents, setReadPinnedEvents] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n68: \n69:     const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\n70:         if (!room) return;\n71:         if (ev && ev.getType() !== ReadPinsEventId) return;\n72:         const readPins = room.getAccountData(ReadPinsEventId)?.getContent()?.event_ids;\n73:         setReadPinnedEvents(new Set(readPins || []));\n74:     }, [room]);\n75: \n76:     useTypedEventEmitter(room, RoomEvent.AccountData, update);\n77:     useEffect(() => {\n78:         update();\n79:         return () => {\n80:             setReadPinnedEvents(new Set());\n81:         };\n82:     }, [update]);\n83:     return readPinnedEvents;\n84: };\n85: \n86: const PinnedMessagesCard = ({ room, onClose, permalinkCreator }: IProps) => {\n87:     const cli = useContext(MatrixClientContext);\n88:     const roomContext = useContext(RoomContext);\n89:     const canUnpin = useRoomState(room, state => state.mayClientSendStateEvent(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, cli));\n90:     const pinnedEventIds = usePinnedEvents(room);\n91:     const readPinnedEvents = useReadPinnedEvents(room);\n92: \n93:     useEffect(() => {\n94:         const newlyRead = pinnedEventIds.filter(id => !readPinnedEvents.has(id));\n95:         if (newlyRead.length > 0) {\n96:             // clear out any read pinned events which no longer are pinned\n97:             cli.setRoomAccountData(room.roomId, ReadPinsEventId, {\n98:                 event_ids: pinnedEventIds,\n99:             });\n100:         }\n101:     }, [cli, room.roomId, pinnedEventIds, readPinnedEvents]);\n102: \n103:     const pinnedEvents = useAsyncMemo(() => {\n104:         const promises = pinnedEventIds.map(async eventId => {\n105:             const timelineSet = room.getUnfilteredTimelineSet();\n106:             const localEvent = timelineSet?.getTimelineForEvent(eventId)?.getEvents().find(e => e.getId() === eventId);\n107:             if (localEvent) return PinningUtils.isPinnable(localEvent) ? localEvent : null;\n108: \n109:             try {\n110:                 // Fetch the event and latest edit in parallel\n111:                 const [evJson, { events: [edit] }] = await Promise.all([\n112:                     cli.fetchRoomEvent(room.roomId, eventId),\n113:                     cli.relations(room.roomId, eventId, RelationType.Replace, null, { limit: 1 }),\n114:                 ]);\n115:                 const event = new MatrixEvent(evJson);\n116:                 if (event.isEncrypted()) {\n117:                     await cli.decryptEventIfNeeded(event); // TODO await?\n118:                 }\n119: \n120:                 if (event && PinningUtils.isPinnable(event)) {\n121:                     // Inject sender information\n122:                     event.sender = room.getMember(event.getSender());\n123:                     // Also inject any edits we've found\n124:                     if (edit) event.makeReplaced(edit);\n125: \n126:                     return event;\n127:                 }\n128:             } catch (err) {\n129:                 logger.error(\"Error looking up pinned event \" + eventId + \" in room \" + room.roomId);\n130:                 logger.error(err);\n131:             }\n132:             return null;\n133:         });\n134: \n135:         return Promise.all(promises);\n136:     }, [cli, room, pinnedEventIds], null);\n137: \n138:     let content;\n139:     if (!pinnedEvents) {\n140:         content = <Spinner />;\n141:     } else if (pinnedEvents.length > 0) {\n142:         const onUnpinClicked = async (event: MatrixEvent) => {\n143:             const pinnedEvents = room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \"\");\n144:             if (pinnedEvents?.getContent()?.pinned) {\n145:                 const pinned = pinnedEvents.getContent().pinned;\n146:                 const index = pinned.indexOf(event.getId());\n147:                 if (index !== -1) {\n148:                     pinned.splice(index, 1);\n149:                     await cli.sendStateEvent(room.roomId, EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, { pinned }, \"\");\n150:                 }\n151:             }\n152:         };\n153: \n154:         // show them in reverse, with latest pinned at the top\n155:         content = pinnedEvents.filter(Boolean).reverse().map(ev => (\n156:             <PinnedEventTile\n157:                 key={ev.getId()}\n158:                 event={ev}\n159:                 onUnpinClicked={canUnpin ? () => onUnpinClicked(ev) : undefined}\n160:                 permalinkCreator={permalinkCreator}\n161:             />\n162:         ));\n163:     } else {\n164:         content = <div className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_wrapper\">\n165:             <div className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty\">\n166:                 { /* XXX: We reuse the classes for simplicity, but deliberately not the components for non-interactivity. */ }\n167:                 <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar mx_PinnedMessagesCard_MessageActionBar\">\n168:                     <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\">\n169:                         <EmojiIcon />\n170:                     </div>\n171:                     <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\">\n172:                         <ReplyIcon />\n173:                     </div>\n174:                     <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton mx_MessageActionBar_optionsButton\">\n175:                         <ContextMenuIcon />\n176:                     </div>\n177:                 </div>\n178: \n179:                 <Heading size=\"h4\" className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_header\">{ _t(\"Nothing pinned, yet\") }</Heading>\n180:                 { _t(\"If you have permissions, open the menu on any message and select \" +\n181:                     \"<b>Pin</b> to stick them here.\", {}, {\n182:                     b: sub => <b>{ sub }</b>,\n183:                 }) }\n184:             </div>\n185:         </div>;\n186:     }\n187: \n188:     return <BaseCard\n189:         header={<div className=\"mx_BaseCard_header_title\">\n190:             <Heading size=\"h4\" className=\"mx_BaseCard_header_title_heading\">{ _t(\"Pinned messages\") }</Heading>\n191:         </div>}\n192:         className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard\"\n193:         onClose={onClose}\n194:     >\n195:         <RoomContext.Provider value={{\n196:             ...roomContext,\n197:             timelineRenderingType: TimelineRenderingType.Pinned,\n198:         }}>\n199:             { content }\n200:         </RoomContext.Provider>\n201:     </BaseCard>;\n202: };\n203: \n204: export default PinnedMessagesCard;\n205: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/components/views/right_panel/PinnedMessagesCard.tsx"
  }
}

http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\nimport React from 'react';\nimport classNames from 'classnames';\n\nimport AccessibleTooltipButton from \"../elements/AccessibleTooltipButton\";\nimport { ButtonEvent } from \"../elements/AccessibleButton\";\nimport { Alignment } from \"../elements/Tooltip\";\n\ninterface IProps {\n    // Whether this button is highlighted\n    isHighlighted: boolean;\n    isUnread?: boolean;\n    // click handler\n    onClick: (ev: ButtonEvent) => void;\n\n    // Button name\n    name: string;\n    // Button title\n    title: string;\n}\n\n// TODO: replace this, the composer buttons and the right panel buttons with a unified representation\nexport default class HeaderButton extends React.Component<IProps> {\n    public render() {\n        const { isHighlighted, isUnread = false, onClick, name, title, ...props } = this.props;\n\n        const classes = classNames({\n            mx_RightPanel_headerButton: true,\n            mx_RightPanel_headerButton_highlight: isHighlighted,\n            mx_RightPanel_headerButton_unread: isUnread,\n            [`mx_RightPanel_${name}`]: true,\n        });\n\n        return <AccessibleTooltipButton\n            {...props}\n            aria-selected={isHighlighted}\n            role=\"tab\"\n            title={title}\n            alignment={Alignment.Bottom}\n            className={classes}\n            onClick={onClick}\n        />;\n    }\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/components/views/right_panel/HeaderButton.tsx"
}

{
  "content": "/*\nCopyright 2015, 2016 OpenMarket Ltd\nCopyright 2017 Vector Creations Ltd\nCopyright 2017 New Vector Ltd\nCopyright 2018 New Vector Ltd\nCopyright 2019 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\nimport React from 'react';\n\nimport dis from '../../../dispatcher/dispatcher';\nimport RightPanelStore from \"../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore\";\nimport { RightPanelPhases } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStorePhases';\nimport { IRightPanelCardState } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\nimport { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../../../stores/AsyncStore';\nimport { NotificationColor } from '../../../stores/notifications/NotificationColor';\n\nexport enum HeaderKind {\n  Room = \"room\",\n}\n\ninterface IState {\n    headerKind: HeaderKind;\n    phase: RightPanelPhases;\n    threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\n    globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\n}\n\ninterface IProps {}\n\nexport default abstract class HeaderButtons<P = {}> extends React.Component<IProps & P, IState> {\n    private unmounted = false;\n    private dispatcherRef: string;\n\n    constructor(props: IProps & P, kind: HeaderKind) {\n        super(props);\n\n        const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\n        this.state = {\n            headerKind: kind,\n            phase: rps.currentCard.phase,\n            threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\n            globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\n        };\n    }\n\n    public componentDidMount() {\n        RightPanelStore.instance.on(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\n        this.dispatcherRef = dis.register(this.onAction.bind(this)); // used by subclasses\n    }\n\n    public componentWillUnmount() {\n        this.unmounted = true;\n        RightPanelStore.instance.off(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\n        if (this.dispatcherRef) dis.unregister(this.dispatcherRef);\n    }\n\n    protected abstract onAction(payload);\n\n    public setPhase(phase: RightPanelPhases, cardState?: Partial<IRightPanelCardState>) {\n        const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\n        if (rps.currentCard.phase == phase && !cardState && rps.isOpen) {\n            rps.togglePanel(null);\n        } else {\n            RightPanelStore.instance.setCard({ phase, state: cardState });\n            if (!rps.isOpen) rps.togglePanel(null);\n        }\n    }\n\n    public isPhase(phases: string | string[]): boolean {\n        if (!RightPanelStore.instance.isOpen) return false;\n        if (Array.isArray(phases)) {\n            return phases.includes(this.state.phase);\n        } else {\n            return phases === this.state.phase;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private onRightPanelStoreUpdate = () => {\n        if (this.unmounted) return;\n        this.setState({ phase: RightPanelStore.instance.currentCard.phase });\n    };\n\n    // XXX: Make renderButtons a prop\n    public abstract renderButtons(): JSX.Element;\n\n    public render() {\n        return <div className=\"mx_HeaderButtons\" role=\"tablist\">\n            { this.renderButtons() }\n        </div>;\n    }\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/components/views/right_panel/HeaderButtons.tsx"
}

http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\nimport React from 'react';\n\nimport dis from '../../../dispatcher/dispatcher';\nimport RightPanelStore from \"../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore\";\nimport { RightPanelPhases } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStorePhases';\nimport { IRightPanelCardState } from '../../../stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\nimport { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../../../stores/AsyncStore';\nimport { NotificationColor } from '../../../stores/notifications/NotificationColor';\n\nexport enum HeaderKind {\n  Room = \"room\",\n}\n\ninterface IState {\n    headerKind: HeaderKind;\n    phase: RightPanelPhases;\n    threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\n    globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor;\n}\n\ninterface IProps {}\n\nexport default abstract class HeaderButtons<P = {}> extends React.Component<IProps & P, IState> {\n    private unmounted = false;\n    private dispatcherRef: string;\n\n    constructor(props: IProps & P, kind: HeaderKind) {\n        super(props);\n\n        const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\n        this.state = {\n            headerKind: kind,\n            phase: rps.currentCard.phase,\n            threadNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\n            globalNotificationColor: NotificationColor.None,\n        };\n    }\n\n    public componentDidMount() {\n        RightPanelStore.instance.on(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\n        this.dispatcherRef = dis.register(this.onAction.bind(this)); // used by subclasses\n    }\n\n    public componentWillUnmount() {\n        this.unmounted = true;\n        RightPanelStore.instance.off(UPDATE_EVENT, this.onRightPanelStoreUpdate);\n        if (this.dispatcherRef) dis.unregister(this.dispatcherRef);\n    }\n\n    protected abstract onAction(payload);\n\n    public setPhase(phase: RightPanelPhases, cardState?: Partial<IRightPanelCardState>) {\n        const rps = RightPanelStore.instance;\n        if (rps.currentCard.phase == phase && !cardState && rps.isOpen) {\n            rps.togglePanel(null);\n        } else {\n            RightPanelStore.instance.setCard({ phase, state: cardState });\n            if (!rps.isOpen) rps.togglePanel(null);\n        }\n    }\n\n    public isPhase(phases: string | string[]): boolean {\n        if (!RightPanelStore.instance.isOpen) return false;\n        if (Array.isArray(phases)) {\n            return phases.includes(this.state.phase);\n        } else {\n            return phases === this.state.phase;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private onRightPanelStoreUpdate = () => {\n        if (this.unmounted) return;\n        this.setState({ phase: RightPanelStore.instance.currentCard.phase });\n    };\n\n    // XXX: Make renderButtons a prop\n    public abstract renderButtons(): JSX.Element;\n\n    public render() {\n        return <div className=\"mx_HeaderButtons\" role=\"tablist\">\n            { this.renderButtons() }\n        </div>;\n    }\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/app/src/components/views/right_panel/HeaderButtons.tsx",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

Input
{
  "content": "/*\nCopyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\nyou may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\nYou may obtain a copy of the License at\n\n    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n\nUnless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\ndistributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\nimport React, { useCallback, useContext, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Room, RoomEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\nimport { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\nimport { EventType, RelationType } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event';\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\nimport { RoomStateEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-state\";\n\nimport { Icon as ContextMenuIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/context-menu.svg';\nimport { Icon as EmojiIcon } from \"../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/emoji.svg\";\nimport { Icon as ReplyIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/reply.svg';\nimport { _t } from \"../../../languageHandler\";\nimport BaseCard from \"./BaseCard\";\nimport Spinner from \"../elements/Spinner\";\nimport MatrixClientContext from \"../../../contexts/MatrixClientContext\";\nimport { useTypedEventEmitter } from \"../../../hooks/useEventEmitter\";\nimport PinningUtils from \"../../../utils/PinningUtils\";\nimport { useAsyncMemo } from \"../../../hooks/useAsyncMemo\";\nimport PinnedEventTile from \"../rooms/PinnedEventTile\";\nimport { useRoomState } from \"../../../hooks/useRoomState\";\nimport RoomContext, { TimelineRenderingType } from \"../../../contexts/RoomContext\";\nimport { ReadPinsEventId } from \"./types\";\nimport Heading from '../typography/Heading';\nimport { RoomPermalinkCreator } from \"../../../utils/permalinks/Permalinks\";\n\ninterface IProps {\n    room: Room;\n    permalinkCreator: RoomPermalinkCreator;\n    onClose(): void;\n}\n\nexport const usePinnedEvents = (room: Room): string[] => {\n    const [pinnedEvents, setPinnedEvents] = useState<string[]>([]);\n\n    const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\n        if (!room) return;\n        if (ev && ev.getType() !== EventType.RoomPinnedEvents) return;\n        setPinnedEvents(room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \"\")?.getContent()?.pinned || []);\n    }, [room]);\n\n    useTypedEventEmitter(room?.currentState, RoomStateEvent.Events, update);\n    useEffect(() => {\n        update();\n        return () => {\n            setPinnedEvents([]);\n        };\n    }, [update]);\n    return pinnedEvents;\n};\n\nexport const useReadPinnedEvents = (room: Room): Set<string> => {\n    const [readPinnedEvents, setReadPinnedEvents] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n\n    const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\n        if (!room) return;\n        if (ev && ev.getType() !== ReadPinsEventId) return;\n        const readPins = room.getAccountData(ReadPinsEventId)?.getContent()?.event_ids;\n        setReadPinnedEvents(new Set(readPins || []));\n    }, [room]);\n\n    useTypedEventEmitter(room, RoomEvent.AccountData, update);\n    useEffect(() => {\n        update();\n        return () => {\n            setReadPinnedEvents(new Set());\n        };\n    }, [update]);\n    return readPinnedEvents;\n};\n\nconst PinnedMessagesCard = ({ room, onClose, permalinkCreator }: IProps) => {\n    const cli = useContext(MatrixClientContext);\n    const roomContext = useContext(RoomContext);\n    const canUnpin = useRoomState(room, state => state.mayClientSendStateEvent(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, cli));\n    const pinnedEventIds = usePinnedEvents(room);\n    const readPinnedEvents = useReadPinnedEvents(room);\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        const newlyRead = pinnedEventIds.filter(id => !readPinnedEvents.has(id));\n        if (newlyRead.length > 0) {\n            // clear out any read pinned events which no longer are pinned\n            cli.setRoomAccountData(room.roomId, ReadPinsEventId, {\n                event_ids: pinnedEventIds,\n            });\n        }\n    }, [cli, room.roomId, pinnedEventIds, readPinnedEvents]);\n\n    const pinnedEvents = useAsyncMemo(() => {\n        const promises = pinnedEventIds.map(async eventId => {\n            const timelineSet = room.getUnfilteredTimelineSet();\n            const localEvent = timelineSet?.getTimelineForEvent(eventId)?.getEvents().find(e => e.getId() === eventId);\n            if (localEvent) return PinningUtils.isPinnable(localEvent) ? localEvent : null;\n\n            try {\n                // Fetch the event and latest edit in parallel\n                const [evJson, { events: [edit] }] = await Promise.all([\n                    cli.fetchRoomEvent(room.roomId, eventId),\n                    cli.relations(room.roomId, eventId, RelationType.Replace, null, { limit: 1 }),\n                ]);\n                const event = new MatrixEvent(evJson);\n                if (event.isEncrypted()) {\n                    await cli.decryptEventIfNeeded(event); // TODO await?\n                }\n\n                if (event && PinningUtils.isPinnable(event)) {\n                    // Inject sender information\n                    event.sender = room.getMember(event.getSender());\n                    // Also inject any edits we've found\n                    if (edit) event.makeReplaced(edit);\n\n                    return event;\n                }\n            } catch (err) {\n                logger.error(\"Error looking up pinned event \" + eventId + \" in room \" + room.roomId);\n                logger.error(err);\n            }\n            return null;\n        });\n\n        return Promise.all(promises);\n    }, [cli, room, pinnedEventIds], null);\n\n    let content;\n    if (!pinnedEvents) {\n        content = <Spinner />;\n    } else if (pinnedEvents.length > 0) {\n        const onUnpinClicked = async (event: MatrixEvent) => {\n            const pinnedEvents = room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \"\");\n            if (pinnedEvents?.getContent()?.pinned) {\n                const pinned = pinnedEvents.getContent().pinned;\n                const index = pinned.indexOf(event.getId());\n                if (index !== -1) {\n                    pinned.splice(index, 1);\n                    await cli.sendStateEvent(room.roomId, EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, { pinned }, \"\");\n                }\n            }\n        };\n\n        // show them in reverse, with latest pinned at the top\n        content = pinnedEvents.filter(Boolean).reverse().map(ev => (\n            <PinnedEventTile\n                key={ev.getId()}\n                event={ev}\n                onUnpinClicked={canUnpin ? () => onUnpinClicked(ev) : undefined}\n                permalinkCreator={permalinkCreator}\n            />\n        ));\n    } else {\n        content = <div className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_wrapper\">\n            <div className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty\">\n                { /* XXX: We reuse the classes for simplicity, but deliberately not the components for non-interactivity. */ }\n                <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar mx_PinnedMessagesCard_MessageActionBar\">\n                    <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\">\n                        <EmojiIcon />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\">\n                        <ReplyIcon />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton mx_MessageActionBar_optionsButton\">\n                        <ContextMenuIcon />\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n\n                <Heading size=\"h4\" className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_header\">{ _t(\"Nothing pinned, yet\") }</Heading>\n                { _t(\"If you have permissions, open the menu on any message and select \" +\n                    \"<b>Pin</b> to stick them here.\", {}, {\n                    b: sub => <b>{ sub }</b>,\n                }) }\n            </div>\n        </div>;\n    }\n\n    return <BaseCard\n        header={<div className=\"mx_BaseCard_header_title\">\n            <Heading size=\"h4\" className=\"mx_BaseCard_header_title_heading\">{ _t(\"Pinned messages\") }</Heading>\n        </div>}\n        className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard\"\n        onClose={onClose}\n    >\n        <RoomContext.Provider value={{\n            ...roomContext,\n            timelineRenderingType: TimelineRenderingType.Pinned,\n        }}>\n            { content }\n        </RoomContext.Provider>\n    </BaseCard>;\n};\n\nexport default PinnedMessagesCard;\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/components/views/right_panel/PinnedMessagesCard.tsx"
}

License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\nWITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\nSee the License for the specific language governing permissions and\nlimitations under the License.\n*/\n\nimport React, { useCallback, useContext, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Room, RoomEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\nimport { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\nimport { EventType, RelationType } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/event';\nimport { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\nimport { RoomStateEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-state\";\n\nimport { Icon as ContextMenuIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/context-menu.svg';\nimport { Icon as EmojiIcon } from \"../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/emoji.svg\";\nimport { Icon as ReplyIcon } from '../../../../res/img/element-icons/room/message-bar/reply.svg';\nimport { _t } from \"../../../languageHandler\";\nimport BaseCard from \"./BaseCard\";\nimport Spinner from \"../elements/Spinner\";\nimport MatrixClientContext from \"../../../contexts/MatrixClientContext\";\nimport { useTypedEventEmitter } from \"../../../hooks/useEventEmitter\";\nimport PinningUtils from \"../../../utils/PinningUtils\";\nimport { useAsyncMemo } from \"../../../hooks/useAsyncMemo\";\nimport PinnedEventTile from \"../rooms/PinnedEventTile\";\nimport { useRoomState } from \"../../../hooks/useRoomState\";\nimport RoomContext, { TimelineRenderingType } from \"../../../contexts/RoomContext\";\nimport { ReadPinsEventId } from \"./types\";\nimport Heading from '../typography/Heading';\nimport { RoomPermalinkCreator } from \"../../../utils/permalinks/Permalinks\";\n\ninterface IProps {\n    room: Room;\n    permalinkCreator: RoomPermalinkCreator;\n    onClose(): void;\n}\n\nexport const usePinnedEvents = (room: Room): string[] => {\n    const [pinnedEvents, setPinnedEvents] = useState<string[]>([]);\n\n    const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\n        if (!room) return;\n        if (ev && ev.getType() !== EventType.RoomPinnedEvents) return;\n        setPinnedEvents(room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \"\")?.getContent()?.pinned || []);\n    }, [room]);\n\n    useTypedEventEmitter(room?.currentState, RoomStateEvent.Events, update);\n    useEffect(() => {\n        update();\n        return () => {\n            setPinnedEvents([]);\n        };\n    }, [update]);\n    return pinnedEvents;\n};\n\nexport const useReadPinnedEvents = (room: Room): Set<string> => {\n    const [readPinnedEvents, setReadPinnedEvents] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());\n\n    const update = useCallback((ev?: MatrixEvent) => {\n        if (!room) return;\n        if (ev && ev.getType() !== ReadPinsEventId) return;\n        const readPins = room.getAccountData(ReadPinsEventId)?.getContent()?.event_ids;\n        setReadPinnedEvents(new Set(readPins || []));\n    }, [room]);\n\n    useTypedEventEmitter(room, RoomEvent.AccountData, update);\n    useEffect(() => {\n        update();\n        return () => {\n            setReadPinnedEvents(new Set());\n        };\n    }, [update]);\n    return readPinnedEvents;\n};\n\nconst PinnedMessagesCard = ({ room, onClose, permalinkCreator }: IProps) => {\n    const cli = useContext(MatrixClientContext);\n    const roomContext = useContext(RoomContext);\n    const canUnpin = useRoomState(room, state => state.mayClientSendStateEvent(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, cli));\n    const pinnedEventIds = usePinnedEvents(room);\n    const readPinnedEvents = useReadPinnedEvents(room);\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        const newlyRead = pinnedEventIds.filter(id => !readPinnedEvents.has(id));\n        if (newlyRead.length > 0) {\n            // clear out any read pinned events which no longer are pinned\n            cli.setRoomAccountData(room.roomId, ReadPinsEventId, {\n                event_ids: pinnedEventIds,\n            });\n        }\n    }, [cli, room.roomId, pinnedEventIds, readPinnedEvents]);\n\n    const pinnedEvents = useAsyncMemo(() => {\n        const promises = pinnedEventIds.map(async eventId => {\n            const timelineSet = room.getUnfilteredTimelineSet();\n            const localEvent = timelineSet?.getTimelineForEvent(eventId)?.getEvents().find(e => e.getId() === eventId);\n            if (localEvent) return PinningUtils.isPinnable(localEvent) ? localEvent : null;\n\n            try {\n                // Fetch the event and latest edit in parallel\n                const [evJson, { events: [edit] }] = await Promise.all([\n                    cli.fetchRoomEvent(room.roomId, eventId),\n                    cli.relations(room.roomId, eventId, RelationType.Replace, null, { limit: 1 }),\n                ]);\n                const event = new MatrixEvent(evJson);\n                if (event.isEncrypted()) {\n                    await cli.decryptEventIfNeeded(event); // TODO await?\n                }\n\n                if (event && PinningUtils.isPinnable(event)) {\n                    // Inject sender information\n                    event.sender = room.getMember(event.getSender());\n                    // Also inject any edits we've found\n                    if (edit) event.makeReplaced(edit);\n\n                    return event;\n                }\n            } catch (err) {\n                logger.error(\"Error looking up pinned event \" + eventId + \" in room \" + room.roomId);\n                logger.error(err);\n            }\n            return null;\n        });\n\n        return Promise.all(promises);\n    }, [cli, room, pinnedEventIds], null);\n\n    let content;\n    if (!pinnedEvents) {\n        content = <Spinner />;\n    } else if (pinnedEvents.length > 0) {\n        const onUnpinClicked = async (event: MatrixEvent) => {\n            const pinnedEvents = room.currentState.getStateEvents(EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, \"\");\n            if (pinnedEvents?.getContent()?.pinned) {\n                const pinned = pinnedEvents.getContent().pinned;\n                const index = pinned.indexOf(event.getId());\n                if (index !== -1) {\n                    pinned.splice(index, 1);\n                    await cli.sendStateEvent(room.roomId, EventType.RoomPinnedEvents, { pinned }, \"\");\n                }\n            }\n () => onUnpinClicked(ev) : undefined}\n                permalinkCreator={permalinkCreator}\n            />\n        ));\n    } else {\n        content = <div className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_wrapper\">\n            <div className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty\">\n                { /* XXX: We reuse the classes for simplicity, but deliberately not the components for non-interactivity. */ }\n                <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar mx_PinnedMessagesCard_MessageActionBar\">\n                    <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\">\n                        <EmojiIcon />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton\">\n                        <ReplyIcon />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"mx_MessageActionBar_iconButton mx_MessageActionBar_optionsButton\">\n                        <ContextMenuIcon />\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n\n                <Heading size=\"h4\" className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard_empty_header\">{ _t(\"Nothing pinned, yet\") }</Heading>\n                { _t(\"If you have permissions, open the menu on any message and select \" +\n                    \"<b>Pin</b> to stick them here.\", {}, {\n                    b: sub => <b>{ sub }</b>,\n                }) }\n            </div>\n        </div>;\n    }\n\n    return <BaseCard\n        header={<div className=\"mx_BaseCard_header_title\">\n            <Heading size=\"h4\" className=\"mx_BaseCard_header_title_heading\">{ _t(\"Pinned messages\") }</Heading>\n        </div>}\n        className=\"mx_PinnedMessagesCard\"\n        onClose={onClose}\n    >\n        <RoomContext.Provider value={{\n            ...roomContext,\n            timelineRenderingType: TimelineRenderingType.Pinned,\n        }}>\n            { content }\n        </RoomContext.Provider>\n    </BaseCard>;\n};\n\nexport default PinnedMessagesCard;\n",

\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0010\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0006\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd.\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd.\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\u007f\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u00000\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0010\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000Q\ufffdtd\u0006\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\b\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0006\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0010@\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0010\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000Q\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000}\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd/\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000Y:g\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \ufffdW\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000P9\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000p\u06d7\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000p\ufffdW\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\u06d7\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffdW\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u00005\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0003\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd.\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u00000#\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0010\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000C\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0003\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000@\ufffd.\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000@\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000x\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 \u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0012\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0003\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffdx\u0002\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\n\u007f\u0003\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000 H\ufffdP\bf\u000f\u001f\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffdH9S\b\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdP\u0010H9S\u0010\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdP\u0018\u000f\u001f@\u00008S\u0018\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdP\u00198S\u0019\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdP(f\u000f\u001fD\u0000\u0000H9S(\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdP0H9S0\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdP8\u000f\u001f@\u00008S8\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdP98S9\u000f\ufffds\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdSHf\u000f\u001fD\u0000\u0000H9PH\u000f\ufffd_\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdPPH9SP\u000f\ufffdQ\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdPX\u000f\u001f@\u00008SX\u000f\ufffd@\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdPY8SY\u000f\ufffd3\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdShf\u000f\u001fD\u0000\u0000H9Ph\u000f\ufffd\u001f\u0001\u0000\u0000H\ufffdPpH9Sp\u000f\ufffd\u0011\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdPx\u000f\u001f@\u00008Sx\u000f\ufffd\u0000\u0001\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffdPy8Sy\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000H\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\u001f\u0000H9\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000H\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000f\u000f\u001f\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\u001f\u0000H9\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000f\u000f\u001f\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\u001f\u00008\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u00008\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000H\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000H9\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000uzH\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000H9\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000uj\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u00008\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000u[\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u00008\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000uLH\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000H9\ufffd\ufffd\u0000\u0000\u0000u<H\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0000 H\ufffd\u0004\u0011\ufffd\ufffd\u007f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0338\u0001\u0000\u0000\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u030b\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0307\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\u0089\ufffd\ufffd\u000f\ufffd\n\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0307\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0309\ufffd\ufffd\u000f\ufffd\u0018\ufffd\u0004\u0019\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\u000f\ufffd\n\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\u0018H\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\u000f\ufffd\u0018H\ufffd\u0004\u0019\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u030a\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0306\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd \u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\b\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0310\ufffd\b\ufffd\ufffd\u000f\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0310\ufffd\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u030b\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u030b\u0000\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0307\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\u0307\u0018\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffd\ufffdH\ufffd\u0089\ufffd\ufffd\u000f\ufffd"
}
77. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /app/package.json << 'PKGJSON'\n{\n  \"name\": \"matrix-react-sdk\",\n  \"version\": \"3.60.0\",\n  \"description\": \"SDK for matrix.org using React\",\n  \"author\": \"matrix.org\",\n  \"repository\": {\n    \"type\": \"git\",\n    \"url\": \"https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-react-sdk\"\n  },\n  \"license\": \"Apache-2.0\",\n  \"main\": \"./src/index.ts\",\n  \"matrix_src_main\": \"./src/index.ts\",\n  \"matrix_lib_main\": \"./lib/index.ts\",\n  \"matrix_lib_typings\": \"./lib/index.d.ts\",\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"test\": \"jest\"\n  },\n  \"jest\": {\n    \"snapshotSerializers\": [\n      \"enzyme-to-json/serializer\"\n    ],\n    \"testEnvironment\": \"jsdom\",\n    \"testMatch\": [\n      \"<rootDir>/test/**/*-test.[jt]s?(x)\"\n    ],\n    \"globalSetup\": \"<rootDir>/test/globalSetup.js\",\n    \"setupFiles\": [\n      \"jest-canvas-mock\"\n    ],\n    \"setupFilesAfterEnv\": [\n      \"<rootDir>/test/setupTests.js\"\n    ],\n    \"moduleNameMapper\": {\n      \"\\\\.(gif|png|ttf|woff2)$\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/imageMock.js\",\n      \"\\\\.svg$\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/svg.js\",\n      \"\\\\$webapp/i18n/languages.json\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/languages.json\",\n      \"decoderWorker\\\\.min\\\\.js\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n      \"decoderWorker\\\\.min\\\\.wasm\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n      \"waveWorker\\\\.min\\\\.js\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n      \"workers/(.+)\\\\.worker\\\\.ts\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/workerMock.js\",\n      \"^!!raw-loader!.*\": \"jest-raw-loader\",\n      \"RecorderWorklet\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\"\n    },\n    \"transformIgnorePatterns\": [\n      \"/node_modules/(?!matrix-js-sdk).+$\"\n    ],\n    \"collectCoverageFrom\": [\n      \"<rootDir>/src/**/*.{js,ts,tsx}\"\n    ],\n    \"coverageReporters\": [\n      \"text-summary\",\n      \"lcov\"\n    ],\n    \"testResultsProcessor\": \"@casualbot/jest-sonar-reporter\"\n  }\n}\nPKGJSON\necho \"Done writing package.json\"",
  "description": "Write package.json"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Done writing package.json"
}
78. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cd /app && yarn install --prefer-offline --frozen-lockfile 2>&1 | head -30",
  "description": "Try yarn install from offline cache",
  "timeout": 300000
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "\nShell cwd was reset to /workspace",
  "stdout": "yarn install v1.22.22\n[1/4] Resolving packages...\nsuccess Nothing to install.\nDone in 0.09s."
}
79. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "find /app -name \"*.snap\" -not -empty 2>/dev/null | head -5 && cat /app/test/components/views/dialogs/__snapshots__/ChangelogDialog-test.tsx.snap 2>/dev/null | head -20",
  "description": "Check if snapshots have content"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "/app/test/components/views/dialogs/__snapshots__/ChangelogDialog-test.tsx.snap\n/app/test/components/views/dialogs/__snapshots__/ExportDialog-test.tsx.snap\n/app/test/components/views/dialogs/__snapshots__/UserSettingsDialog-test.tsx.snap\n/app/test/components/views/audio_messages/__snapshots__/SeekBar-test.tsx.snap\n/app/test/components/views/beacon/__snapshots__/BeaconListItem-test.tsx.snap\n// Jest Snapshot v1, https://goo.gl/fbAQLP\n\nexports[`<ChangelogDialog /> should fetch github proxy url for each repo with old and new version strings 1`] = `\n<DocumentFragment>\n  <div\n    data-focus-guard=\"true\"\n    style=\"width: 1px; height: 0px; padding: 0px; overflow: hidden; position: fixed; top: 1px; left: 1px;\"\n    tabindex=\"0\"\n  />\n  <div\n    aria-describedby=\"mx_Dialog_content\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"mx_BaseDialog_title\"\n    class=\"mx_QuestionDialog mx_Dialog_fixedWidth\"\n    data-focus-lock-disabled=\"false\"\n    role=\"dialog\"\n  >\n    <div\n      class=\"mx_Dialog_header mx_Dialog_headerWithCancel\"\n    >\n      <h2"
}
80. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "rm -rf /app/node_modules && echo \"removed\"",
  "description": "Remove empty node_modules stubs",
  "timeout": 60000
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "removed"
}
81. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cd /app && yarn install --prefer-offline 2>&1 | tail -20",
  "description": "Reinstall node_modules from yarn cache",
  "timeout": 300000
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "\nShell cwd was reset to /workspace",
  "stdout": "yarn install v1.22.22\n[1/4] Resolving packages...\n[2/4] Fetching packages...\n[3/4] Linking dependencies...\n[4/4] Building fresh packages...\nsuccess Saved lockfile.\nDone in 0.10s."
}
82. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "ls /app/node_modules 2>/dev/null | head -10 && wc -c /app/node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js 2>/dev/null",
  "description": "Check if node_modules were installed"
}
Output
"Error: Exit code 1"
83. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "ls /app/node_modules 2>/dev/null || echo \"node_modules doesn't exist\"",
  "description": "Check node_modules existence"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": ""
}
84. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "ls -la /app/node_modules 2>/dev/null; echo \"exit: $?\"",
  "description": "Check node_modules with exit code"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "total 4\ndrwxr-sr-x 2 claude claude  37 Mar  8 04:17 .\ndrwxr-sr-x 1 claude claude 110 Mar  8 04:17 ..\n-rw-r--r-- 1 claude claude 184 Mar  8 04:17 .yarn-integrity\nexit: 0"
}
85. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "{\n  \"name\": \"matrix-react-sdk\",\n  \"version\": \"3.60.0\",\n  \"description\": \"SDK for matrix.org using React\",\n  \"author\": \"matrix.org\",\n  \"repository\": {\n    \"type\": \"git\",\n    \"url\": \"https://github.com/matrix-org/matrix-react-sdk\"\n  },\n  \"license\": \"Apache-2.0\",\n  \"main\": \"./src/index.ts\",\n  \"matrix_src_main\": \"./src/index.ts\",\n  \"matrix_lib_main\": \"./lib/index.ts\",\n  \"matrix_lib_typings\": \"./lib/index.d.ts\",\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"test\": \"jest\"\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"@babel/runtime\": \"^7.12.5\",\n    \"classnames\": \"^2.2.6\",\n    \"flux\": \"2.1.1\",\n    \"matrix-js-sdk\": \"github:matrix-org/matrix-js-sdk#develop\",\n    \"posthog-js\": \"1.12.2\",\n    \"react\": \"17.0.2\",\n    \"react-dom\": \"17.0.2\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@babel/cli\": \"^7.12.10\",\n    \"@babel/core\": \"^7.12.10\",\n    \"@babel/eslint-parser\": \"^7.12.10\",\n    \"@babel/plugin-proposal-class-properties\": \"^7.12.1\",\n    \"@babel/plugin-proposal-export-default-from\": \"^7.12.1\",\n    \"@babel/plugin-proposal-numeric-separator\": \"^7.12.7\",\n    \"@babel/plugin-proposal-object-rest-spread\": \"^7.12.1\",\n    \"@babel/plugin-transform-runtime\": \"^7.12.10\",\n    \"@babel/preset-env\": \"^7.12.11\",\n    \"@babel/preset-react\": \"^7.12.10\",\n    \"@babel/preset-typescript\": \"^7.12.7\",\n    \"@babel/register\": \"^7.12.10\",\n    \"@casualbot/jest-sonar-reporter\": \"^2.2.5\",\n    \"@matrix-org/olm\": \"https://gitlab.matrix.org/api/v4/projects/27/packages/npm/@matrix-org/olm/-/@matrix-org/olm-3.2.8.tgz\",\n    \"@peculiar/webcrypto\": \"^1.4.1\",\n    \"@sentry/types\": \"^6.10.0\",\n    \"@sinonjs/fake-timers\": \"^9.1.2\",\n    \"@testing-library/jest-dom\": \"^5.16.5\",\n    \"@testing-library/react\": \"^12.1.5\",\n    \"@testing-library/user-event\": \"^14.4.3\",\n    \"@types/classnames\": \"^2.2.11\",\n    \"@types/jest\": \"^29.2.1\",\n    \"@types/node\": \"^14.18.28\",\n    \"@types/react\": \"^17.0.49\",\n    \"@types/react-dom\": \"^17.0.17\",\n    \"babel-jest\": \"^26.6.3\",\n    \"enzyme\": \"^3.11.0\",\n    \"enzyme-to-json\": \"^3.6.2\",\n    \"jest\": \"^29.2.2\",\n    \"jest-canvas-mock\": \"^2.3.0\",\n    \"jest-environment-jsdom\": \"^29.2.2\",\n    \"jest-mock\": \"^29.2.2\",\n    \"jest-raw-loader\": \"^1.0.1\",\n    \"typescript\": \"4.7.4\"\n  },\n  \"jest\": {\n    \"snapshotSerializers\": [\n   "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "import cheerio from 'cheerio';\nimport { isHtml } from 'cheerio/lib/utils';\n\nimport { get } from './configuration';\nimport { childrenOfNode } from './RSTTraversal';\nimport realGetAdapter from './getAdapter';\nimport validateAdapter from './validateAdapter';\n--\n    return cheerio.root();\n  }\n\n  if (!isHtml(html)) {\n    // use isDocument=false to create fragment\n    return cheerio.load(html, null, false).root();\n  }\n\n  return cheerio.load('')(html);\n}"
}

{
  "command": "cd /app && node -e \"\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst d = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8'));\nd.jest.transformIgnorePatterns = ['/node_modules/(?!(matrix-js-sdk|cheerio|htmlparser2|entities|domhandler|domutils|css-select|nth-check|boolbase|css-what|p-retry|is-network-error|uuid)).+\\$'];\nfs.writeFileSync('package.json', JSON.stringify(d, null, 2));\nconsole.log('done');\n\"",
  "description": "Add uuid to transformIgnorePatterns"
}

  "interrupted": false,

That's why we're stubbing it.\\n23: global.setImmediate = callback => setTimeout(callback, 0);\\n24: \\n25: // Stub ResizeObserver\\n26: // @ts-ignore - we know it's a duplicate (that's why we're stubbing it)\\n27: class ResizeObserver {\\n28:     observe() {} // do nothing\\n29:     unobserve() {} // do nothing\\n30:     disconnect() {} // do nothing\\n31: }\\n32: window.ResizeObserver = ResizeObserver;\\n33: \\n34: // Stub DOMRect\\n35: class DOMRect {\\n36:     x = 0;\\n37:     y = 0;\\n38:     top = 0;\\n39:     bottom = 0;\\n40:     left = 0;\\n41:     right = 0;\\n42:     height = 0;\\n43:     width = 0;\\n44: \\n45:     static fromRect() {\\n46:         return new DOMRect();\\n47:     }\\n48:     toJSON() {}\\n49: }\\n50: \\n51: window.DOMRect = DOMRect;\\n52: \\n53: // Work around missing ClipboardEvent type\\n54: class MyClipboardEvent {}\\n55: window.ClipboardEvent = MyClipboardEvent as any;\\n56: \\n57: // matchMedia is not included in jsdom\\n58: const mockMatchMedia = jest.fn().mockImplementation(query => ({\\n59:     matches: false,\\n60:     media: query,\\n61:     onchange: null,\\n62:     addListener: jest.fn(), // Deprecated\\n63:     removeListener: jest.fn(), // Deprecated\\n64:     addEventListener: jest.fn(),\\n65:     removeEventListener: jest.fn(),\\n66:     dispatchEvent: jest.fn(),\\n67: }));\\n68: global.matchMedia = mockMatchMedia;\\n69: \\n70: // maplibre requires a createObjectURL mock\\n71: global.URL.createObjectURL = jest.fn();\\n72: global.URL.revokeObjectURL = jest.fn();\\n73: \\n74: // polyfilling TextEncoder as it is not available on JSDOM\\n75: // view https://github.com/facebook/jest/issues/9983\\n76: global.TextEncoder = TextEncoder;\\n77: // @ts-ignore\\n78: global.TextDecoder = TextDecoder;\\n79: \\n80: // prevent errors whenever a component tries to manually scroll.\\n81: window.HTMLElement.prototype.scrollIntoView = jest.fn();\\n82: \\n83: // set up fetch API mock\\n84: fetchMock.config.overwriteRoutes = false;\\n85: fetchMock.catch(\\\"\\\");\\n86: fetchMock.get(\\\"/image-file-stub\\\", \\\"image file stub\\\");\\n87: // @ts-ignore\\n88: window.fetch = fetchMock.sandbox();\\n89: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/test/setup/setupManualMocks.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import fetchMock from \"fetch-mock-jest\";\n18: import { TextDecoder, TextEncoder } from \"util\";\n19: \n20: // jest 27 removes setImmediate from jsdom\n21: // polyfill until setImmediate use in client can be removed\n22: // @ts-ignore - we know the contract is wrong. That's why we're stubbing it.\n23: global.setImmediate = callback => setTimeout(callback, 0);\n24: \n25: // Stub ResizeObserver\n26: // @ts-ignore - we know it's a duplicate (that's why we're stubbing it)\n27: class ResizeObserver {\n28:     observe() {} // do nothing\n29:     unobserve() {} // do nothing\n30:     disconnect() {} // do nothing\n31: }\n32: window.ResizeObserver = ResizeObserver;\n33: \n34: // Stub DOMRect\n35: class DOMRect {\n36:     x = 0;\n37:     y = 0;\n38:     top = 0;\n39:     bottom = 0;\n40:     left = 0;\n41:     right = 0;\n42:     height = 0;\n43:     width = 0;\n44: \n45:     static fromRect() {\n46:         return new DOMRect();\n47:     }\n48:     toJSON() {}\n49: }\n50: \n51: window.DOMRect = DOMRect;\n52: \n53: // Work around missing ClipboardEvent type\n54: class MyClipboardEvent {}\n55: window.ClipboardEvent = MyClipboardEvent as any;\n56: \n57: // matchMedia is not included in jsdom\n58: const mockMatchMedia = jest.fn().mockImplementation(query => ({\n59:     matches: false,\n60:     media: query,\n61:     onchange: null,\n62:     addListener: jest.fn(), // Deprecated\n63:     removeListener: jest.fn(), // Deprecated\n64:     addEventListener: jest.fn(),\n65:     removeEventListener: jest.fn(),\n66:     dispatchEvent: jest.fn(),\n67: }));\n68: global.matchMedia = mockMatchMedia;\n69: \n70: // maplibre requires a createObjectURL mock\n71: global.URL.createObjectURL = jest.fn();\n72: global.URL.revokeObjectURL = jest.fn();\n73: \n74: // polyfilling TextEncoder as it is not available on JSDOM\n75: // view https://github.com/facebook/jest/issues/9983\n76: global.TextEncoder = TextEncoder;\n77: // @ts-ignore\n78: global.TextDecoder = TextDecoder;\n79: \n80: // prevent errors whenever a component tries to manually scroll.\n81: window.HTMLElement.prototype.scrollIntoView = jest.fn();\n82: \n83: // set up fetch API mock\n84: fetchMock.config.overwriteRoutes = false;\n85: fetchMock.catch(\"\");\n86: fetchMock.get(\"/image-file-stub\", \"image file stub\");\n87: // @ts-ignore\n88: window.fetch = fetchMock.sandbox();\n89: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/test/setup/setupManualMocks.ts"
  }
}
