We have to manually reach into the\n598:                     // handler for this because it isn't a setting anymore (`getValue` will yell at us).\n599:                     const handler = LEVEL_HANDLERS[SettingLevel.DEVICE] as DeviceSettingsHandler;\n600:                     const labsVal = handler.readFeature(\"feature_hidden_read_receipts\");\n601:                     if (typeof labsVal === \"boolean\") {\n602:                         // Inverse of labs flag because negative->positive language switch in setting name\n603:                         const newVal = !labsVal;\n604:                         console.log(`Setting sendReadReceipts to ${newVal} because of previously-set labs flag`);\n605: \n606:                         // noinspection JSIgnoredPromiseFromCall\n607:                         SettingsStore.setValue(\"sendReadReceipts\", null, SettingLevel.ACCOUNT, newVal);\n608:                     }\n609:                 }\n610:             }\n611:         });\n612:     }\n613: \n614:     /**\n615:      * Debugging function for reading explicit setting values without going through the\n616:      * complicated/biased functions in the SettingsStore. This will print information to\n617:      * the console for analysis. Not intended to be used within the application.\n618:      * @param {string} realSettingName The setting name to try and read.\n619:      * @param {string} roomId Optional room ID to test the setting in.\n620:      */\n621:     public static debugSetting(realSettingName: string, roomId: string) {\n622:         logger.log(`--- DEBUG ${realSettingName}`);\n623: \n624:         // Note: we intentionally use JSON.stringify here to avoid the console masking the\n625:         // problem if there's a type representation issue. Also, this way it is guaranteed\n626:         // to show up in a rageshake if required.\n627: \n628:         const def = SETTINGS[realSettingName];\n629:         logger.log(`--- definition: ${def ? JSON.stringify(def) : '<NOT_FOUND>'}`);\n630:         logger.log(`--- default level order: ${JSON.stringify(LEVEL_ORDER)}`);\n631:         logger.log(`--- registered handlers: ${JSON.stringify(Object.keys(LEVEL_HANDLERS))}`);\n632: \n633:         const doChecks = (settingName) => {\n634:             for (const handlerName of Object.keys(LEVEL_HANDLERS)) {\n635:                 const handler = LEVEL_HANDLERS[handlerName];\n636: \n637:                 try {\n638:                     const value = handler.getValue(settingName, roomId);\n639:                     logger.log(`---     ${handlerName}@${roomId || '<no_room>'} = ${JSON.stringify(value)}`);\n640:                 } catch (e) {\n641:                     logger.log(`---     ${handler}@${roomId || '<no_room>'} THREW ERROR: ${e.message}`);\n642:                     logger.error(e);\n643:                 }\n644: \n645:                 if (roomId) {\n646:                     try {\n647:                         const value = handler.getValue(settingName, null);\n648:                         logger.log(`---     ${handlerName}@<no_room> = ${JSON.stringify(value)}`);\n649:                     } catch (e) {\n650:                         logger.log(`---     ${handler}@<no_room> THREW ERROR: ${e.message}`);\n651:                         logger.error(e);\n652:                     }\n653:                 }\n654:             }\n655: \n656:             logger.log(`--- calculating as returned by SettingsStore`);\n657:             logger.log(`--- these might not match if the setting uses a controller - be warned!`);\n658: \n659:             try {\n660:                 const value = SettingsStore.getValue(settingName, roomId);\n661:                 logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#generic@${roomId || '<no_room>'}  = ${JSON.stringify(value)}`);\n662:             } catch (e) {\n663:                 logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#generic@${roomId || '<no_room>'} THREW ERROR: ${e.message}`);\n664:                 logger.error(e);\n665:             }\n666: \n667:             if (roomId) {\n668:                 try {\n669:                     const value = SettingsStore.getValue(settingName, null);\n670:                     logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#generic@<no_room>  = ${JSON.stringify(value)}`);\n671:                 } catch (e) {\n672:                     logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#generic@$<no_room> THREW ERROR: ${e.message}`);\n673:                     logger.error(e);\n674:                 }\n675:             }\n676: \n677:             for (const level of LEVEL_ORDER) {\n678:                 try {\n679:                     const value = SettingsStore.getValueAt(level, settingName, roomId);\n680:                     logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#${level}@${roomId || '<no_room>'} = ${JSON.stringify(value)}`);\n681:                 } catch (e) {\n682:                     logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#${level}@${roomId || '<no_room>'} THREW ERROR: ${e.message}`);\n683:                     logger.error(e);\n684:                 }\n685: \n686:                 if (roomId) {\n687:                     try {\n688:                         const value = SettingsStore.getValueAt(level, settingName, null);\n689:                         logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#${level}@<no_room> = ${JSON.stringify(value)}`);\n690:                     } catch (e) {\n691:                         logger.log(`---     SettingsStore#${level}@$<no_room> THREW ERROR: ${e.message}`);\n692:                         logger.error(e);\n693:                     }\n694:                 }\n695:             }\n696:         };\n697: \n698:         doChecks(realSettingName);\n699: \n700:         if (def.invertedSettingName) {\n701:             logger.log(`--- TESTING INVERTED SETTING NAME`);\n702:             logger.log(`--- inverted: ${def.invertedSettingName}`);\n703:             doChecks(def.invertedSettingName);\n704:         }\n705: \n706:         logger.log(`--- END DEBUG`);\n707:     }\n708: \n709:     private static getHandler(settingName: string, level: SettingLevel): SettingsHandler {\n710:         const handlers = SettingsStore.getHandlers(settingName);\n711:         if (!handlers[level]) return null;\n712:         return handlers[level];\n713:     }\n714: \n715:     private static getHandlers(settingName: string): IHandlerMap {\n716:         if (!SETTINGS[settingName]) return {};\n717: \n718:         const handlers = {};\n719:         for (const level of SETTINGS[settingName].supportedLevels) {\n720:             if (!LEVEL_HANDLERS[level]) throw new Error(\"Unexpected level \" + level);\n721:             if (SettingsStore.isLevelSupported(level)) handlers[level] = LEVEL_HANDLERS[level];\n722:         }\n723: \n724:         // Always support 'default'\n725:         if (!handlers['default']) handlers['default'] = LEVEL_HANDLERS['default'];\n726: \n727:         return handlers;\n728:     }\n729: }\n730: \n731: // For debugging purposes\n732: window.mxSettingsStore = SettingsStore;\n733: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/settings/SettingsStore.ts"
  }
}
162. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStorePhases.ts << 'EOF'\n// These are in their own file because of circular imports being a problem.\nexport enum RightPanelPhases {\n    // Room stuff\n    RoomMemberList = 'RoomMemberList',\n    FilePanel = 'FilePanel',\n    NotificationPanel = 'NotificationPanel',\n    RoomMemberInfo = 'RoomMemberInfo',\n    EncryptionPanel = 'EncryptionPanel',\n    RoomSummary = 'RoomSummary',\n    Widget = 'Widget',\n    PinnedMessages = \"PinnedMessages\",\n    Timeline = \"Timeline\",\n\n    Room3pidMemberInfo = 'Room3pidMemberInfo',\n\n    // Space stuff\n    SpaceMemberList = \"SpaceMemberList\",\n    SpaceMemberInfo = \"SpaceMemberInfo\",\n    Space3pidMemberInfo = \"Space3pidMemberInfo\",\n\n    // Thread stuff\n    ThreadView = \"ThreadView\",\n    ThreadPanel = \"ThreadPanel\",\n}\n\nexport function backLabelForPhase(phase: RightPanelPhases): string | null {\n    return null;\n}\nEOF\necho \"Done\"",
  "description": "Write RightPanelStorePhases.ts"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Done"
}

  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import { Room } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\\\";\\n18: import { Thread, ThreadEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/thread\\\";\\n19: \\n20: import { IDestroyable } from \\\"../../utils/IDestroyable\\\";\\n21: import { NotificationState, NotificationStateEvents } from \\\"./NotificationState\\\";\\n22: import { ThreadNotificationState } from \\\"./ThreadNotificationState\\\";\\n23: import { NotificationColor } from \\\"./NotificationColor\\\";\\n24: \\n25: export class ThreadsRoomNotificationState extends NotificationState implements IDestroyable {\\n26:     public readonly threadsState = new Map<Thread, ThreadNotificationState>();\\n27: \\n28:     protected _symbol = null;\\n29:     protected _count = 0;\\n30:     protected _color = NotificationColor.None;\\n31: \\n32:     constructor(public readonly room: Room) {\\n33:         super();\\n34:         for (const thread of this.room.getThreads()) {\\n35:             this.onNewThread(thread);\\n36:         }\\n37:         this.room.on(ThreadEvent.New, this.onNewThread);\\n38:     }\\n39: \\n40:     public destroy(): void {\\n41:         super.destroy();\\n42:         this.room.off(ThreadEvent.New, this.onNewThread);\\n43:         for (const [, notificationState] of this.threadsState) {\\n44:             notificationState.off(NotificationStateEvents.Update, this.onThreadUpdate);\\n45:         }\\n46:     }\\n47: \\n48:     public getThreadRoomState(thread: Thread): ThreadNotificationState {\\n49:         if (!this.threadsState.has(thread)) {\\n50:             this.threadsState.set(thread, new ThreadNotificationState(thread));\\n51:         }\\n52:         return this.threadsState.get(thread);\\n53:     }\\n54: \\n55:     private onNewThread = (thread: Thread): void => {\\n56:         const notificationState = new ThreadNotificationState(thread);\\n57:         this.threadsState.set(\\n58:             thread,\\n59:             notificationState,\\n60:         );\\n61:         notificationState.on(NotificationStateEvents.Update, this.onThreadUpdate);\\n62:     };\\n63: \\n64:     private onThreadUpdate = (): void => {\\n65:         let color = NotificationColor.None;\\n66:         for (const [, notificationState] of this.threadsState) {\\n67:             if (notificationState.color === NotificationColor.Red) {\\n68:                 color = NotificationColor.Red;\\n69:                 break;\\n70:             } else if (notificationState.color === NotificationColor.Grey) {\\n71:                 color = NotificationColor.Grey;\\n72:             }\\n73:         }\\n74:         this.updateNotificationState(color);\\n75:     };\\n76: \\n77:     private updateNotificationState(color: NotificationColor): void {\\n78:         const snapshot = this.snapshot();\\n79:         this._color = color;\\n80:         // finally, publish an update if needed\\n81:         this.emitIfUpdated(snapshot);\\n82:     }\\n83: }\\n84: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/ThreadsRoomNotificationState.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/thread\";\n19: \n20: import { IDestroyable } from \"../../utils/IDestroyable\";\n21: import { NotificationState, NotificationStateEvents } from \"./NotificationState\";\n22: import { ThreadNotificationState } from \"./ThreadNotificationState\";\n23: import { NotificationColor } from \"./NotificationColor\";\n24: \n25: export class ThreadsRoomNotificationState extends NotificationState implements IDestroyable {\n26:     public readonly threadsState = new Map<Thread, ThreadNotificationState>();\n27: \n28:     protected _symbol = null;\n29:     protected _count = 0;\n30:     protected _color = NotificationColor.None;\n31: \n32:     constructor(public readonly room: Room) {\n33:         super();\n34:         for (const thread of this.room.getThreads()) {\n35:             this.onNewThread(thread);\n36:         }\n37:         this.room.on(ThreadEvent.New, this.onNewThread);\n38:     }\n39: \n40:     public destroy(): void {\n41:         super.destroy();\n42:         this.room.off(ThreadEvent.New, this.onNewThread);\n43:         for (const [, notificationState] of this.threadsState) {\n44:             notificationState.off(NotificationStateEvents.Update, this.onThreadUpdate);\n45:         }\n46:     }\n47: \n48:     public getThreadRoomState(thread: Thread): ThreadNotificationState {\n49:         if (!this.threadsState.has(thread)) {\n50:             this.threadsState.set(thread, new ThreadNotificationState(thread));\n51:         }\n52:         return this.threadsState.get(thread);\n53:     }\n54: \n55:     private onNewThread = (thread: Thread): void => {\n56:         const notificationState = new ThreadNotificationState(thread);\n57:         this.threadsState.set(\n58:             thread,\n59:             notificationState,\n60:         );\n61:         notificationState.on(NotificationStateEvents.Update, this.onThreadUpdate);\n62:     };\n63: \n64:     private onThreadUpdate = (): void => {\n65:         let color = NotificationColor.None;\n66:         for (const [, notificationState] of this.threadsState) {\n67:             if (notificationState.color === NotificationColor.Red) {\n68:                 color = NotificationColor.Red;\n69:                 break;\n70:             } else if (notificationState.color === NotificationColor.Grey) {\n71:                 color = NotificationColor.Grey;\n72:             }\n73:         }\n74:         this.updateNotificationState(color);\n75:     };\n76: \n77:     private updateNotificationState(color: NotificationColor): void {\n78:         const snapshot = this.snapshot();\n79:         this._color = color;\n80:         // finally, publish an update if needed\n81:         this.emitIfUpdated(snapshot);\n82:     }\n83: }\n84: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/ThreadsRoomNotificationState.ts"
  }
}

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2020 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import { NotificationColor } from \\\"./NotificationColor\\\";\\n18: import { NotificationState } from \\\"./NotificationState\\\";\\n19: \\n20: /**\\n21:  * Summarizes a number of states into a unique snapshot. To populate, call\\n22:  * the add() function with the notification states to be included.\\n23:  *\\n24:  * Useful for community notification counts, global notification counts, etc.\\n25:  */\\n26: export class SummarizedNotificationState extends NotificationState {\\n27:     private totalStatesWithUnread = 0;\\n28: \\n29:     constructor() {\\n30:         super();\\n31:         this._symbol = null;\\n32:         this._count = 0;\\n33:         this._color = NotificationColor.None;\\n34:     }\\n35: \\n36:     public get numUnreadStates(): number {\\n37:         return this.totalStatesWithUnread;\\n38:     }\\n39: \\n40:     /**\\n41:      * Append a notification state to this snapshot, taking the loudest NotificationColor\\n42:      * of the two. By default this will not adopt the symbol of the other notification\\n43:      * state to prevent the count from being lost in typical usage.\\n44:      * @param other The other notification state to append.\\n45:      * @param includeSymbol If true, the notification state's symbol will be taken if one\\n46:      * is present.\\n47:      */\\n48:     public add(other: NotificationState, includeSymbol = false) {\\n49:         if (other.symbol && includeSymbol) {\\n50:             this._symbol = other.symbol;\\n51:         }\\n52:         if (other.count) {\\n53:             this._count += other.count;\\n54:         }\\n55:         if (other.color > this.color) {\\n56:             this._color = other.color;\\n57:         }\\n58:         if (other.hasUnreadCount) {\\n59:             this.totalStatesWithUnread++;\\n60:         }\\n61:     }\\n62: }\\n63: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/SummarizedNotificationState.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2020 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import { NotificationColor } from \"./NotificationColor\";\n18: import { NotificationState } from \"./NotificationState\";\n19: \n20: /**\n21:  * Summarizes a number of states into a unique snapshot. To populate, call\n22:  * the add() function with the notification states to be included.\n23:  *\n24:  * Useful for community notification counts, global notification counts, etc.\n25:  */\n26: export class SummarizedNotificationState extends NotificationState {\n27:     private totalStatesWithUnread = 0;\n28: \n29:     constructor() {\n30:         super();\n31:         this._symbol = null;\n32:         this._count = 0;\n33:         this._color = NotificationColor.None;\n34:     }\n35: \n36:     public get numUnreadStates(): number {\n37:         return this.totalStatesWithUnread;\n38:     }\n39: \n40:     /**\n41:      * Append a notification state to this snapshot, taking the loudest NotificationColor\n42:      * of the two. By default this will not adopt the symbol of the other notification\n43:      * state to prevent the count from being lost in typical usage.\n44:      * @param other The other notification state to append.\n45:      * @param includeSymbol If true, the notification state's symbol will be taken if one\n46:      * is present.\n47:      */\n48:     public add(other: NotificationState, includeSymbol = false) {\n49:         if (other.symbol && includeSymbol) {\n50:             this._symbol = other.symbol;\n51:         }\n52:         if (other.count) {\n53:             this._count += other.count;\n54:         }\n55:         if (other.color > this.color) {\n56:             this._color = other.color;\n57:         }\n58:         if (other.hasUnreadCount) {\n59:             this.totalStatesWithUnread++;\n60:         }\n61:     }\n62: }\n63: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/SummarizedNotificationState.ts"
  }
}
170. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/stores/notifications/NotificationState.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { TypedEventEmitter } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/typed-event-emitter\";\nimport { NotificationColor } from \"./NotificationColor\";\n\nexport interface INotificationStateSnapshotParams {\n    symbol: string | null;\n    count: number;\n    color: NotificationColor;\n}\n\nexport enum NotificationStateEvents {\n    Update = \"update\",\n}\n\ntype EventHandlerMap = {\n    [NotificationStateEvents.Update]: () => void;\n};\n\nexport abstract class NotificationState\n    extends TypedEventEmitter<NotificationStateEvents, EventHandlerMap>\n    implements INotificationStateSnapshotParams {\n    protected _symbol: string | null;\n    protected _count: number;\n    protected _color: NotificationColor;\n\n    public get symbol(): string { return this._symbol; }\n    public get count(): number { return this._count; }\n    public get color(): NotificationColor { return this._color; }\n    public get isIdle(): boolean { return this.color <= NotificationColor.None; }\n    public get isUnread(): boolean { return this.color >= NotificationColor.Bold; }\n    public get hasUnreadCount(): boolean { return this.color >= NotificationColor.Grey && (!!this.count || !!this.symbol); }\n    public get hasMentions(): boolean { return this.color >= NotificationColor.Red; }\n\n    protected emitIfUpdated(snapshot: NotificationStateSnapshot) {\n        if (snapshot.isDifferentFrom(this)) {\n            this.emit(NotificationStateEvents.Update);\n        }\n    }\n\n    protected snapshot(): NotificationStateSnapshot {\n        return new NotificationStateSnapshot(this);\n    }\n\n    public destroy(): void {\n        this.removeAllListeners(NotificationStateEvents.Update);\n    }\n}\n\nexport class NotificationStateSnapshot {\n    private readonly symbol: string;\n    private readonly count: number;\n    private readonly color: NotificationColor;\n\n    constructor(state: INotificationStateSnapshotParams) {\n        this.symbol = state.symbol;\n        this.count = state.count;\n        this.color = state.color;\n    }\n\n    public isDifferentFrom(other: INotificationStateSnapshotParams): boolean {\n        const before = { count: this.count, symbol: this.symbol, color: this.color };\n        const after = { count: other.count, symbol: other.symbol, color: other.color };\n        return JSON.stringify(before) !== JSON.stringify(after);\n    }\n}\nEOF\necho \"Done\"",
  "description": "Write NotificationState.ts"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Done"
}
171. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/stores/notifications/SummarizedNotificationState.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { NotificationColor } from \"./NotificationColor\";\nimport { NotificationState } from \"./NotificationState\";\n\nexport class SummarizedNotificationState extends NotificationState {\n    private totalStatesWithUnread = 0;\n\n    constructor() {\n        super();\n        this._symbol = null;\n        this._count = 0;\n        this._color = NotificationColor.None;\n    }\n\n    public get numUnreadStates(): number {\n        return this.totalStatesWithUnread;\n    }\n\n    public add(other: NotificationState, includeSymbol = false) {\n        if (other.symbol && includeSymbol) {\n            this._symbol = other.symbol;\n        }\n        if (other.count) {\n            this._count += other.count;\n        }\n        if (other.color > this.color) {\n            this._color = other.color;\n        }\n        if (other.hasUnreadCount) {\n            this.totalStatesWithUnread++;\n        }\n    }\n}\nEOF\necho \"Done\"",
  "description": "Write SummarizedNotificationState.ts"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Done"
}

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import { MatrixEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\\\";\\n18: import { Thread, ThreadEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/thread\\\";\\n19: \\n20: import { NotificationColor } from \\\"./NotificationColor\\\";\\n21: import { IDestroyable } from \\\"../../utils/IDestroyable\\\";\\n22: import { MatrixClientPeg } from \\\"../../MatrixClientPeg\\\";\\n23: import { NotificationState } from \\\"./NotificationState\\\";\\n24: \\n25: export class ThreadNotificationState extends NotificationState implements IDestroyable {\\n26:     protected _symbol = null;\\n27:     protected _count = 0;\\n28:     protected _color = NotificationColor.None;\\n29: \\n30:     constructor(public readonly thread: Thread) {\\n31:         super();\\n32:         this.thread.on(ThreadEvent.NewReply, this.handleNewThreadReply);\\n33:         this.thread.on(ThreadEvent.ViewThread, this.resetThreadNotification);\\n34:         if (this.thread.replyToEvent) {\\n35:             // Process the current tip event\\n36:             this.handleNewThreadReply(this.thread, this.thread.replyToEvent);\\n37:         }\\n38:     }\\n39: \\n40:     public destroy(): void {\\n41:         super.destroy();\\n42:         this.thread.off(ThreadEvent.NewReply, this.handleNewThreadReply);\\n43:         this.thread.off(ThreadEvent.ViewThread, this.resetThreadNotification);\\n44:     }\\n45: \\n46:     private handleNewThreadReply = (thread: Thread, event: MatrixEvent) => {\\n47:         const client = MatrixClientPeg.get();\\n48: \\n49:         const myUserId = client.getUserId();\\n50: \\n51:         const isOwn = myUserId === event.getSender();\\n52:         const readReceipt = this.thread.room.getReadReceiptForUserId(myUserId);\\n53: \\n54:         if (!isOwn && !readReceipt || (readReceipt && event.getTs() >= readReceipt.data.ts)) {\\n55:             const actions = client.getPushActionsForEvent(event, true);\\n56: \\n57:             if (actions?.tweaks) {\\n58:                 const color = !!actions.tweaks.highlight\\n59:                     ? NotificationColor.Red\\n60:                     : NotificationColor.Grey;\\n61: \\n62:                 this.updateNotificationState(color);\\n63:             }\\n64:         }\\n65:     };\\n66: \\n67:     private resetThreadNotification = (): void => {\\n68:         this.updateNotificationState(NotificationColor.None);\\n69:     };\\n70: \\n71:     private updateNotificationState(color: NotificationColor) {\\n72:         const snapshot = this.snapshot();\\n73: \\n74:         this._color = color;\\n75: \\n76:         // finally, publish an update if needed\\n77:         this.emitIfUpdated(snapshot);\\n78:     }\\n79: }\\n80: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/ThreadNotificationState.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\n18: import { Thread, ThreadEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/thread\";\n19: \n20: import { NotificationColor } from \"./NotificationColor\";\n21: import { IDestroyable } from \"../../utils/IDestroyable\";\n22: import { MatrixClientPeg } from \"../../MatrixClientPeg\";\n23: import { NotificationState } from \"./NotificationState\";\n24: \n25: export class ThreadNotificationState extends NotificationState implements IDestroyable {\n26:     protected _symbol = null;\n27:     protected _count = 0;\n28:     protected _color = NotificationColor.None;\n29: \n30:     constructor(public readonly thread: Thread) {\n31:         super();\n32:         this.thread.on(ThreadEvent.NewReply, this.handleNewThreadReply);\n33:         this.thread.on(ThreadEvent.ViewThread, this.resetThreadNotification);\n34:         if (this.thread.replyToEvent) {\n35:             // Process the current tip event\n36:             this.handleNewThreadReply(this.thread, this.thread.replyToEvent);\n37:         }\n38:     }\n39: \n40:     public destroy(): void {\n41:         super.destroy();\n42:         this.thread.off(ThreadEvent.NewReply, this.handleNewThreadReply);\n43:         this.thread.off(ThreadEvent.ViewThread, this.resetThreadNotification);\n44:     }\n45: \n46:     private handleNewThreadReply = (thread: Thread, event: MatrixEvent) => {\n47:         const client = MatrixClientPeg.get();\n48: \n49:         const myUserId = client.getUserId();\n50: \n51:         const isOwn = myUserId === event.getSender();\n52:         const readReceipt = this.thread.room.getReadReceiptForUserId(myUserId);\n53: \n54:         if (!isOwn && !readReceipt || (readReceipt && event.getTs() >= readReceipt.data.ts)) {\n55:             const actions = client.getPushActionsForEvent(event, true);\n56: \n57:             if (actions?.tweaks) {\n58:                 const color = !!actions.tweaks.highlight\n59:                     ? NotificationColor.Red\n60:                     : NotificationColor.Grey;\n61: \n62:                 this.updateNotificationState(color);\n63:             }\n64:         }\n65:     };\n66: \n67:     private resetThreadNotification = (): void => {\n68:         this.updateNotificationState(NotificationColor.None);\n69:     };\n70: \n71:     private updateNotificationState(color: NotificationColor) {\n72:         const snapshot = this.snapshot();\n73: \n74:         this._color = color;\n75: \n76:         // finally, publish an update if needed\n77:         this.emitIfUpdated(snapshot);\n78:     }\n79: }\n80: ",

173. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": "src/stores/notifications/RoomNotificationStateStore.ts",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7"
}
Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2020 - 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import { Room } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\\\";\\n18: import { ISyncStateData, SyncState } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/sync\\\";\\n19: import { ClientEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/client\\\";\\n20: import { Feature, ServerSupport } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/feature\\\";\\n21: \\n22: import { ActionPayload } from \\\"../../dispatcher/payloads\\\";\\n23: import { AsyncStoreWithClient } from \\\"../AsyncStoreWithClient\\\";\\n24: import defaultDispatcher from \\\"../../dispatcher/dispatcher\\\";\\n25: import { DefaultTagID, TagID } from \\\"../room-list/models\\\";\\n26: import { FetchRoomFn, ListNotificationState } from \\\"./ListNotificationState\\\";\\n27: import { RoomNotificationState } from \\\"./RoomNotificationState\\\";\\n28: import { SummarizedNotificationState } from \\\"./SummarizedNotificationState\\\";\\n29: import { ThreadsRoomNotificationState } from \\\"./ThreadsRoomNotificationState\\\";\\n30: import { VisibilityProvider } from \\\"../room-list/filters/VisibilityProvider\\\";\\n31: import { PosthogAnalytics } from \\\"../../PosthogAnalytics\\\";\\n32: \\n33: interface IState {}\\n34: \\n35: export const UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR = Symbol(\\\"update-status-indicator\\\");\\n36: \\n37: export class RoomNotificationStateStore extends AsyncStoreWithClient<IState> {\\n38:     private static readonly internalInstance = (() => {\\n39:         const instance = new RoomNotificationStateStore();\\n40:         instance.start();\\n41:         return instance;\\n42:     })();\\n43:     private roomMap = new Map<Room, RoomNotificationState>();\\n44: \\n45:     private roomThreadsMap: Map<Room, ThreadsRoomNotificationState> = new Map<Room, ThreadsRoomNotificationState>();\\n46:     private listMap = new Map<TagID, ListNotificationState>();\\n47:     private _globalState = new SummarizedNotificationState();\\n48: \\n49:     private constructor() {\\n50:         super(defaultDispatcher, {});\\n51:     }\\n52: \\n53:     /**\\n54:      * Gets a snapshot of notification state for all visible rooms. The number of states recorded\\n55:      * on the SummarizedNotificationState is equivalent to rooms.\\n56:      */\\n57:     public get globalState(): SummarizedNotificationState {\\n58:         return this._globalState;\\n59:     }\\n60: \\n61:     /**\\n62:      * Gets an instance of the list state class for the given tag.\\n63:      * @param tagId The tag to get the notification state for.\\n64:      * @returns The notification state for the tag.\\n65:      */\\n66:     public getListState(tagId: TagID): ListNotificationState {\\n67:         if (this.listMap.has(tagId)) {\\n68:             return this.listMap.get(tagId);\\n69:         }\\n70: \\n71:         // TODO: Update if/when invites move out of the room list.\\n72:         const useTileCount = tagId === DefaultTagID.Invite;\\n73:         const getRoomFn: FetchRoomFn = (room: Room) => {\\n74:             return this.getRoomState(room);\\n75:         };\\n76:         const state = new ListNotificationState(useTileCount, getRoomFn);\\n77:         this.listMap.set(tagId, state);\\n78:         return state;\\n79:     }\\n80: \\n81:     /**\\n82:      * Gets a copy of the notification state for a room. The consumer should not\\n83:      * attempt to destroy the returned state as it may be shared with other\\n84:      * consumers.\\n85:      * @param room The room to get the notification state for.\\n86:      * @returns The room's notification state.\\n87:      */\\n88:     public getRoomState(room: Room): RoomNotificationState {\\n89:         if (!this.roomMap.has(room)) {\\n90:             let threadState;\\n91:             if (room.client.canSupport.get(Feature.ThreadUnreadNotifications) === ServerSupport.Unsupported) {\\n92:                 // Not very elegant, but that way we ensure that we start tracking\\n93:                 // threads notification at the same time at rooms.\\n94:                 // There are multiple entry points, and it's unclear which one gets\\n95:                 // called first\\n96:                 const threadState = new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room);\\n97:                 this.roomThreadsMap.set(room, threadState);\\n98:             }\\n99:             this.roomMap.set(room, new RoomNotificationState(room, threadState));\\n100:         }\\n101:         return this.roomMap.get(room);\\n102:     }\\n103: \\n104:     public getThreadsRoomState(room: Room): ThreadsRoomNotificationState | null {\\n105:         if (room.client.canSupport.get(Feature.ThreadUnreadNotifications) !== ServerSupport.Unsupported) {\\n106:             return null;\\n107:         }\\n108: \\n109:         if (!this.roomThreadsMap.has(room)) {\\n110:             this.roomThreadsMap.set(room, new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room));\\n111:         }\\n112:         return this.roomThreadsMap.get(room);\\n113:     }\\n114: \\n115:     public static get instance(): RoomNotificationStateStore {\\n116:         return RoomNotificationStateStore.internalInstance;\\n117:     }\\n118: \\n119:     private onSync = (state: SyncState, prevState?: SyncState, data?: ISyncStateData) => {\\n120:         // Only count visible rooms to not torment the user with notification counts in rooms they can't see.\\n121:         // This will include highlights from the previous version of the room internally\\n122:         const globalState = new SummarizedNotificationState();\\n123:         const visibleRooms = this.matrixClient.getVisibleRooms();\\n124: \\n125:         let numFavourites = 0;\\n126:         for (const room of visibleRooms) {\\n127:             if (VisibilityProvider.instance.isRoomVisible(room)) {\\n128:                 globalState.add(this.getRoomState(room));\\n129: \\n130:                 if (room.tags[DefaultTagID.Favourite] && !room.getType()) numFavourites++;\\n131:             }\\n132:         }\\n133: \\n134:         PosthogAnalytics.instance.setProperty(\\\"numFavouriteRooms\\\", numFavourites);\\n135: \\n136:         if (this.globalState.symbol !== globalState.symbol ||\\n137:             this.globalState.count !== globalState.count ||\\n138:             this.globalState.color !== globalState.color ||\\n139:             this.globalState.numUnreadStates !== globalState.numUnreadStates ||\\n140:             state !== prevState\\n141:         ) {\\n142:             this._globalState = globalState;\\n143:             this.emit(UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR, globalState, state, prevState, data);\\n144:         }\\n145:     };\\n146: \\n147:     protected async onReady() {\\n148:         this.matrixClient.on(ClientEvent.Sync, this.onSync);\\n149:     }\\n150: \\n151:     protected async onNotReady(): Promise<any> {\\n152:         this.matrixClient?.off(ClientEvent.Sync, this.onSync);\\n153:         for (const roomState of this.roomMap.values()) {\\n154:             roomState.destroy();\\n155:         }\\n156:     }\\n157: \\n158:     // We don't need this, but our contract says we do.\\n159:     protected async onAction(payload: ActionPayload): Promise<void> {\\n160:     }\\n161: }\\n162: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/RoomNotificationStateStore.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2020 - 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import { Room } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\n18: import { ISyncStateData, SyncState } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/sync\";\n19: import { ClientEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/client\";\n20: import { Feature, ServerSupport } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/feature\";\n21: \n22: import { ActionPayload } from \"../../dispatcher/payloads\";\n23: import { AsyncStoreWithClient } from \"../AsyncStoreWithClient\";\n24: import defaultDispatcher from \"../../dispatcher/dispatcher\";\n25: import { DefaultTagID, TagID } from \"../room-list/models\";\n26: import { FetchRoomFn, ListNotificationState } from \"./ListNotificationState\";\n27: import { RoomNotificationState } from \"./RoomNotificationState\";\n28: import { SummarizedNotificationState } from \"./SummarizedNotificationState\";\n29: import { ThreadsRoomNotificationState } from \"./ThreadsRoomNotificationState\";\n30: import { VisibilityProvider } from \"../room-list/filters/VisibilityProvider\";\n31: import { PosthogAnalytics } from \"../../PosthogAnalytics\";\n32: \n33: interface IState {}\n34: \n35: export const UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR = Symbol(\"update-status-indicator\");\n36: \n37: export class RoomNotificationStateStore extends AsyncStoreWithClient<IState> {\n38:     private static readonly internalInstance = (() => {\n39:         const instance = new RoomNotificationStateStore();\n40:         instance.start();\n41:         return instance;\n42:     })();\n43:     private roomMap = new Map<Room, RoomNotificationState>();\n44: \n45:     private roomThreadsMap: Map<Room, ThreadsRoomNotificationState> = new Map<Room, ThreadsRoomNotificationState>();\n46:     private listMap = new Map<TagID, ListNotificationState>();\n47:     private _globalState = new SummarizedNotificationState();\n48: \n49:     private constructor() {\n50:         super(defaultDispatcher, {});\n51:     }\n52: \n53:     /**\n54:      * Gets a snapshot of notification state for all visible rooms. The number of states recorded\n55:      * on the SummarizedNotificationState is equivalent to rooms.\n56:      */\n57:     public get globalState(): SummarizedNotificationState {\n58:         return this._globalState;\n59:     }\n60: \n61:     /**\n62:      * Gets an instance of the list state class for the given tag.\n63:      * @param tagId The tag to get the notification state for.\n64:      * @returns The notification state for the tag.\n65:      */\n66:     public getListState(tagId: TagID): ListNotificationState {\n67:         if (this.listMap.has(tagId)) {\n68:             return this.listMap.get(tagId);\n69:         }\n70: \n71:         // TODO: Update if/when invites move out of the room list.\n72:         const useTileCount = tagId === DefaultTagID.Invite;\n73:         const getRoomFn: FetchRoomFn = (room: Room) => {\n74:             return this.getRoomState(room);\n75:         };\n76:         const state = new ListNotificationState(useTileCount, getRoomFn);\n77:         this.listMap.set(tagId, state);\n78:         return state;\n79:     }\n80: \n81:     /**\n82:      * Gets a copy of the notification state for a room. The consumer should not\n83:      * attempt to destroy the returned state as it may be shared with other\n84:      * consumers.\n85:      * @param room The room to get the notification state for.\n86:      * @returns The room's notification state.\n87:      */\n88:     public getRoomState(room: Room): RoomNotificationState {\n89:         if (!this.roomMap.has(room)) {\n90:             let threadState;\n91:             if (room.client.canSupport.get(Feature.ThreadUnreadNotifications) === ServerSupport.Unsupported) {\n92:                 // Not very elegant, but that way we ensure that we start tracking\n93:                 // threads notification at the same time at rooms.\n94:                 // There are multiple entry points, and it's unclear which one gets\n95:                 // called first\n96:                 const threadState = new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room);\n97:                 this.roomThreadsMap.set(room, threadState);\n98:             }\n99:             this.roomMap.set(room, new RoomNotificationState(room, threadState));\n100:         }\n101:         return this.roomMap.get(room);\n102:     }\n103: \n104:     public getThreadsRoomState(room: Room): ThreadsRoomNotificationState | null {\n105:         if (room.client.canSupport.get(Feature.ThreadUnreadNotifications) !== ServerSupport.Unsupported) {\n106:             return null;\n107:         }\n108: \n109:         if (!this.roomThreadsMap.has(room)) {\n110:             this.roomThreadsMap.set(room, new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room));\n111:         }\n112:         return this.roomThreadsMap.get(room);\n113:     }\n114: \n115:     public static get instance(): RoomNotificationStateStore {\n116:         return RoomNotificationStateStore.internalInstance;\n117:     }\n118: \n119:     private onSync = (state: SyncState, prevState?: SyncState, data?: ISyncStateData) => {\n120:         // Only count visible rooms to not torment the user with notification counts in rooms they can't see.\n121:         // This will include highlights from the previous version of the room internally\n122:         const globalState = new SummarizedNotificationState();\n123:         const visibleRooms = this.matrixClient.getVisibleRooms();\n124: \n125:         let numFavourites = 0;\n126:         for (const room of visibleRooms) {\n127:             if (VisibilityProvider.instance.isRoomVisible(room)) {\n128:                 globalState.add(this.getRoomState(room));\n129: \n130:                 if (room.tags[DefaultTagID.Favourite] && !room.getType()) numFavourites++;\n131:             }\n132:         }\n133: \n134:         PosthogAnalytics.instance.setProperty(\"numFavouriteRooms\", numFavourites);\n135: \n136:         if (this.globalState.symbol !== globalState.symbol ||\n137:             this.globalState.count !== globalState.count ||\n138:             this.globalState.color !== globalState.color ||\n139:             this.globalState.numUnreadStates !== globalState.numUnreadStates ||\n140:             state !== prevState\n141:         ) {\n142:             this._globalState = globalState;\n143:             this.emit(UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR, globalState, state, prevState, data);\n144:         }\n145:     };\n146: \n147:     protected async onReady() {\n148:         this.matrixClient.on(ClientEvent.Sync, this.onSync);\n149:     }\n150: \n151:     protected async onNotReady(): Promise<any> {\n152:         this.matrixClient?.off(ClientEvent.Sync, this.onSync);\n153:         for (const roomState of this.roomMap.values()) {\n154:             roomState.destroy();\n155:         }\n156:     }\n157: \n158:     // We don't need this, but our contract says we do.\n159:     protected async onAction(payload: ActionPayload): Promise<void> {\n160:     }\n161: }\n162: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/notifications/RoomNotificationStateStore.ts"
  }
}

out the MatrixClient, and configure the MatrixClientPeg object to\\n51:  * return it when get() is called.\\n52:  *\\n53:  * TODO: once the components are updated to get their MatrixClients from\\n54: createTestClient();\\n59: \\n60:     // stub out the methods in MatrixClientPeg\\n61:     //\\n62:     // 'sandbox.restore()' doesn't work correctly on inherited methods,\\n63:     // so we do this jest.fn(),\\n99:         },\\n100: \\n101:         crypto: {\\n102:             deviceList: {\\n103:                 downloadKeys: jest.fn(),\\n104:             },\\n105:         },\\n106: \\n107:
