MatrixEvent => {\\n230:     return mkEvent({\\n231:         event: true,\\n232:         type: EventType.RoomCreate,\\n233:         content: {\\n234:             creator: userId,\\n235:             room_version: KNOWN_SAFE_ROOM_VERSION,\\n236:         },\\n237:         skey: \\\"\\\",\\n238:         user: userId,\\n239:         room: roomId,\\n240:     });\\n241: };\\n242: \\n243: /**\\n244:  * Create an Event.\\n245:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the event.\\n246:  * @param {string} opts.type The event.type\\n247:  * @param {string} opts.room The event.room_id\\n248:  * @param {string} opts.user The event.user_id\\n249:  * @param {string=} opts.skey Optional. The state key (auto inserts empty string)\\n250:  * @param {number=} opts.ts   Optional. Timestamp for the event\\n251:  * @param {Object} opts.content The event.content\\n252:  * @param {boolean} opts.event True to make a MatrixEvent.\\n253:  * @param {unsigned=} opts.unsigned\\n254:  * @return {Object} a JSON object representing this event.\\n255:  */\\n256: export function mkEvent(opts: MakeEventProps): MatrixEvent {\\n257:     if (!opts.type || !opts.content) {\\n258:         throw new Error(\\\"Missing .type or .content =>\\\" + JSON.stringify(opts));\\n259:     }\\n260:     const event: Partial<IEvent> = {\\n261:         type: opts.type,\\n262:         room_id: opts.room,\\n263:         sender: opts.user,\\n264:         content: opts.content,\\n265:         prev_content: opts.prev_content,\\n266:         event_id: \\\"$\\\" + Math.random() + \\\"-\\\" + Math.random(),\\n267:         origin_server_ts: opts.ts ?? 0,\\n268:         unsigned: opts.unsigned,\\n269:         redacts: opts.redacts,\\n270:     };\\n271:     if (opts.skey !== undefined) {\\n272:         event.state_key = opts.skey;\\n273:     } else if ([\\n274:         \\\"m.room.name\\\", \\\"m.room.topic\\\", \\\"m.room.create\\\", \\\"m.room.join_rules\\\",\\n275:         \\\"m.room.power_levels\\\", \\\"m.room.topic\\\", \\\"m.room.history_visibility\\\",\\n276:         \\\"m.room.encryption\\\", \\\"m.room.member\\\", \\\"com.example.state\\\",\\n277:         \\\"m.room.guest_access\\\", \\\"m.room.tombstone\\\",\\n278:     ].indexOf(opts.type) !== -1) {\\n279:         event.state_key = \\\"\\\";\\n280:     }\\n281: \\n282:     const mxEvent = opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event as unknown as MatrixEvent;\\n283:     if (!mxEvent.sender && opts.user && opts.room) {\\n284:         mxEvent.sender = {\\n285:             userId: opts.user,\\n286:             membership: \\\"join\\\",\\n287:             name: opts.user,\\n288:             rawDisplayName: opts.user,\\n289:             roomId: opts.room,\\n290:             getAvatarUrl: () => {},\\n291:             getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {},\\n292:         } as unknown as RoomMember;\\n293:     }\\n294:     return mxEvent;\\n295: }\\n296: \\n297: /**\\n298:  * Create an m.presence event.\\n299:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the presence.\\n300:  * @return {Object|MatrixEvent} The event\\n301:  */\\n302: export function mkPresence(opts) {\\n303:     if (!opts.user) {\\n304:         throw new Error(\\\"Missing user\\\");\\n305:     }\\n306:     const event = {\\n307:         event_id: \\\"$\\\" + Math.random() + \\\"-\\\" + Math.random(),\\n308:         type: \\\"m.presence\\\",\\n309:         sender: opts.user,\\n310:         content: {\\n311:             avatar_url: opts.url,\\n312:             displayname: opts.name,\\n313:             last_active_ago: opts.ago,\\n314:             presence: opts.presence || \\\"offline\\\",\\n315:         },\\n316:     };\\n317:     return opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event;\\n318: }\\n319: \\n320: /**\\n321:  * Create an m.room.member event.\\n322:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the membership.\\n323:  * @param {string} opts.room The room ID for the event.\\n324:  * @param {string} opts.mship The content.membership for the event.\\n325:  * @param {string} opts.prevMship The prev_content.membership for the event.\\n326:  * @param {number=} opts.ts   Optional. Timestamp for the event\\n327:  * @param {string} opts.user The user ID for the event.\\n328:  * @param {RoomMember} opts.target The target of the event.\\n329:  * @param {string=} opts.skey The other user ID for the event if applicable\\n330:  * e.g. for invites/bans.\\n331:  * @param {string} opts.name The content.displayname for the event.\\n332:  * @param {string=} opts.url The content.avatar_url for the event.\\n333:  * @param {boolean} opts.event True to make a MatrixEvent.\\n334:  * @return {Object|MatrixEvent} The event\\n335:  */\\n336: export function mkMembership(opts: MakeEventPassThruProps & {\\n337:     room: Room[\\\"roomId\\\"];\\n338:     mship: string;\\n339:     prevMship?: string;\\n340:     name?: string;\\n341:     url?: string;\\n342:     skey?: string;\\n343:     target?: RoomMember;\\n344: }): MatrixEvent {\\n345:     const event: MakeEventProps = {\\n346:         ...opts,\\n347:         type: \\\"m.room.member\\\",\\n348:         content: {\\n349:             membership: opts.mship,\\n350:         },\\n351:     };\\n352:     if (!opts.skey) {\\n353:         event.skey = opts.user;\\n354:     }\\n355:     if (!opts.mship) {\\n356:         throw new Error(\\\"Missing .mship => \\\" + JSON.stringify(opts));\\n357:     }\\n358: \\n359:     if (opts.prevMship) {\\n360:         event.prev_content = { membership: opts.prevMship };\\n361:     }\\n362:     if (opts.name) { event.content.displayname = opts.name; }\\n363:     if (opts.url) { event.content.avatar_url = opts.url; }\\n364:     const e = mkEvent(event);\\n365:     if (opts.target) {\\n366:         e.target = opts.target;\\n367:     }\\n368:     return e;\\n369: }\\n370: \\n371: export function mkRoomMember(roomId: string, userId: string, membership = \\\"join\\\"): RoomMember {\\n372:     return {\\n373:         userId,\\n374:         membership,\\n375:         name: userId,\\n376:         rawDisplayName: userId,\\n377:         roomId,\\n378:         events: {},\\n379:         getAvatarUrl: () => {},\\n380:         getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {},\\n381:         getDMInviter: () => {},\\n382:     } as unknown as RoomMember;\\n383: }\\n384: \\n385: export type MessageEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & {\\n386:     room: Room[\\\"roomId\\\"];\\n387:     relatesTo?: IEventRelation;\\n388:     msg?: string;\\n389: };\\n390: \\n391: /**\\n392:  * Create an m.room.message event.\\n393:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the message\\n394:  * @param {string} opts.room The room ID for the event.\\n395:  * @param {string} opts.user The user ID for the event.\\n396:  * @param {number} opts.ts The timestamp for the event.\\n397:  * @param {boolean} opts.event True to make a MatrixEvent.\\n398:  * @param {string=} opts.msg Optional. The content.body for the event.\\n399:  * @return {Object|MatrixEvent} The event\\n400:  */\\n401: export function mkMessage({ msg, relatesTo, ...opts }: MakeEventPassThruProps & {\\n402:     room: Room[\\\"roomId\\\"];\\n403:     msg?: string;\\n404: }): MatrixEvent {\\n405:     if (!opts.room || !opts.user) {\\n406:         throw new Error(\\\"Missing .room or .user from options\\\");\\n407:     }\\n408:     const message = msg ?? \\\"Random->\\\" + Math.random();\\n409:     const event: MakeEventProps = {\\n410:         ...opts,\\n411:         type: \\\"m.room.message\\\",\\n412:         content: {\\n413:             msgtype: \\\"m.text\\\",\\n414:             body: message,\\n415:             ['m.relates_to']: relatesTo,\\n416:         },\\n417:     };\\n418: \\n419:     return mkEvent(event);\\n420: }\\n421: \\n422: export function mkStubRoom(roomId: string = null, name: string, client: MatrixClient): Room {\\n423:     const stubTimeline = { getEvents: () => [] } as unknown as EventTimeline;\\n424:     return {\\n425:         roomId,\\n426:         getReceiptsForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\\n427:         getMember: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({\\n428:             userId: '@member:domain.bla',\\n429:             name: 'Member',\\n430:             rawDisplayName: 'Member',\\n431:             roomId: roomId,\\n432:             getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png',\\n433:             getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png',\\n434:         }),\\n435:         getMembersWithMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\\n436:         getJoinedMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\\n437:         getJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\\n438:         getInvitedAndJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\\n439:         setUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(),\\n440:         getMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\\n441:         getPendingEvents: () => [],\\n442:         getLiveTimeline: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(stubTimeline),\\n443:         getUnfilteredTimelineSet: jest.fn(),\\n444:         findEventById: () => null,\\n445:         getAccountData: () => null,\\n446:         hasMembershipState: () => null,\\n447:         getVersion: () => '1',\\n448:         shouldUpgradeToVersion: () => null,\\n449:         getMyMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\\\"join\\\"),\\n450:         maySendMessage: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\\n451:         currentState: {\\n452:             getStateEvents: jest.fn(),\\n453:             getMember: jest.fn(),\\n454:             mayClientSendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\\n455:             maySendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\\n456:             maySendRedactionForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\\n457:             maySendEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\\n458:             members: {},\\n459:             getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(JoinRule.Invite),\\n460:             on: jest.fn(),\\n461:             off: jest.fn(),\\n462:         } as unknown as RoomState,\\n463:         tags: {},\\n464:         setBlacklistUnverifiedDevices: jest.fn(),\\n465:         on: jest.fn(),\\n466:         off: jest.fn(),\\n467:         removeListener: jest.fn(),\\n468:         getDMInviter: jest.fn(),\\n469:         name,\\n470:         normalizedName: normalize(name || \\\"\\\"),\\n471:         getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\\n472:         getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\\n473:         isSpaceRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\\n474:         getType: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(undefined),\\n475:         isElementVideoRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\\n476:         getUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(() => 0),\\n477:         getEventReadUpTo: jest.fn(() => null),\\n478:         getCanonicalAlias: jest.fn(),\\n479:         getAltAliases: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\\n480:         timeline: [],\\n481:         getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\\\"invite\\\"),\\n482:         loadMembersIfNeeded: jest.fn(),\\n483:         client,\\n484:         myUserId: client?.getUserId(),\\n485:         canInvite: jest.fn(),\\n486:         getThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\\n487:         eventShouldLiveIn: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\\n488:         createThreadsTimelineSets: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\\n489:         fetchRoomThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\\n490:     } as unknown as Room;\\n491: }\\n492: \\n493: export function mkServerConfig(hsUrl, isUrl) {\\n494:     return makeType(ValidatedServerConfig, {\\n495:         hsUrl,\\n496:         hsName: \\\"TEST_ENVIRONMENT\\\",\\n497:         hsNameIsDifferent: false, // yes, we lie\\n498:         isUrl,\\n499:     });\\n500: }\\n501: \\n502: // These methods make some use of some private methods on the AsyncStoreWithClient to simplify getting into a consistent\\n503: // ready state without needing to wire up a dispatcher and pretend to be a js-sdk client.\\n504: \\n505: export const setupAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>, client: MatrixClient) => {\\n506:     // @ts-ignore\\n507:     store.readyStore.useUnitTestClient(client);\\n508:     // @ts-ignore\\n509:     await store.onReady();\\n510: };\\n511: \\n512: export const resetAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>) => {\\n513:     // @ts-ignore\\n514:     await store.onNotReady();\\n515: };\\n516: \\n517: export const mockStateEventImplementation = (events: MatrixEvent[]) => {\\n518:     const stateMap = new EnhancedMap<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>();\\n519:     events.forEach(event => {\\n520:         stateMap.getOrCreate(event.getType(), new Map()).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\\n521:     });\\n522: \\n523:     // recreate the overloading in RoomState\\n524:     function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string): MatrixEvent[];\\n525:     function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey: string): MatrixEvent;\\n526:     function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey?: string) {\\n527:         if (stateKey || stateKey === \\\"\\\") {\\n528:             return stateMap.get(eventType)?.get(stateKey) || null;\\n529:         }\\n530:         return Array.from(stateMap.get(eventType)?.values() || []);\\n531:     }\\n532:     return getStateEvents;\\n533: };\\n534: \\n535: export const mkRoom = (\\n536:     client: MatrixClient,\\n537:     roomId: string,\\n538:     rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[],\\n539: ): MockedObject<Room> => {\\n540:     const room = mocked(mkStubRoom(roomId, roomId, client));\\n541:     mocked(room.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation([]));\\n542:     rooms?.push(room);\\n543:     return room;\\n544: };\\n545: \\n546: /**\\n547:  * Upserts given events into room.currentState\\n548:  * @param room\\n549:  * @param events\\n550:  */\\n551: export const upsertRoomStateEvents = (room: Room, events: MatrixEvent[]): void => {\\n552:     const eventsMap = events.reduce((acc, event) => {\\n553:         const eventType = event.getType();\\n554:         if (!acc.has(eventType)) {\\n555:             acc.set(eventType, new Map());\\n556:         }\\n557:         acc.get(eventType).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\\n558:         return acc;\\n559:     }, room.currentState.events || new Map<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>());\\n560: \\n561:     room.currentState.events = eventsMap;\\n562: };\\n563: \\n564: export const mkSpace = (\\n565:     client: MatrixClient,\\n566:     spaceId: string,\\n567:     rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[],\\n568:     children: string[] = [],\\n569: ): MockedObject<Room> => {\\n570:     const space = mocked(mkRoom(client, spaceId, rooms));\\n571:     space.isSpaceRoom.mockReturnValue(true);\\n572:     space.getType.mockReturnValue(RoomType.Space);\\n573:     mocked(space.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation(children.map(roomId =>\\n574:         mkEvent({\\n575:             event: true,\\n576:             type: EventType.SpaceChild,\\n577:             room: spaceId,\\n578:             user: \\\"@user:server\\\",\\n579:             skey: roomId,\\n580:             content: { via: [] },\\n581:             ts: Date.now(),\\n582:         }),\\n583:     )));\\n584:     return space;\\n585: };\\n586: \\n587: export const mkRoomMemberJoinEvent = (user: string, room: string): MatrixEvent => {\\n588:     return mkEvent({\\n589:         event: true,\\n590:         type: EventType.RoomMember,\\n591:         content: {\\n592:             membership: \\\"join\\\",\\n593:         },\\n594:         skey: user,\\n595:         user,\\n596:         room,\\n597:     });\\n598: };\\n599: \\n600: export const mkPusher = (extra: Partial<IPusher> = {}): IPusher => ({\\n601:     app_display_name: \\\"app\\\",\\n602:     app_id: \\\"123\\\",\\n603:     data: {},\\n604:     device_display_name: \\\"name\\\",\\n605:     kind: \\\"http\\\",\\n606:     lang: \\\"en\\\",\\n607:     pushkey: \\\"pushpush\\\",\\n608:     ...extra,\\n609: });\\n610: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/test/test-utils/test-utils.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import EventEmitter from \"events\";\n18: import { mocked, MockedObject } from 'jest-mock';\n19: import { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\n20: import { JoinRule } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/@types/partials';\n21: import {\n22:     Room,\n23:     User,\n24:     IContent,\n25:     IEvent,\n26:     RoomMember,\n27:     MatrixClient,\n28:     EventTimeline,\n29:     RoomState,\n30:     EventType,\n31:     IEventRelation,\n32:     IUnsigned,\n33:     IPusher,\n34:     RoomType,\n35:     KNOWN_SAFE_ROOM_VERSION,\n36: } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix';\n37: import { normalize } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/utils\";\n38: import { ReEmitter } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/ReEmitter\";\n39: import { MediaHandler } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/webrtc/mediaHandler\";\n40: import { Feature, ServerSupport } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/feature\";\n41: \n42: import { MatrixClientPeg as peg } from '../../src/MatrixClientPeg';\n43: import { makeType } from \"../../src/utils/TypeUtils\";\n44: import { ValidatedServerConfig } from \"../../src/utils/ValidatedServerConfig\";\n45: import { EnhancedMap } from \"../../src/utils/maps\";\n46: import { AsyncStoreWithClient } from \"../../src/stores/AsyncStoreWithClient\";\n47: import MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler from \"../../src/settings/handlers/MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler\";\n48: \n49: /**\n50:  * Stub out the MatrixClient, and configure the MatrixClientPeg object to\n51:  * return it when get() is called.\n52:  *\n53:  * TODO: once the components are updated to get their MatrixClients from\n54:  * the react context, we can get rid of this and just inject a test client\n55:  * via the context instead.\n56:  */\n57: export function stubClient(): MatrixClient {\n58:     const client = createTestClient();\n59: \n60:     // stub out the methods in MatrixClientPeg\n61:     //\n62:     // 'sandbox.restore()' doesn't work correctly on inherited methods,\n63:     // so we do this for each method\n64:     jest.spyOn(peg, 'get');\n65:     jest.spyOn(peg, 'unset');\n66:     jest.spyOn(peg, 'replaceUsingCreds');\n67:     // MatrixClientPeg.get() is called a /lot/, so implement it with our own\n68:     // fast stub function rather than a sinon stub\n69:     peg.get = function() { return client; };\n70:     MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler.matrixClient = client;\n71:     return client;\n72: }\n73: \n74: /**\n75:  * Create a stubbed-out MatrixClient\n76:  *\n77:  * @returns {object} MatrixClient stub\n78:  */\n79: export function createTestClient(): MatrixClient {\n80:     const eventEmitter = new EventEmitter();\n81:     let txnId = 1;\n82: \n83:     const client = {\n84:         getHomeserverUrl: jest.fn(),\n85:         getIdentityServerUrl: jest.fn(),\n86:         getDomain: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"matrix.org\"),\n87:         getUserId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"@userId:matrix.org\"),\n88:         getUser: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({ on: jest.fn() }),\n89:         getDeviceId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"ABCDEFGHI\"),\n90:         deviceId: \"ABCDEFGHI\",\n91:         getDevices: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ devices: [{ device_id: \"ABCDEFGHI\" }] }),\n92:         credentials: { userId: \"@userId:matrix.org\" },\n93: \n94:         store: {\n95:             getPendingEvents: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue([]),\n96:             setPendingEvents: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n97:             storeRoom: jest.fn(),\n98:             removeRoom: jest.fn(),\n99:         },\n100: \n101:         crypto: {\n102:             deviceList: {\n103:                 downloadKeys: jest.fn(),\n104:             },\n105:         },\n106: \n107:         getPushActionsForEvent: jest.fn(),\n108:         getRoom: jest.fn().mockImplementation(roomId => mkStubRoom(roomId, \"My room\", client)),\n109:         getRooms: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n110:         getVisibleRooms: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n111:         loginFlows: jest.fn(),\n112:         on: eventEmitter.on.bind(eventEmitter),\n113:         off: eventEmitter.off.bind(eventEmitter),\n114:         removeListener: eventEmitter.removeListener.bind(eventEmitter),\n115:         emit: eventEmitter.emit.bind(eventEmitter),\n116:         isRoomEncrypted: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n117:         peekInRoom: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(mkStubRoom(undefined, undefined, undefined)),\n118:         stopPeeking: jest.fn(),\n119: \n120:         paginateEventTimeline: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n121:         sendReadReceipt: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n122:         getRoomIdForAlias: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n123:         getRoomDirectoryVisibility: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n124:         getProfileInfo: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n125:         getThirdpartyProtocols: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n126:         getClientWellKnown: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(null),\n127:         supportsVoip: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n128:         getTurnServers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n129:         getTurnServersExpiry: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(2 ^ 32),\n130:         getThirdpartyUser: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue([]),\n131:         getAccountData: (type) => {\n132:             return mkEvent({\n133:                 user: undefined,\n134:                 room: undefined,\n135:                 type,\n136:                 event: true,\n137:                 content: {},\n138:             });\n139:         },\n140:         mxcUrlToHttp: (mxc) => `http://this.is.a.url/${mxc.substring(6)}`,\n141:         setAccountData: jest.fn(),\n142:         setRoomAccountData: jest.fn(),\n143:         setRoomTopic: jest.fn(),\n144:         setRoomReadMarkers: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n145:         sendTyping: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n146:         sendMessage: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n147:         sendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n148:         getSyncState: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"SYNCING\"),\n149:         generateClientSecret: () => \"t35tcl1Ent5ECr3T\",\n150:         isGuest: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n151:         getRoomHierarchy: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({\n152:             rooms: [],\n153:         }),\n154:         createRoom: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ room_id: \"!1:example.org\" }),\n155:         setPowerLevel: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n156:         pushRules: {},\n157:         decryptEventIfNeeded: () => Promise.resolve(),\n158:         isUserIgnored: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n159:         getCapabilities: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n160:         supportsExperimentalThreads: () => false,\n161:         getRoomUpgradeHistory: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n162:         getOpenIdToken: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n163:         registerWithIdentityServer: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n164:         getIdentityAccount: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n165:         getTerms: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ policies: [] }),\n166:         doesServerSupportUnstableFeature: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n167:         isVersionSupported: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n168:         getPushRules: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n169:         getPushers: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ pushers: [] }),\n170:         getThreePids: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ threepids: [] }),\n171:         setPusher: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n172:         setPushRuleEnabled: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n173:         setPushRuleActions: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n174:         relations: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({\n175:             events: [],\n176:         }),\n177:         isCryptoEnabled: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n178:         hasLazyLoadMembersEnabled: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n179:         isInitialSyncComplete: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n180:         downloadKeys: jest.fn(),\n181:         fetchRoomEvent: jest.fn(),\n182:         makeTxnId: jest.fn().mockImplementation(() => `t${txnId++}`),\n183:         sendToDevice: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n184:         queueToDevice: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n185:         encryptAndSendToDevices: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n186:         cancelPendingEvent: jest.fn(),\n187: \n188:         getMediaHandler: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({\n189:             setVideoInput: jest.fn(),\n190:             setAudioInput: jest.fn(),\n191:             setAudioSettings: jest.fn(),\n192:         } as unknown as MediaHandler),\n193:         uploadContent: jest.fn(),\n194:         getEventMapper: () => (opts) => new MatrixEvent(opts),\n195:         leaveRoomChain: jest.fn(roomId => ({ [roomId]: null })),\n196:     } as unknown as MatrixClient;\n197: \n198:     client.reEmitter = new ReEmitter(client);\n199: \n200:     client.canSupport = new Map();\n201:     Object.keys(Feature).forEach(feature => {\n202:         client.canSupport.set(feature as Feature, ServerSupport.Stable);\n203:     });\n204: \n205:     Object.defineProperty(client, \"pollingTurnServers\", {\n206:         configurable: true,\n207:         get: () => true,\n208:     });\n209:     return client;\n210: }\n211: \n212: type MakeEventPassThruProps = {\n213:     user: User[\"userId\"];\n214:     relatesTo?: IEventRelation;\n215:     event?: boolean;\n216:     ts?: number;\n217:     skey?: string;\n218: };\n219: type MakeEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n220:     type: string;\n221:     redacts?: string;\n222:     content: IContent;\n223:     room?: Room[\"roomId\"]; // to-device messages are roomless\n224:     // eslint-disable-next-line camelcase\n225:     prev_content?: IContent;\n226:     unsigned?: IUnsigned;\n227: };\n228: \n229: export const mkRoomCreateEvent = (userId: string, roomId: string): MatrixEvent => {\n230:     return mkEvent({\n231:         event: true,\n232:         type: EventType.RoomCreate,\n233:         content: {\n234:             creator: userId,\n235:             room_version: KNOWN_SAFE_ROOM_VERSION,\n236:         },\n237:         skey: \"\",\n238:         user: userId,\n239:         room: roomId,\n240:     });\n241: };\n242: \n243: /**\n244:  * Create an Event.\n245:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the event.\n246:  * @param {string} opts.type The event.type\n247:  * @param {string} opts.room The event.room_id\n248:  * @param {string} opts.user The event.user_id\n249:  * @param {string=} opts.skey Optional. The state key (auto inserts empty string)\n250:  * @param {number=} opts.ts   Optional. Timestamp for the event\n251:  * @param {Object} opts.content The event.content\n252:  * @param {boolean} opts.event True to make a MatrixEvent.\n253:  * @param {unsigned=} opts.unsigned\n254:  * @return {Object} a JSON object representing this event.\n255:  */\n256: export function mkEvent(opts: MakeEventProps): MatrixEvent {\n257:     if (!opts.type || !opts.content) {\n258:         throw new Error(\"Missing .type or .content =>\" + JSON.stringify(opts));\n259:     }\n260:     const event: Partial<IEvent> = {\n261:         type: opts.type,\n262:         room_id: opts.room,\n263:         sender: opts.user,\n264:         content: opts.content,\n265:         prev_content: opts.prev_content,\n266:         event_id: \"$\" + Math.random() + \"-\" + Math.random(),\n267:         origin_server_ts: opts.ts ?? 0,\n268:         unsigned: opts.unsigned,\n269:         redacts: opts.redacts,\n270:     };\n271:     if (opts.skey !== undefined) {\n272:         event.state_key = opts.skey;\n273:     } else if ([\n274:         \"m.room.name\", \"m.room.topic\", \"m.room.create\", \"m.room.join_rules\",\n275:         \"m.room.power_levels\", \"m.room.topic\", \"m.room.history_visibility\",\n276:         \"m.room.encryption\", \"m.room.member\", \"com.example.state\",\n277:         \"m.room.guest_access\", \"m.room.tombstone\",\n278:     ].indexOf(opts.type) !== -1) {\n279:         event.state_key = \"\";\n280:     }\n281: \n282:     const mxEvent = opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event as unknown as MatrixEvent;\n283:     if (!mxEvent.sender && opts.user && opts.room) {\n284:         mxEvent.sender = {\n285:             userId: opts.user,\n286:             membership: \"join\",\n287:             name: opts.user,\n288:             rawDisplayName: opts.user,\n289:             roomId: opts.room,\n290:             getAvatarUrl: () => {},\n291:             getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {},\n292:         } as unknown as RoomMember;\n293:     }\n294:     return mxEvent;\n295: }\n296: \n297: /**\n298:  * Create an m.presence event.\n299:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the presence.\n300:  * @return {Object|MatrixEvent} The event\n301:  */\n302: export function mkPresence(opts) {\n303:     if (!opts.user) {\n304:         throw new Error(\"Missing user\");\n305:     }\n306:     const event = {\n307:         event_id: \"$\" + Math.random() + \"-\" + Math.random(),\n308:         type: \"m.presence\",\n309:         sender: opts.user,\n310:         content: {\n311:             avatar_url: opts.url,\n312:             displayname: opts.name,\n313:             last_active_ago: opts.ago,\n314:             presence: opts.presence || \"offline\",\n315:         },\n316:     };\n317:     return opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event;\n318: }\n319: \n320: /**\n321:  * Create an m.room.member event.\n322:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the membership.\n323:  * @param {string} opts.room The room ID for the event.\n324:  * @param {string} opts.mship The content.membership for the event.\n325:  * @param {string} opts.prevMship The prev_content.membership for the event.\n326:  * @param {number=} opts.ts   Optional. Timestamp for the event\n327:  * @param {string} opts.user The user ID for the event.\n328:  * @param {RoomMember} opts.target The target of the event.\n329:  * @param {string=} opts.skey The other user ID for the event if applicable\n330:  * e.g. for invites/bans.\n331:  * @param {string} opts.name The content.displayname for the event.\n332:  * @param {string=} opts.url The content.avatar_url for the event.\n333:  * @param {boolean} opts.event True to make a MatrixEvent.\n334:  * @return {Object|MatrixEvent} The event\n335:  */\n336: export function mkMembership(opts: MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n337:     room: Room[\"roomId\"];\n338:     mship: string;\n339:     prevMship?: string;\n340:     name?: string;\n341:     url?: string;\n342:     skey?: string;\n343:     target?: RoomMember;\n344: }): MatrixEvent {\n345:     const event: MakeEventProps = {\n346:         ...opts,\n347:         type: \"m.room.member\",\n348:         content: {\n349:             membership: opts.mship,\n350:         },\n351:     };\n352:     if (!opts.skey) {\n353:         event.skey = opts.user;\n354:     }\n355:     if (!opts.mship) {\n356:         throw new Error(\"Missing .mship => \" + JSON.stringify(opts));\n357:     }\n358: \n359:     if (opts.prevMship) {\n360:         event.prev_content = { membership: opts.prevMship };\n361:     }\n362:     if (opts.name) { event.content.displayname = opts.name; }\n363:     if (opts.url) { event.content.avatar_url = opts.url; }\n364:     const e = mkEvent(event);\n365:     if (opts.target) {\n366:         e.target = opts.target;\n367:     }\n368:     return e;\n369: }\n370: \n371: export function mkRoomMember(roomId: string, userId: string, membership = \"join\"): RoomMember {\n372:     return {\n373:         userId,\n374:         membership,\n375:         name: userId,\n376:         rawDisplayName: userId,\n377:         roomId,\n378:         events: {},\n379:         getAvatarUrl: () => {},\n380:         getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {},\n381:         getDMInviter: () => {},\n382:     } as unknown as RoomMember;\n383: }\n384: \n385: export type MessageEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n386:     room: Room[\"roomId\"];\n387:     relatesTo?: IEventRelation;\n388:     msg?: string;\n389: };\n390: \n391: /**\n392:  * Create an m.room.message event.\n393:  * @param {Object} opts Values for the message\n394:  * @param {string} opts.room The room ID for the event.\n395:  * @param {string} opts.user The user ID for the event.\n396:  * @param {number} opts.ts The timestamp for the event.\n397:  * @param {boolean} opts.event True to make a MatrixEvent.\n398:  * @param {string=} opts.msg Optional. The content.body for the event.\n399:  * @return {Object|MatrixEvent} The event\n400:  */\n401: export function mkMessage({ msg, relatesTo, ...opts }: MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n402:     room: Room[\"roomId\"];\n403:     msg?: string;\n404: }): MatrixEvent {\n405:     if (!opts.room || !opts.user) {\n406:         throw new Error(\"Missing .room or .user from options\");\n407:     }\n408:     const message = msg ?? \"Random->\" + Math.random();\n409:     const event: MakeEventProps = {\n410:         ...opts,\n411:         type: \"m.room.message\",\n412:         content: {\n413:             msgtype: \"m.text\",\n414:             body: message,\n415:             ['m.relates_to']: relatesTo,\n416:         },\n417:     };\n418: \n419:     return mkEvent(event);\n420: }\n421: \n422: export function mkStubRoom(roomId: string = null, name: string, client: MatrixClient): Room {\n423:     const stubTimeline = { getEvents: () => [] } as unknown as EventTimeline;\n424:     return {\n425:         roomId,\n426:         getReceiptsForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n427:         getMember: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({\n428:             userId: '@member:domain.bla',\n429:             name: 'Member',\n430:             rawDisplayName: 'Member',\n431:             roomId: roomId,\n432:             getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png',\n433:             getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png',\n434:         }),\n435:         getMembersWithMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n436:         getJoinedMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n437:         getJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\n438:         getInvitedAndJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\n439:         setUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(),\n440:         getMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n441:         getPendingEvents: () => [],\n442:         getLiveTimeline: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(stubTimeline),\n443:         getUnfilteredTimelineSet: jest.fn(),\n444:         findEventById: () => null,\n445:         getAccountData: () => null,\n446:         hasMembershipState: () => null,\n447:         getVersion: () => '1',\n448:         shouldUpgradeToVersion: () => null,\n449:         getMyMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"join\"),\n450:         maySendMessage: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n451:         currentState: {\n452:             getStateEvents: jest.fn(),\n453:             getMember: jest.fn(),\n454:             mayClientSendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n455:             maySendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n456:             maySendRedactionForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n457:             maySendEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n458:             members: {},\n459:             getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(JoinRule.Invite),\n460:             on: jest.fn(),\n461:             off: jest.fn(),\n462:         } as unknown as RoomState,\n463:         tags: {},\n464:         setBlacklistUnverifiedDevices: jest.fn(),\n465:         on: jest.fn(),\n466:         off: jest.fn(),\n467:         removeListener: jest.fn(),\n468:         getDMInviter: jest.fn(),\n469:         name,\n470:         normalizedName: normalize(name || \"\"),\n471:         getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\n472:         getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\n473:         isSpaceRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n474:         getType: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(undefined),\n475:         isElementVideoRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n476:         getUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(() => 0),\n477:         getEventReadUpTo: jest.fn(() => null),\n478:         getCanonicalAlias: jest.fn(),\n479:         getAltAliases: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n480:         timeline: [],\n481:         getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"invite\"),\n482:         loadMembersIfNeeded: jest.fn(),\n483:         client,\n484:         myUserId: client?.getUserId(),\n485:         canInvite: jest.fn(),\n486:         getThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n487:         eventShouldLiveIn: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\n488:         createThreadsTimelineSets: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\n489:         fetchRoomThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\n490:     } as unknown as Room;\n491: }\n492: \n493: export function mkServerConfig(hsUrl, isUrl) {\n494:     return makeType(ValidatedServerConfig, {\n495:         hsUrl,\n496:         hsName: \"TEST_ENVIRONMENT\",\n497:         hsNameIsDifferent: false, // yes, we lie\n498:         isUrl,\n499:     });\n500: }\n501: \n502: // These methods make some use of some private methods on the AsyncStoreWithClient to simplify getting into a consistent\n503: // ready state without needing to wire up a dispatcher and pretend to be a js-sdk client.\n504: \n505: export const setupAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>, client: MatrixClient) => {\n506:     // @ts-ignore\n507:     store.readyStore.useUnitTestClient(client);\n508:     // @ts-ignore\n509:     await store.onReady();\n510: };\n511: \n512: export const resetAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>) => {\n513:     // @ts-ignore\n514:     await store.onNotReady();\n515: };\n516: \n517: export const mockStateEventImplementation = (events: MatrixEvent[]) => {\n518:     const stateMap = new EnhancedMap<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>();\n519:     events.forEach(event => {\n520:         stateMap.getOrCreate(event.getType(), new Map()).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\n521:     });\n522: \n523:     // recreate the overloading in RoomState\n524:     function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string): MatrixEvent[];\n525:     function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey: string): MatrixEvent;\n526:     function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey?: string) {\n527:         if (stateKey || stateKey === \"\") {\n528:             return stateMap.get(eventType)?.get(stateKey) || null;\n529:         }\n530:         return Array.from(stateMap.get(eventType)?.values() || []);\n531:     }\n532:     return getStateEvents;\n533: };\n534: \n535: export const mkRoom = (\n536:     client: MatrixClient,\n537:     roomId: string,\n538:     rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[],\n539: ): MockedObject<Room> => {\n540:     const room = mocked(mkStubRoom(roomId, roomId, client));\n541:     mocked(room.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation([]));\n542:     rooms?.push(room);\n543:     return room;\n544: };\n545: \n546: /**\n547:  * Upserts given events into room.currentState\n548:  * @param room\n549:  * @param events\n550:  */\n551: export const upsertRoomStateEvents = (room: Room, events: MatrixEvent[]): void => {\n552:     const eventsMap = events.reduce((acc, event) => {\n553:         const eventType = event.getType();\n554:         if (!acc.has(eventType)) {\n555:             acc.set(eventType, new Map());\n556:         }\n557:         acc.get(eventType).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\n558:         return acc;\n559:     }, room.currentState.events || new Map<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>());\n560: \n561:     room.currentState.events = eventsMap;\n562: };\n563: \n564: export const mkSpace = (\n565:     client: MatrixClient,\n566:     spaceId: string,\n567:     rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[],\n568:     children: string[] = [],\n569: ): MockedObject<Room> => {\n570:     const space = mocked(mkRoom(client, spaceId, rooms));\n571:     space.isSpaceRoom.mockReturnValue(true);\n572:     space.getType.mockReturnValue(RoomType.Space);\n573:     mocked(space.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation(children.map(roomId =>\n574:         mkEvent({\n575:             event: true,\n576:             type: EventType.SpaceChild,\n577:             room: spaceId,\n578:             user: \"@user:server\",\n579:             skey: roomId,\n580:             content: { via: [] },\n581:             ts: Date.now(),\n582:         }),\n583:     )));\n584:     return space;\n585: };\n586: \n587: export const mkRoomMemberJoinEvent = (user: string, room: string): MatrixEvent => {\n588:     return mkEvent({\n589:         event: true,\n590:         type: EventType.RoomMember,\n591:         content: {\n592:             membership: \"join\",\n593:         },\n594:         skey: user,\n595:         user,\n596:         room,\n597:     });\n598: };\n599: \n600: export const mkPusher = (extra: Partial<IPusher> = {}): IPusher => ({\n601:     app_display_name: \"app\",\n602:     app_id: \"123\",\n603:     data: {},\n604:     device_display_name: \"name\",\n605:     kind: \"http\",\n606:     lang: \"en\",\n607:     pushkey: \"pushpush\",\n608:     ...extra,\n609: });\n610: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/test/test-utils/test-utils.ts"
  }
}

{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import EventEmitter from \\\"events\\\";\\n18: import { MethodLikeKeys, mocked, MockedObject, PropertyLikeKeys } from \\\"jest-mock\\\";\\n19: import { Feature, ServerSupport } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/feature\\\";\\n20: import { MatrixClient, User } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\\\";\\n21: \\n22: import { MatrixClientPeg } from \\\"../../src/MatrixClientPeg\\\";\\n23: \\n24: /**\\n25:  * Mocked generic class with a real EventEmitter.\\n26:  * Useful for mocks which need event emitters.\\n27:  */\\n28: export class MockEventEmitter<T> extends EventEmitter {\\n29:     /**\\n30:      * Construct a new event emitter with additional properties/functions. The event emitter functions\\n31:      * like .emit and .on will be real.\\n32:      * @param mockProperties An object with the mock property or function implementations. 'getters'\\n33:      * are correctly cloned to this event emitter.\\n34:      */\\n35:     constructor(mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<T>|PropertyLikeKeys<T>, unknown>> = {}) {\\n36:         super();\\n37:         // We must use defineProperties and not assign as the former clones getters correctly,\\n38:         // whereas the latter invokes the getter and sets the return value permanently on the\\n39:         // destination object.\\n40:         Object.defineProperties(this, Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(mockProperties));\\n41:     }\\n42: }\\n43: \\n44: /**\\n45:  * Mock client with real event emitter\\n46:  * useful for testing code that listens\\n47:  * to MatrixClient events\\n48:  */\\n49: export class MockClientWithEventEmitter extends EventEmitter {\\n50:     constructor(mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> = {}) {\\n51:         super();\\n52: \\n53:         Object.assign(this, mockProperties);\\n54:     }\\n55: }\\n56: \\n57: /**\\n58:  * - make a mock client\\n59:  * - cast the type to mocked(MatrixClient)\\n60:  * - spy on MatrixClientPeg.get to return the mock\\n61:  * eg\\n62:  * ```\\n63:  * const mockClient = getMockClientWithEventEmitter({\\n64:         getUserId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(aliceId),\\n65:     });\\n66:  * ```\\n67:  */\\n68: export const getMockClientWithEventEmitter = (\\n69:     mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>>,\\n70: ): MockedObject<MatrixClient> => {\\n71:     const mock = mocked(new MockClientWithEventEmitter(mockProperties) as unknown as MatrixClient);\\n72: \\n73:     jest.spyOn(MatrixClientPeg, 'get').mockReturnValue(mock);\\n74: \\n75:     // @ts-ignore simplified test stub\\n76:     mock.canSupport = new Map();\\n77:     Object.keys(Feature).forEach(feature => {\\n78:         mock.canSupport.set(feature as Feature, ServerSupport.Stable);\\n79:     });\\n80:     return mock;\\n81: };\\n82: \\n83: export const unmockClientPeg = () => jest.spyOn(MatrixClientPeg, 'get').mockRestore();\\n84: \\n85: /**\\n86:  * Returns basic mocked client methods related to the current user\\n87:  * ```\\n88:  * const mockClient = getMockClientWithEventEmitter({\\n89:         ...mockClientMethodsUser('@mytestuser:domain'),\\n90:     });\\n91:  * ```\\n92:  */\\n93: export const mockClientMethodsUser = (userId = '@alice:domain') => ({\\n94:     getUserId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(userId),\\n95:     getUser: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new User(userId)),\\n96:     isGuest: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\\n97:     mxcUrlToHttp: jest.fn().mockReturnValue('mock-mxcUrlToHttp'),\\n98:     credentials: { userId },\\n99:     getThreePids: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ threepids: [] }),\\n100:     getAccessToken: jest.fn(),\\n101:     getDeviceId: jest.fn(),\\n102:     getAccountData: jest.fn(),\\n103: });\\n104: \\n105: /**\\n106:  * Returns basic mocked client methods related to rendering events\\n107:  * ```\\n108:  * const mockClient = getMockClientWithEventEmitter({\\n109:         ...mockClientMethodsUser('@mytestuser:domain'),\\n110:     });\\n111:  * ```\\n112:  */\\n113: export const mockClientMethodsEvents = () => ({\\n114:     decryptEventIfNeeded: jest.fn(),\\n115:     getPushActionsForEvent: jest.fn(),\\n116: });\\n117: \\n118: /**\\n119:  * Returns basic mocked client methods related to server support\\n120:  */\\n121: export const mockClientMethodsServer = (): Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> => ({\\n122:     doesServerSupportSeparateAddAndBind: jest.fn(),\\n123:     getIdentityServerUrl: jest.fn(),\\n124:     getHomeserverUrl: jest.fn(),\\n125:     getCapabilities: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\\n126:     getClientWellKnown: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\\n127:     doesServerSupportUnstableFeature: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(false),\\n128:     getVersions: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\\n129:     isFallbackICEServerAllowed: jest.fn(),\\n130: });\\n131: \\n132: export const mockClientMethodsDevice = (\\n133:     deviceId = 'test-device-id',\\n134: ): Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> => ({\\n135:     getDeviceId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(deviceId),\\n136:     getDeviceEd25519Key: jest.fn(),\\n137:     getDevices: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ devices: [] }),\\n138: });\\n139: \\n140: export const mockClientMethodsCrypto = (): Partial<Record<\\n141:     MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient> & PropertyLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>\\n142: > => ({\\n143:     isCryptoEnabled: jest.fn(),\\n144:     isSecretStorageReady: jest.fn(),\\n145:     isCrossSigningReady: jest.fn(),\\n146:     isKeyBackupKeyStored: jest.fn(),\\n147:     getCrossSigningCacheCallbacks: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({ getCrossSigningKeyCache: jest.fn() }),\\n148:     getStoredCrossSigningForUser: jest.fn(),\\n149:     checkKeyBackup: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\\n150:     crypto: {\\n151:         getSessionBackupPrivateKey: jest.fn(),\\n152:         secretStorage: { hasKey: jest.fn() },\\n153:         crossSigningInfo: {\\n154:             getId: jest.fn(),\\n155:             isStoredInSecretStorage: jest.fn(),\\n156:         },\\n157:     },\\n158: });\\n159: \\n160: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/test/test-utils/client.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import EventEmitter from \"events\";\n18: import { MethodLikeKeys, mocked, MockedObject, PropertyLikeKeys } from \"jest-mock\";\n19: import { Feature, ServerSupport } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/feature\";\n20: import { MatrixClient, User } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix\";\n21: \n22: import { MatrixClientPeg } from \"../../src/MatrixClientPeg\";\n23: \n24: /**\n25:  * Mocked generic class with a real EventEmitter.\n26:  * Useful for mocks which need event emitters.\n27:  */\n28: export class MockEventEmitter<T> extends EventEmitter {\n29:     /**\n30:      * Construct a new event emitter with additional properties/functions. The event emitter functions\n31:      * like .emit and .on will be real.\n32:      * @param mockProperties An object with the mock property or function implementations. 'getters'\n33:      * are correctly cloned to this event emitter.\n34:      */\n35:     constructor(mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<T>|PropertyLikeKeys<T>, unknown>> = {}) {\n36:         super();\n37:         // We must use defineProperties and not assign as the former clones getters correctly,\n38:         // whereas the latter invokes the getter and sets the return value permanently on the\n39:         // destination object.\n40:         Object.defineProperties(this, Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(mockProperties));\n41:     }\n42: }\n43: \n44: /**\n45:  * Mock client with real event emitter\n46:  * useful for testing code that listens\n47:  * to MatrixClient events\n48:  */\n49: export class MockClientWithEventEmitter extends EventEmitter {\n50:     constructor(mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> = {}) {\n51:         super();\n52: \n53:         Object.assign(this, mockProperties);\n54:     }\n55: }\n56: \n57: /**\n58:  * - make a mock client\n59:  * - cast the type to mocked(MatrixClient)\n60:  * - spy on MatrixClientPeg.get to return the mock\n61:  * eg\n62:  * ```\n63:  * const mockClient = getMockClientWithEventEmitter({\n64:         getUserId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(aliceId),\n65:     });\n66:  * ```\n67:  */\n68: export const getMockClientWithEventEmitter = (\n69:     mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>>,\n70: ): MockedObject<MatrixClient> => {\n71:     const mock = mocked(new MockClientWithEventEmitter(mockProperties) as unknown as MatrixClient);\n72: \n73:     jest.spyOn(MatrixClientPeg, 'get').mockReturnValue(mock);\n74: \n75:     // @ts-ignore simplified test stub\n76:     mock.canSupport = new Map();\n77:     Object.keys(Feature).forEach(feature => {\n78:         mock.canSupport.set(feature as Feature, ServerSupport.Stable);\n79:     });\n80:     return mock;\n81: };\n82: \n83: export const unmockClientPeg = () => jest.spyOn(MatrixClientPeg, 'get').mockRestore();\n84: \n85: /**\n86:  * Returns basic mocked client methods related to the current user\n87:  * ```\n88:  * const mockClient = getMockClientWithEventEmitter({\n89:         ...mockClientMethodsUser('@mytestuser:domain'),\n90:     });\n91:  * ```\n92:  */\n93: export const mockClientMethodsUser = (userId = '@alice:domain') => ({\n94:     getUserId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(userId),\n95:     getUser: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new User(userId)),\n96:     isGuest: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n97:     mxcUrlToHttp: jest.fn().mockReturnValue('mock-mxcUrlToHttp'),\n98:     credentials: { userId },\n99:     getThreePids: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ threepids: [] }),\n100:     getAccessToken: jest.fn(),\n101:     getDeviceId: jest.fn(),\n102:     getAccountData: jest.fn(),\n103: });\n104: \n105: /**\n106:  * Returns basic mocked client methods related to rendering events\n107:  * ```\n108:  * const mockClient = getMockClientWithEventEmitter({\n109:         ...mockClientMethodsUser('@mytestuser:domain'),\n110:     });\n111:  * ```\n112:  */\n113: export const mockClientMethodsEvents = () => ({\n114:     decryptEventIfNeeded: jest.fn(),\n115:     getPushActionsForEvent: jest.fn(),\n116: });\n117: \n118: /**\n119:  * Returns basic mocked client methods related to server support\n120:  */\n121: export const mockClientMethodsServer = (): Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> => ({\n122:     doesServerSupportSeparateAddAndBind: jest.fn(),\n123:     getIdentityServerUrl: jest.fn(),\n124:     getHomeserverUrl: jest.fn(),\n125:     getCapabilities: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\n126:     getClientWellKnown: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\n127:     doesServerSupportUnstableFeature: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(false),\n128:     getVersions: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n129:     isFallbackICEServerAllowed: jest.fn(),\n130: });\n131: \n132: export const mockClientMethodsDevice = (\n133:     deviceId = 'test-device-id',\n134: ): Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> => ({\n135:     getDeviceId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(deviceId),\n136:     getDeviceEd25519Key: jest.fn(),\n137:     getDevices: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ devices: [] }),\n138: });\n139: \n140: export const mockClientMethodsCrypto = (): Partial<Record<\n141:     MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient> & PropertyLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>\n142: > => ({\n143:     isCryptoEnabled: jest.fn(),\n144:     isSecretStorageReady: jest.fn(),\n145:     isCrossSigningReady: jest.fn(),\n146:     isKeyBackupKeyStored: jest.fn(),\n147:     getCrossSigningCacheCallbacks: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({ getCrossSigningKeyCache: jest.fn() }),\n148:     getStoredCrossSigningForUser: jest.fn(),\n149:     checkKeyBackup: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\n150:     crypto: {\n151:         getSessionBackupPrivateKey: jest.fn(),\n152:         secretStorage: { hasKey: jest.fn() },\n153:         crossSigningInfo: {\n154:             getId: jest.fn(),\n155:             isStoredInSecretStorage: jest.fn(),\n156:         },\n157:     },\n158: });\n159: \n160: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/test/test-utils/client.ts"
  }
}

183. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cd /app && cat package.json | python3 -c \"import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get('jest', {}), indent=2))\" 2>/dev/null | head -60",
  "description": "Show jest config from package.json"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "\nShell cwd was reset to /workspace",
  "stdout": "{\n  \"snapshotSerializers\": [\n    \"enzyme-to-json/serializer\"\n  ],\n  \"testEnvironment\": \"jsdom\",\n  \"testMatch\": [\n    \"<rootDir>/test/**/*-test.[jt]s?(x)\"\n  ],\n  \"globalSetup\": \"<rootDir>/test/globalSetup.js\",\n  \"setupFiles\": [\n    \"jest-canvas-mock\"\n  ],\n  \"setupFilesAfterEnv\": [\n    \"<rootDir>/test/setupTests.js\"\n  ],\n  \"moduleNameMapper\": {\n    \"\\\\.(gif|png|ttf|woff2)$\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/imageMock.js\",\n    \"\\\\.svg$\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/svg.js\",\n    \"\\\\$webapp/i18n/languages.json\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/languages.json\",\n    \"decoderWorker\\\\.min\\\\.js\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n    \"decoderWorker\\\\.min\\\\.wasm\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n    \"waveWorker\\\\.min\\\\.js\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n    \"workers/(.+)\\\\.worker\\\\.ts\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/workerMock.js\",\n    \"^!!raw-loader!.*\": \"jest-raw-loader\",\n    \"RecorderWorklet\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/empty.js\",\n    \"cheerio/lib/utils\": \"<rootDir>/__mocks__/cheerio/lib/utils.js\"\n  },\n  \"transformIgnorePatterns\": [\n    \"/node_modules/(?!(matrix-js-sdk|cheerio|htmlparser2|entities|domhandler|domutils|css-select|nth-check|boolbase|css-what|p-retry|is-network-error|uuid)).+$\"\n  ],\n  \"collectCoverageFrom\": [\n    \"<rootDir>/src/**/*.{js,ts,tsx}\"\n  ],\n  \"coverageReporters\": [\n    \"text-summary\",\n    \"lcov\"\n  ],\n  \"testResultsProcessor\": \"@casualbot/jest-sonar-reporter\"\n}"
}
