{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2015, 2016 OpenMarket Ltd\\n3: Copyright 2017 Vector Creations Ltd.\\n4: Copyright 2017, 2018, 2019 New Vector Ltd\\n5: Copyright 2019, 2020 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n6: \\n7: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n8: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n9: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n10: \\n11:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n12: \\n13: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n14: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n15: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n16: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n17: limitations under the License.\\n18: */\\n19: \\n20: import { ICreateClientOpts, PendingEventOrdering, RoomNameState, RoomNameType } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix';\\n21: import { IStartClientOpts, MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\\n22: import { MemoryStore } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/store/memory';\\n23: import * as utils from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/utils';\\n24: import { EventTimeline } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event-timeline';\\n25: import { EventTimelineSet } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event-timeline-set';\\n26: import { verificationMethods } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto';\\n27: import { SHOW_QR_CODE_METHOD } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto/verification/QRCode\\\";\\n28: import { logger } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\\\";\\n29: \\n30: import createMatrixClient from './utils/createMatrixClient';\\n31: import SettingsStore from './settings/SettingsStore';\\n32: import MatrixActionCreators from './actions/MatrixActionCreators';\\n33: import Modal from './Modal';\\n34: import MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler from \\\"./settings/handlers/MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler\\\";\\n35: import * as StorageManager from './utils/StorageManager';\\n36: import IdentityAuthClient from './IdentityAuthClient';\\n37: import { crossSigningCallbacks, tryToUnlockSecretStorageWithDehydrationKey } from './SecurityManager';\\n38: import SecurityCustomisations from \\\"./customisations/Security\\\";\\n39: import { SlidingSyncManager } from './SlidingSyncManager';\\n40: import CryptoStoreTooNewDialog from \\\"./components/views/dialogs/CryptoStoreTooNewDialog\\\";\\n41: import { _t } from \\\"./languageHandler\\\";\\n42: \\n43: export interface IMatrixClientCreds {\\n44:     homeserverUrl: string;\\n45:     identityServerUrl?: string;\\n46:     userId: string;\\n47:     deviceId?: string;\\n48:     accessToken: string;\\n49:     guest?: boolean;\\n50:     pickleKey?: string;\\n51:     freshLogin?: boolean;\\n52: }\\n53: \\n54: /**\\n55:  * Holds the current instance of the `MatrixClient` to use across the codebase.\\n56:  * Looking for an `MatrixClient`? Just look for the `MatrixClientPeg` on the peg\\n57:  * board. \\\"Peg\\\" is the literal meaning of something you hang something on. So\\n58:  * you'll find a `MatrixClient` hanging on the `MatrixClientPeg`.\\n59:  */\\n60: export interface IMatrixClientPeg {\\n61:     opts: IStartClientOpts;\\n62: \\n63:     /**\\n64:      * Return the server name of the user's homeserver\\n65:      * Throws an error if unable to deduce the homeserver name\\n66:      * (eg. if the user is not logged in)\\n67:      *\\n68:      * @returns {string} The homeserver name, if present.\\n69:      */\\n70:     getHomeserverName(): string;\\n71: \\n72:     get(): MatrixClient;\\n73:     unset(): void;\\n74:     assign(): Promise<any>;\\n75:     start(): Promise<any>;\\n76: \\n77:     getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds;\\n78: \\n79:     /**\\n80:      * If we've registered a user ID we set this to the ID of the\\n81:      * user we've just registered. If they then go & log in, we\\n82:      * can send them to the welcome user (obviously this doesn't\\n83:      * guarantee they'll get a chat with the welcome user).\\n84:      *\\n85:      * @param {string} uid The user ID of the user we've just registered\\n86:      */\\n87:     setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;\\n88: \\n89:     /**\\n90:      * Returns true if the current user has just been registered by this\\n91:      * client as determined by setJustRegisteredUserId()\\n92:      *\\n93:      * @returns {bool} True if user has just been registered\\n94:      */\\n95:     currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;\\n96: \\n97:     /**\\n98:      * If the current user has been registered by this device then this\\n99:      * returns a boolean of whether it was within the last N hours given.\\n100:      */\\n101:     userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;\\n102: \\n103:     /**\\n104:      * If the current user has been registered by this device then this\\n105:      * returns a boolean of whether it was after a given timestamp.\\n106:      */\\n107:     userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;\\n108: \\n109:     /**\\n110:      * Replace this MatrixClientPeg's client with a client instance that has\\n111:      * homeserver / identity server URLs and active credentials\\n112:      *\\n113:      * @param {IMatrixClientCreds} creds The new credentials to use.\\n114:      */\\n115:     replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;\\n116: }\\n117: \\n118: /**\\n119:  * Wrapper object for handling the js-sdk Matrix Client object in the react-sdk\\n120:  * Handles the creation/initialisation of client objects.\\n121:  * This module provides a singleton instance of this class so the 'current'\\n122:  * Matrix Client object is available easily.\\n123:  */\\n124: class MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {\\n125:     // These are the default options used when when the\\n126:     // client is started in 'start'. These can be altered\\n127:     // at any time up to after the 'will_start_client'\\n128:     // event is finished processing.\\n129:     public opts: IStartClientOpts = {\\n130:         initialSyncLimit: 20,\\n131:     };\\n132: \\n133:     private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\\n134:     private justRegisteredUserId: string | null = null;\\n135: \\n136:     // the credentials used to init the current client object.\\n137:     // used if we tear it down & recreate it with a different store\\n138:     private currentClientCreds: IMatrixClientCreds;\\n139: \\n140:     public get(): MatrixClient {\\n141:         return this.matrixClient;\\n142:     }\\n143: \\n144:     public unset(): void {\\n145:         this.matrixClient = null;\\n146: \\n147:         MatrixActionCreators.stop();\\n148:     }\\n149: \\n150:     public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {\\n151:         this.justRegisteredUserId = uid;\\n152:         if (uid) {\\n153:             const registrationTime = Date.now().toString();\\n154:             window.localStorage.setItem(\\\"mx_registration_time\\\", registrationTime);\\n155:         }\\n156:     }\\n157: \\n158:     public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean {\\n159:         return (\\n160:             this.matrixClient &&\\n161:             this.matrixClient.credentials.userId === this.justRegisteredUserId\\n162:         );\\n163:     }\\n164: \\n165:     public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean {\\n166:         if (hours <= 0) {\\n167:             return false;\\n168:         }\\n169: \\n170:         try {\\n171:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\\\"mx_registration_time\\\"), 10);\\n172:             const diff = Date.now() - registrationTime;\\n173:             return (diff / 36e5) <= hours;\\n174:         } catch (e) {\\n175:             return false;\\n176:         }\\n177:     }\\n178: \\n179:     public userRegisteredAfter(timestamp: Date): boolean {\\n180:         try {\\n181:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\\\"mx_registration_time\\\"), 10);\\n182:             return timestamp.getTime() <= registrationTime;\\n183:         } catch (e) {\\n184:             return false;\\n185:         }\\n186:     }\\n187: \\n188:     public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\\n189:         this.currentClientCreds = creds;\\n190:         this.createClient(creds);\\n191:     }\\n192: \\n193:     public async assign(): Promise<any> {\\n194:         for (const dbType of ['indexeddb', 'memory']) {\\n195:             try {\\n196:                 const promise = this.matrixClient.store.startup();\\n197:                 logger.log(\\\"MatrixClientPeg: waiting for MatrixClient store to initialise\\\");\\n198:                 await promise;\\n199:                 break;\\n200:             } catch (err) {\\n201:                 if (dbType === 'indexeddb') {\\n202:                     logger.error('Error starting matrixclient store - falling back to memory store', err);\\n203:                     this.matrixClient.store = new MemoryStore({\\n204:                         localStorage: localStorage,\\n205:                     });\\n206:                 } else {\\n207:                     logger.error('Failed to start memory store!', err);\\n208:                     throw err;\\n209:                 }\\n210:             }\\n211:         }\\n212: \\n213:         // try to initialise e2e on the new client\\n214:         try {\\n215:             // check that we have a version of the js-sdk which includes initCrypto\\n216:             if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"lowBandwidth\\\") && this.matrixClient.initCrypto) {\\n217:                 await this.matrixClient.initCrypto();\\n218:                 this.matrixClient.setCryptoTrustCrossSignedDevices(\\n219:                     !SettingsStore.getValue('e2ee.manuallyVerifyAllSessions'),\\n220:                 );\\n221:                 await tryToUnlockSecretStorageWithDehydrationKey(this.matrixClient);\\n222:                 StorageManager.setCryptoInitialised(true);\\n223:             }\\n224:         } catch (e) {\\n225:             if (e && e.name === 'InvalidCryptoStoreError') {\\n226:                 // The js-sdk found a crypto DB too new for it to use\\n227:                 Modal.createDialog(CryptoStoreTooNewDialog);\\n228:             }\\n229:             // this can happen for a number of reasons, the most likely being\\n230:             // that the olm library was missing. It's not fatal.\\n231:             logger.warn(\\\"Unable to initialise e2e\\\", e);\\n232:         }\\n233: \\n234:         const opts = utils.deepCopy(this.opts);\\n235:         // the react sdk doesn't work without this, so don't allow\\n236:         opts.pendingEventOrdering = PendingEventOrdering.Detached;\\n237:         opts.lazyLoadMembers = true;\\n238:         opts.clientWellKnownPollPeriod = 2 * 60 * 60; // 2 hours\\n239:         opts.experimentalThreadSupport = SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_thread\\\");\\n240: \\n241:         if (SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_sliding_sync\\\")) {\\n242:             const proxyUrl = SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_sliding_sync_proxy_url\\\");\\n243:             if (proxyUrl) {\\n244:                 logger.log(\\\"Activating sliding sync using proxy at \\\", proxyUrl);\\n245:             } else {\\n246:                 logger.log(\\\"Activating sliding sync\\\");\\n247:             }\\n248:             opts.slidingSync = SlidingSyncManager.instance.configure(\\n249:                 this.matrixClient,\\n250:                 proxyUrl || this.matrixClient.baseUrl,\\n251:             );\\n252:             SlidingSyncManager.instance.startSpidering(100, 50); // 100 rooms at a time, 50ms apart\\n253:         }\\n254: \\n255:         // Connect the matrix client to the dispatcher and setting handlers\\n256:         MatrixActionCreators.start(this.matrixClient);\\n257:         MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler.matrixClient = this.matrixClient;\\n258: \\n259:         return opts;\\n260:     }\\n261: \\n262:     public async start(): Promise<any> {\\n263:         const opts = await this.assign();\\n264: \\n265:         logger.log(`MatrixClientPeg: really starting MatrixClient`);\\n266:         await this.get().startClient(opts);\\n267:         logger.log(`MatrixClientPeg: MatrixClient started`);\\n268:     }\\n269: \\n270:     public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds {\\n271:         let copiedCredentials = this.currentClientCreds;\\n272:         if (this.currentClientCreds?.userId !== this.matrixClient?.credentials?.userId) {\\n273:             // cached credentials belong to a different user - don't use them\\n274:             copiedCredentials = null;\\n275:         }\\n276:         return {\\n277:             // Copy the cached credentials before overriding what we can.\\n278:             ...(copiedCredentials ?? {}),\\n279: \\n280:             homeserverUrl: this.matrixClient.baseUrl,\\n281:             identityServerUrl: this.matrixClient.idBaseUrl,\\n282:             userId: this.matrixClient.credentials.userId,\\n283:             deviceId: this.matrixClient.getDeviceId(),\\n284:             accessToken: this.matrixClient.getAccessToken(),\\n285:             guest: this.matrixClient.isGuest(),\\n286:         };\\n287:     }\\n288: \\n289:     public getHomeserverName(): string {\\n290:         const matches = /^@[^:]+:(.+)$/.exec(this.matrixClient.credentials.userId);\\n291:         if (matches === null || matches.length < 1) {\\n292:             throw new Error(\\\"Failed to derive homeserver name from user ID!\\\");\\n293:         }\\n294:         return matches[1];\\n295:     }\\n296: \\n297:     private namesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string | undefined {\\n298:         const countWithoutMe = count - 1;\\n299:         if (!names.length) {\\n300:             return _t(\\\"Empty room\\\");\\n301:         }\\n302:         if (names.length === 1 && countWithoutMe <= 1) {\\n303:             return names[0];\\n304:         }\\n305:     }\\n306: \\n307:     private memberNamesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string {\\n308:         const name = this.namesToRoomName(names, count);\\n309:         if (name) return name;\\n310: \\n311:         if (names.length === 2 && count === 2) {\\n312:             return _t(\\\"%(user1)s and %(user2)s\\\", {\\n313:                 user1: names[0],\\n314:                 user2: names[1],\\n315:             });\\n316:         }\\n317:         return _t(\\\"%(user)s and %(count)s others\\\", {\\n318:             user: names[0],\\n319:             count: count - 1,\\n320:         });\\n321:     }\\n322: \\n323:     private inviteeNamesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string {\\n324:         const name = this.namesToRoomName(names, count);\\n325:         if (name) return name;\\n326: \\n327:         if (names.length === 2 && count === 2) {\\n328:             return _t(\\\"Inviting %(user1)s and %(user2)s\\\", {\\n329:                 user1: names[0],\\n330:                 user2: names[1],\\n331:             });\\n332:         }\\n333:         return _t(\\\"Inviting %(user)s and %(count)s others\\\", {\\n334:             user: names[0],\\n335:             count: count - 1,\\n336:         });\\n337:     }\\n338: \\n339:     private createClient(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\\n340:         const opts: ICreateClientOpts = {\\n341:             baseUrl: creds.homeserverUrl,\\n342:             idBaseUrl: creds.identityServerUrl,\\n343:             accessToken: creds.accessToken,\\n344:             userId: creds.userId,\\n345:             deviceId: creds.deviceId,\\n346:             pickleKey: creds.pickleKey,\\n347:             timelineSupport: true,\\n348:             forceTURN: !SettingsStore.getValue('webRtcAllowPeerToPeer'),\\n349:             fallbackICEServerAllowed: !!SettingsStore.getValue('fallbackICEServerAllowed'),\\n350:             // Gather up to 20 ICE candidates when a call arrives: this should be more than we'd\\n351:             // ever normally need, so effectively this should make all the gathering happen when\\n352:             // the call arrives.\\n353:             iceCandidatePoolSize: 20,\\n354:             verificationMethods: [\\n355:                 verificationMethods.SAS,\\n356:                 SHOW_QR_CODE_METHOD,\\n357:                 verificationMethods.RECIPROCATE_QR_CODE,\\n358:             ],\\n359:             identityServer: new IdentityAuthClient(),\\n360:             // These are always installed regardless of the labs flag so that cross-signing features\\n361:             // can toggle on without reloading and also be accessed immediately after login.\\n362:             cryptoCallbacks: { ...crossSigningCallbacks },\\n363:             roomNameGenerator: (_: string, state: RoomNameState) => {\\n364:                 switch (state.type) {\\n365:                     case RoomNameType.Generated:\\n366:                         switch (state.subtype) {\\n367:                             case \\\"Inviting\\\":\\n368:                                 return this.inviteeNamesToRoomName(state.names, state.count);\\n369:                             default:\\n370:                                 return this.memberNamesToRoomName(state.names, state.count);\\n371:                         }\\n372:                     case RoomNameType.EmptyRoom:\\n373:                         if (state.oldName) {\\n374:                             return _t(\\\"Empty room (was %(oldName)s)\\\", {\\n375:                                 oldName: state.oldName,\\n376:                             });\\n377:                         } else {\\n378:                             return _t(\\\"Empty room\\\");\\n379:                         }\\n380:                     default:\\n381:                         return null;\\n382:                 }\\n383:             },\\n384:         };\\n385: \\n386:         if (SecurityCustomisations.getDehydrationKey) {\\n387:             opts.cryptoCallbacks!.getDehydrationKey = SecurityCustomisations.getDehydrationKey;\\n388:         }\\n389: \\n390:         this.matrixClient = createMatrixClient(opts);\\n391: \\n392:         // we're going to add eventlisteners for each matrix event tile, so the\\n393:         // potential number of event listeners is quite high.\\n394:         this.matrixClient.setMaxListeners(500);\\n395: \\n396:         this.matrixClient.setGuest(Boolean(creds.guest));\\n397: \\n398:         const notifTimelineSet = new EventTimelineSet(undefined, {\\n399:             timelineSupport: true,\\n400:             pendingEvents: false,\\n401:         });\\n402:         // XXX: what is our initial pagination token?! it somehow needs to be synchronised with /sync.\\n403:         notifTimelineSet.getLiveTimeline().setPaginationToken(\\\"\\\", EventTimeline.BACKWARDS);\\n404:         this.matrixClient.setNotifTimelineSet(notifTimelineSet);\\n405:     }\\n406: }\\n407: \\n408: /**\\n409:  * Note: You should be using a React context with access to a client rather than\\n410:  * using this, as in a multi-account world this will not exist!\\n411:  */\\n412: export const MatrixClientPeg: IMatrixClientPeg = new MatrixClientPegClass();\\n413: \\n414: if (!window.mxMatrixClientPeg) {\\n415:     window.mxMatrixClientPeg = MatrixClientPeg;\\n416: }\\n417: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/MatrixClientPeg.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2015, 2016 OpenMarket Ltd\n3: Copyright 2017 Vector Creations Ltd.\n4: Copyright 2017, 2018, 2019 New Vector Ltd\n5: Copyright 2019, 2020 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n6: \n7: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n8: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n9: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n10: \n11:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n12: \n13: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n14: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n15: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n16: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n17: limitations under the License.\n18: */\n19: \n20: import { ICreateClientOpts, PendingEventOrdering, RoomNameState, RoomNameType } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/matrix';\n21: import { IStartClientOpts, MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\n22: import { MemoryStore } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/store/memory';\n23: import * as utils from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/utils';\n24: import { EventTimeline } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event-timeline';\n25: import { EventTimelineSet } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event-timeline-set';\n26: import { verificationMethods } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto';\n27: import { SHOW_QR_CODE_METHOD } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto/verification/QRCode\";\n28: import { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n29: \n30: import createMatrixClient from './utils/createMatrixClient';\n31: import SettingsStore from './settings/SettingsStore';\n32: import MatrixActionCreators from './actions/MatrixActionCreators';\n33: import Modal from './Modal';\n34: import MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler from \"./settings/handlers/MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler\";\n35: import * as StorageManager from './utils/StorageManager';\n36: import IdentityAuthClient from './IdentityAuthClient';\n37: import { crossSigningCallbacks, tryToUnlockSecretStorageWithDehydrationKey } from './SecurityManager';\n38: import SecurityCustomisations from \"./customisations/Security\";\n39: import { SlidingSyncManager } from './SlidingSyncManager';\n40: import CryptoStoreTooNewDialog from \"./components/views/dialogs/CryptoStoreTooNewDialog\";\n41: import { _t } from \"./languageHandler\";\n42: \n43: export interface IMatrixClientCreds {\n44:     homeserverUrl: string;\n45:     identityServerUrl?: string;\n46:     userId: string;\n47:     deviceId?: string;\n48:     accessToken: string;\n49:     guest?: boolean;\n50:     pickleKey?: string;\n51:     freshLogin?: boolean;\n52: }\n53: \n54: /**\n55:  * Holds the current instance of the `MatrixClient` to use across the codebase.\n56:  * Looking for an `MatrixClient`? Just look for the `MatrixClientPeg` on the peg\n57:  * board. \"Peg\" is the literal meaning of something you hang something on. So\n58:  * you'll find a `MatrixClient` hanging on the `MatrixClientPeg`.\n59:  */\n60: export interface IMatrixClientPeg {\n61:     opts: IStartClientOpts;\n62: \n63:     /**\n64:      * Return the server name of the user's homeserver\n65:      * Throws an error if unable to deduce the homeserver name\n66:      * (eg. if the user is not logged in)\n67:      *\n68:      * @returns {string} The homeserver name, if present.\n69:      */\n70:     getHomeserverName(): string;\n71: \n72:     get(): MatrixClient;\n73:     unset(): void;\n74:     assign(): Promise<any>;\n75:     start(): Promise<any>;\n76: \n77:     getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds;\n78: \n79:     /**\n80:      * If we've registered a user ID we set this to the ID of the\n81:      * user we've just registered. If they then go & log in, we\n82:      * can send them to the welcome user (obviously this doesn't\n83:      * guarantee they'll get a chat with the welcome user).\n84:      *\n85:      * @param {string} uid The user ID of the user we've just registered\n86:      */\n87:     setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;\n88: \n89:     /**\n90:      * Returns true if the current user has just been registered by this\n91:      * client as determined by setJustRegisteredUserId()\n92:      *\n93:      * @returns {bool} True if user has just been registered\n94:      */\n95:     currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;\n96: \n97:     /**\n98:      * If the current user has been registered by this device then this\n99:      * returns a boolean of whether it was within the last N hours given.\n100:      */\n101:     userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;\n102: \n103:     /**\n104:      * If the current user has been registered by this device then this\n105:      * returns a boolean of whether it was after a given timestamp.\n106:      */\n107:     userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;\n108: \n109:     /**\n110:      * Replace this MatrixClientPeg's client with a client instance that has\n111:      * homeserver / identity server URLs and active credentials\n112:      *\n113:      * @param {IMatrixClientCreds} creds The new credentials to use.\n114:      */\n115:     replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;\n116: }\n117: \n118: /**\n119:  * Wrapper object for handling the js-sdk Matrix Client object in the react-sdk\n120:  * Handles the creation/initialisation of client objects.\n121:  * This module provides a singleton instance of this class so the 'current'\n122:  * Matrix Client object is available easily.\n123:  */\n124: class MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {\n125:     // These are the default options used when when the\n126:     // client is started in 'start'. These can be altered\n127:     // at any time up to after the 'will_start_client'\n128:     // event is finished processing.\n129:     public opts: IStartClientOpts = {\n130:         initialSyncLimit: 20,\n131:     };\n132: \n133:     private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\n134:     private justRegisteredUserId: string | null = null;\n135: \n136:     // the credentials used to init the current client object.\n137:     // used if we tear it down & recreate it with a different store\n138:     private currentClientCreds: IMatrixClientCreds;\n139: \n140:     public get(): MatrixClient {\n141:         return this.matrixClient;\n142:     }\n143: \n144:     public unset(): void {\n145:         this.matrixClient = null;\n146: \n147:         MatrixActionCreators.stop();\n148:     }\n149: \n150:     public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {\n151:         this.justRegisteredUserId = uid;\n152:         if (uid) {\n153:             const registrationTime = Date.now().toString();\n154:             window.localStorage.setItem(\"mx_registration_time\", registrationTime);\n155:         }\n156:     }\n157: \n158:     public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean {\n159:         return (\n160:             this.matrixClient &&\n161:             this.matrixClient.credentials.userId === this.justRegisteredUserId\n162:         );\n163:     }\n164: \n165:     public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean {\n166:         if (hours <= 0) {\n167:             return false;\n168:         }\n169: \n170:         try {\n171:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\"mx_registration_time\"), 10);\n172:             const diff = Date.now() - registrationTime;\n173:             return (diff / 36e5) <= hours;\n174:         } catch (e) {\n175:             return false;\n176:         }\n177:     }\n178: \n179:     public userRegisteredAfter(timestamp: Date): boolean {\n180:         try {\n181:             const registrationTime = parseInt(window.localStorage.getItem(\"mx_registration_time\"), 10);\n182:             return timestamp.getTime() <= registrationTime;\n183:         } catch (e) {\n184:             return false;\n185:         }\n186:     }\n187: \n188:     public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\n189:         this.currentClientCreds = creds;\n190:         this.createClient(creds);\n191:     }\n192: \n193:     public async assign(): Promise<any> {\n194:         for (const dbType of ['indexeddb', 'memory']) {\n195:             try {\n196:                 const promise = this.matrixClient.store.startup();\n197:                 logger.log(\"MatrixClientPeg: waiting for MatrixClient store to initialise\");\n198:                 await promise;\n199:                 break;\n200:             } catch (err) {\n201:                 if (dbType === 'indexeddb') {\n202:                     logger.error('Error starting matrixclient store - falling back to memory store', err);\n203:                     this.matrixClient.store = new MemoryStore({\n204:                         localStorage: localStorage,\n205:                     });\n206:                 } else {\n207:                     logger.error('Failed to start memory store!', err);\n208:                     throw err;\n209:                 }\n210:             }\n211:         }\n212: \n213:         // try to initialise e2e on the new client\n214:         try {\n215:             // check that we have a version of the js-sdk which includes initCrypto\n216:             if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\"lowBandwidth\") && this.matrixClient.initCrypto) {\n217:                 await this.matrixClient.initCrypto();\n218:                 this.matrixClient.setCryptoTrustCrossSignedDevices(\n219:                     !SettingsStore.getValue('e2ee.manuallyVerifyAllSessions'),\n220:                 );\n221:                 await tryToUnlockSecretStorageWithDehydrationKey(this.matrixClient);\n222:                 StorageManager.setCryptoInitialised(true);\n223:             }\n224:         } catch (e) {\n225:             if (e && e.name === 'InvalidCryptoStoreError') {\n226:                 // The js-sdk found a crypto DB too new for it to use\n227:                 Modal.createDialog(CryptoStoreTooNewDialog);\n228:             }\n229:             // this can happen for a number of reasons, the most likely being\n230:             // that the olm library was missing. It's not fatal.\n231:             logger.warn(\"Unable to initialise e2e\", e);\n232:         }\n233: \n234:         const opts = utils.deepCopy(this.opts);\n235:         // the react sdk doesn't work without this, so don't allow\n236:         opts.pendingEventOrdering = PendingEventOrdering.Detached;\n237:         opts.lazyLoadMembers = true;\n238:         opts.clientWellKnownPollPeriod = 2 * 60 * 60; // 2 hours\n239:         opts.experimentalThreadSupport = SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_thread\");\n240: \n241:         if (SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_sliding_sync\")) {\n242:             const proxyUrl = SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_sliding_sync_proxy_url\");\n243:             if (proxyUrl) {\n244:                 logger.log(\"Activating sliding sync using proxy at \", proxyUrl);\n245:             } else {\n246:                 logger.log(\"Activating sliding sync\");\n247:             }\n248:             opts.slidingSync = SlidingSyncManager.instance.configure(\n249:                 this.matrixClient,\n250:                 proxyUrl || this.matrixClient.baseUrl,\n251:             );\n252:             SlidingSyncManager.instance.startSpidering(100, 50); // 100 rooms at a time, 50ms apart\n253:         }\n254: \n255:         // Connect the matrix client to the dispatcher and setting handlers\n256:         MatrixActionCreators.start(this.matrixClient);\n257:         MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler.matrixClient = this.matrixClient;\n258: \n259:         return opts;\n260:     }\n261: \n262:     public async start(): Promise<any> {\n263:         const opts = await this.assign();\n264: \n265:         logger.log(`MatrixClientPeg: really starting MatrixClient`);\n266:         await this.get().startClient(opts);\n267:         logger.log(`MatrixClientPeg: MatrixClient started`);\n268:     }\n269: \n270:     public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds {\n271:         let copiedCredentials = this.currentClientCreds;\n272:         if (this.currentClientCreds?.userId !== this.matrixClient?.credentials?.userId) {\n273:             // cached credentials belong to a different user - don't use them\n274:             copiedCredentials = null;\n275:         }\n276:         return {\n277:             // Copy the cached credentials before overriding what we can.\n278:             ...(copiedCredentials ?? {}),\n279: \n280:             homeserverUrl: this.matrixClient.baseUrl,\n281:             identityServerUrl: this.matrixClient.idBaseUrl,\n282:             userId: this.matrixClient.credentials.userId,\n283:             deviceId: this.matrixClient.getDeviceId(),\n284:             accessToken: this.matrixClient.getAccessToken(),\n285:             guest: this.matrixClient.isGuest(),\n286:         };\n287:     }\n288: \n289:     public getHomeserverName(): string {\n290:         const matches = /^@[^:]+:(.+)$/.exec(this.matrixClient.credentials.userId);\n291:         if (matches === null || matches.length < 1) {\n292:             throw new Error(\"Failed to derive homeserver name from user ID!\");\n293:         }\n294:         return matches[1];\n295:     }\n296: \n297:     private namesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string | undefined {\n298:         const countWithoutMe = count - 1;\n299:         if (!names.length) {\n300:             return _t(\"Empty room\");\n301:         }\n302:         if (names.length === 1 && countWithoutMe <= 1) {\n303:             return names[0];\n304:         }\n305:     }\n306: \n307:     private memberNamesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string {\n308:         const name = this.namesToRoomName(names, count);\n309:         if (name) return name;\n310: \n311:         if (names.length === 2 && count === 2) {\n312:             return _t(\"%(user1)s and %(user2)s\", {\n313:                 user1: names[0],\n314:                 user2: names[1],\n315:             });\n316:         }\n317:         return _t(\"%(user)s and %(count)s others\", {\n318:             user: names[0],\n319:             count: count - 1,\n320:         });\n321:     }\n322: \n323:     private inviteeNamesToRoomName(names: string[], count: number): string {\n324:         const name = this.namesToRoomName(names, count);\n325:         if (name) return name;\n326: \n327:         if (names.length === 2 && count === 2) {\n328:             return _t(\"Inviting %(user1)s and %(user2)s\", {\n329:                 user1: names[0],\n330:                 user2: names[1],\n331:             });\n332:         }\n333:         return _t(\"Inviting %(user)s and %(count)s others\", {\n334:             user: names[0],\n335:             count: count - 1,\n336:         });\n337:     }\n338: \n339:     private createClient(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {\n340:         const opts: ICreateClientOpts = {\n341:             baseUrl: creds.homeserverUrl,\n342:             idBaseUrl: creds.identityServerUrl,\n343:             accessToken: creds.accessToken,\n344:             userId: creds.userId,\n345:             deviceId: creds.deviceId,\n346:             pickleKey: creds.pickleKey,\n347:             timelineSupport: true,\n348:             forceTURN: !SettingsStore.getValue('webRtcAllowPeerToPeer'),\n349:             fallbackICEServerAllowed: !!SettingsStore.getValue('fallbackICEServerAllowed'),\n350:             // Gather up to 20 ICE candidates when a call arrives: this should be more than we'd\n351:             // ever normally need, so effectively this should make all the gathering happen when\n352:             // the call arrives.\n353:             iceCandidatePoolSize: 20,\n354:             verificationMethods: [\n355:                 verificationMethods.SAS,\n356:                 SHOW_QR_CODE_METHOD,\n357:                 verificationMethods.RECIPROCATE_QR_CODE,\n358:             ],\n359:             identityServer: new IdentityAuthClient(),\n360:             // These are always installed regardless of the labs flag so that cross-signing features\n361:             // can toggle on without reloading and also be accessed immediately after login.\n362:             cryptoCallbacks: { ...crossSigningCallbacks },\n363:             roomNameGenerator: (_: string, state: RoomNameState) => {\n364:                 switch (state.type) {\n365:                     case RoomNameType.Generated:\n366:                         switch (state.subtype) {\n367:                             case \"Inviting\":\n368:                                 return this.inviteeNamesToRoomName(state.names, state.count);\n369:                             default:\n370:                                 return this.memberNamesToRoomName(state.names, state.count);\n371:                         }\n372:                     case RoomNameType.EmptyRoom:\n373:                         if (state.oldName) {\n374:                             return _t(\"Empty room (was %(oldName)s)\", {\n375:                                 oldName: state.oldName,\n376:                             });\n377:                         } else {\n378:                             return _t(\"Empty room\");\n379:                         }\n380:                     default:\n381:                         return null;\n382:                 }\n383:             },\n384:         };\n385: \n386:         if (SecurityCustomisations.getDehydrationKey) {\n387:             opts.cryptoCallbacks!.getDehydrationKey = SecurityCustomisations.getDehydrationKey;\n388:         }\n389: \n390:         this.matrixClient = createMatrixClient(opts);\n391: \n392:         // we're going to add eventlisteners for each matrix event tile, so the\n393:         // potential number of event listeners is quite high.\n394:         this.matrixClient.setMaxListeners(500);\n395: \n396:         this.matrixClient.setGuest(Boolean(creds.guest));\n397: \n398:         const notifTimelineSet = new EventTimelineSet(undefined, {\n399:             timelineSupport: true,\n400:             pendingEvents: false,\n401:         });\n402:         // XXX: what is our initial pagination token?! it somehow needs to be synchronised with /sync.\n403:         notifTimelineSet.getLiveTimeline().setPaginationToken(\"\", EventTimeline.BACKWARDS);\n404:         this.matrixClient.setNotifTimelineSet(notifTimelineSet);\n405:     }\n406: }\n407: \n408: /**\n409:  * Note: You should be using a React context with access to a client rather than\n410:  * using this, as in a multi-account world this will not exist!\n411:  */\n412: export const MatrixClientPeg: IMatrixClientPeg = new MatrixClientPegClass();\n413: \n414: if (!window.mxMatrixClientPeg) {\n415:     window.mxMatrixClientPeg = MatrixClientPeg;\n416: }\n417: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/MatrixClientPeg.ts"
  }
}
187. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -
Input
{
  "path": "src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore.ts",
  "repo": "github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7"
}
Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2019-2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import { logger } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\\\";\\n18: import { CryptoEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto\\\";\\n19: import { Optional } from \\\"matrix-events-sdk\\\";\\n20: \\n21: import defaultDispatcher from '../../dispatcher/dispatcher';\\n22: import { pendingVerificationRequestForUser } from '../../verification';\\n23: import SettingsStore from \\\"../../settings/SettingsStore\\\";\\n24: import { RightPanelPhases } from \\\"./RightPanelStorePhases\\\";\\n25: import { SettingLevel } from \\\"../../settings/SettingLevel\\\";\\n26: import { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../AsyncStore';\\n27: import { ReadyWatchingStore } from '../ReadyWatchingStore';\\n28: import {\\n29:     convertToStatePanel,\\n30:     convertToStorePanel,\\n31:     IRightPanelCard,\\n32:     IRightPanelForRoom,\\n33: } from './RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\\n34: import { ActionPayload } from \\\"../../dispatcher/payloads\\\";\\n35: import { Action } from \\\"../../dispatcher/actions\\\";\\n36: import { ActiveRoomChangedPayload } from \\\"../../dispatcher/payloads/ActiveRoomChangedPayload\\\";\\n37: import { SdkContextClass } from \\\"../../contexts/SDKContext\\\";\\n38: \\n39: /**\\n40:  * A class for tracking the state of the right panel between layouts and\\n41:  * sessions. This state includes a history for each room. Each history element\\n42:  * contains the phase (e.g. RightPanelPhase.RoomMemberInfo) and the state (e.g.\\n43:  * the member) associated with it.\\n44: */\\n45: export default class RightPanelStore extends ReadyWatchingStore {\\n46:     private static internalInstance: RightPanelStore;\\n47: \\n48:     private global?: IRightPanelForRoom;\\n49:     private byRoom: { [roomId: string]: IRightPanelForRoom };\\n50:     private viewedRoomId: Optional<string>;\\n51: \\n52:     private constructor() {\\n53:         super(defaultDispatcher);\\n54:         this.reset();\\n55:     }\\n56: \\n57:     /**\\n58:      * Resets the store. Intended for test usage only.\\n59:      */\\n60:     public reset() {\\n61:         this.global = null;\\n62:         this.byRoom = {};\\n63:         this.viewedRoomId = null;\\n64:     }\\n65: \\n66:     protected async onReady(): Promise<any> {\\n67:         this.viewedRoomId = SdkContextClass.instance.roomViewStore.getRoomId();\\n68:         this.matrixClient.on(CryptoEvent.VerificationRequest, this.onVerificationRequestUpdate);\\n69:         this.loadCacheFromSettings();\\n70:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n71:     }\\n72: \\n73:     protected async onNotReady(): Promise<any> {\\n74:         this.matrixClient.off(CryptoEvent.VerificationRequest, this.onVerificationRequestUpdate);\\n75:     }\\n76: \\n77:     protected onDispatcherAction(payload: ActionPayload) {\\n78:         if (payload.action !== Action.ActiveRoomChanged) return;\\n79: \\n80:         const changePayload = <ActiveRoomChangedPayload>payload;\\n81:         this.handleViewedRoomChange(changePayload.oldRoomId, changePayload.newRoomId);\\n82:     }\\n83: \\n84:     // Getters\\n85:     /**\\n86:      * If you are calling this from a component that already knows about a\\n87:      * specific room from props / state, then it's best to prefer\\n88:      * `isOpenForRoom` below to ensure all your data is for a single room\\n89:      * during room changes.\\n90:      */\\n91:     public get isOpen(): boolean {\\n92:         return this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId]?.isOpen ?? false;\\n93:     }\\n94: \\n95:     public isOpenForRoom(roomId: string): boolean {\\n96:         return this.byRoom[roomId]?.isOpen ?? false;\\n97:     }\\n98: \\n99:     public get roomPhaseHistory(): Array<IRightPanelCard> {\\n100:         return this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId]?.history ?? [];\\n101:     }\\n102: \\n103:     /**\\n104:      * If you are calling this from a component that already knows about a\\n105:      * specific room from props / state, then it's best to prefer\\n106:      * `currentCardForRoom` below to ensure all your data is for a single room\\n107:      * during room changes.\\n108:      */\\n109:     public get currentCard(): IRightPanelCard {\\n110:         const hist = this.roomPhaseHistory;\\n111:         if (hist.length >= 1) {\\n112:             return hist[hist.length - 1];\\n113:         }\\n114:         return { state: {}, phase: null };\\n115:     }\\n116: \\n117:     public currentCardForRoom(roomId: string): IRightPanelCard {\\n118:         const hist = this.byRoom[roomId]?.history ?? [];\\n119:         if (hist.length > 0) {\\n120:             return hist[hist.length - 1];\\n121:         }\\n122:         return { state: {}, phase: null };\\n123:     }\\n124: \\n125:     public get previousCard(): IRightPanelCard {\\n126:         const hist = this.roomPhaseHistory;\\n127:         if (hist?.length >= 2) {\\n128:             return hist[hist.length - 2];\\n129:         }\\n130:         return { state: {}, phase: null };\\n131:     }\\n132: \\n133:     // Setters\\n134:     public setCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose = true, roomId?: string) {\\n135:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\\n136:         // This function behaves as following:\\n137:         // Update state: if the same phase is send but with a state\\n138:         // Set right panel and erase history: if a \\\"different to the current\\\" phase is send (with or without a state)\\n139:         // If the right panel is set, this function also shows the right panel.\\n140:         const redirect = this.getVerificationRedirect(card);\\n141:         const targetPhase = redirect?.phase ?? card.phase;\\n142:         const cardState = redirect?.state ?? (Object.keys(card.state ?? {}).length === 0 ? null : card.state);\\n143: \\n144:         // Checks for wrong SetRightPanelPhase requests\\n145:         if (!this.isPhaseValid(targetPhase, Boolean(rId))) return;\\n146: \\n147:         if ((targetPhase === this.currentCardForRoom(rId)?.phase && !!cardState)) {\\n148:             // Update state: set right panel with a new state but keep the phase (don't know it this is ever needed...)\\n149:             const hist = this.byRoom[rId]?.history ?? [];\\n150:             hist[hist.length - 1].state = cardState;\\n151:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n152:         } else if (targetPhase !== this.currentCardForRoom(rId)?.phase || !this.byRoom[rId]) {\\n153:             // Set right panel and initialize/erase history\\n154:             const history = [{ phase: targetPhase, state: cardState ?? {} }];\\n155:             this.byRoom[rId] = { history, isOpen: true };\\n156:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n157:         } else {\\n158:             this.show(rId);\\n159:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n160:         }\\n161:     }\\n162: \\n163:     public setCards(cards: IRightPanelCard[], allowClose = true, roomId: string = null) {\\n164:         // This function sets the history of the right panel and shows the right panel if not already visible.\\n165:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\\n166:         const history = cards.map(c => ({ phase: c.phase, state: c.state ?? {} }));\\n167:         this.byRoom[rId] = { history, isOpen: true };\\n168:         this.show(rId);\\n169:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n170:     }\\n171: \\n172:     // Appends a card to the history and shows the right panel if not already visible\\n173:     public pushCard(\\n174:         card: IRightPanelCard,\\n175:         allowClose = true,\\n176:         roomId: string = null,\\n177:     ) {\\n178:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\\n179:         const redirect = this.getVerificationRedirect(card);\\n180:         const targetPhase = redirect?.phase ?? card.phase;\\n181:         const pState = redirect?.state ?? card.state ?? {};\\n182: \\n183:         // Checks for wrong SetRightPanelPhase requests\\n184:         if (!this.isPhaseValid(targetPhase, Boolean(rId))) return;\\n185: \\n186:         const roomCache = this.byRoom[rId];\\n187:         if (!!roomCache) {\\n188:             // append new phase\\n189:             roomCache.history.push({ state: pState, phase: targetPhase });\\n190:             roomCache.isOpen = allowClose ? roomCache.isOpen : true;\\n191:         } else {\\n192:             // setup room panel cache with the new card\\n193:             this.byRoom[rId] = {\\n194:                 history: [{ phase: targetPhase, state: pState }],\\n195:                 // if there was no right panel store object the the panel was closed -> keep it closed, except if allowClose==false\\n196:                 isOpen: !allowClose,\\n197:             };\\n198:         }\\n199:         this.show(rId);\\n200:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n201:     }\\n202: \\n203:     public popCard(roomId: string = null) {\\n204:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\\n205:         if (!this.byRoom[rId]) return;\\n206: \\n207:         const removedCard = this.byRoom[rId].history.pop();\\n208:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n209:         return removedCard;\\n210:     }\\n211: \\n212:     public togglePanel(roomId: string | null) {\\n213:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\\n214:         if (!this.byRoom[rId]) return;\\n215: \\n216:         this.byRoom[rId].isOpen = !this.byRoom[rId].isOpen;\\n217:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n218:     }\\n219: \\n220:     public show(roomId: string | null) {\\n221:         if (!this.isOpenForRoom(roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId)) {\\n222:             this.togglePanel(roomId);\\n223:         }\\n224:     }\\n225: \\n226:     public hide(roomId: string | null) {\\n227:         if (this.isOpenForRoom(roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId)) {\\n228:             this.togglePanel(roomId);\\n229:         }\\n230:     }\\n231: \\n232:     private loadCacheFromSettings() {\\n233:         if (this.viewedRoomId) {\\n234:             const room = this.mxClient?.getRoom(this.viewedRoomId);\\n235:             if (!!room) {\\n236:                 this.global = this.global ??\\n237:                     convertToStatePanel(SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"RightPanel.phasesGlobal\\\"), room);\\n238:                 this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId] = this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId] ??\\n239:                     convertToStatePanel(SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"RightPanel.phases\\\", this.viewedRoomId), room);\\n240:             } else {\\n241:                 logger.warn(\\n242:                     \\\"Could not restore the right panel after load because there was no associated room object.\\\",\\n243:                 );\\n244:             }\\n245:         }\\n246:     }\\n247: \\n248:     private emitAndUpdateSettings() {\\n249:         this.filterValidCards(this.global);\\n250:         const storePanelGlobal = convertToStorePanel(this.global);\\n251:         SettingsStore.setValue(\\\"RightPanel.phasesGlobal\\\", null, SettingLevel.DEVICE, storePanelGlobal);\\n252: \\n253:         if (!!this.viewedRoomId) {\\n254:             const panelThisRoom = this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId];\\n255:             this.filterValidCards(panelThisRoom);\\n256:             const storePanelThisRoom = convertToStorePanel(panelThisRoom);\\n257:             SettingsStore.setValue(\\n258:                 \\\"RightPanel.phases\\\",\\n259:                 this.viewedRoomId,\\n260:                 SettingLevel.ROOM_DEVICE,\\n261:                 storePanelThisRoom,\\n262:             );\\n263:         }\\n264:         this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT, null);\\n265:     }\\n266: \\n267:     private filterValidCards(rightPanelForRoom?: IRightPanelForRoom) {\\n268:         if (!rightPanelForRoom?.history) return;\\n269:         rightPanelForRoom.history = rightPanelForRoom.history.filter((card) => this.isCardStateValid(card));\\n270:         if (!rightPanelForRoom.history.length) {\\n271:             rightPanelForRoom.isOpen = false;\\n272:         }\\n273:     }\\n274: \\n275:     private isCardStateValid(card: IRightPanelCard) {\\n276:         // this function does a sanity check on the card. this is required because\\n277:         // some phases require specific state properties that might not be available.\\n278:         // This can be caused on if element is reloaded and the tries to reload right panel data from id's stored in the local storage.\\n279:         // we store id's of users and matrix events. If are not yet fetched on reload the right panel cannot display them.\\n280:         // or potentially other errors.\\n281:         // (A nicer fix could be to indicate, that the right panel is loading if there is missing state data and re-emit if the data is available)\\n282:         switch (card.phase) {\\n283:             case RightPanelPhases.ThreadPanel:\\n284:                 if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_thread\\\")) return false;\\n285:                 break;\\n286:             case RightPanelPhases.ThreadView:\\n287:                 if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_thread\\\")) return false;\\n288:                 if (!card.state.threadHeadEvent) {\\n289:                     logger.warn(\\\"removed card from right panel because of missing threadHeadEvent in card state\\\");\\n290:                 }\\n291:                 return !!card.state.threadHeadEvent;\\n292:             case RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo:\\n293:             case RightPanelPhases.SpaceMemberInfo:\\n294:             case RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel:\\n295:                 if (!card.state.member) {\\n296:                     logger.warn(\\\"removed card from right panel because of missing member in card state\\\");\\n297:                 }\\n298:                 return !!card.state.member;\\n299:             case RightPanelPhases.Room3pidMemberInfo:\\n300:             case RightPanelPhases.Space3pidMemberInfo:\\n301:                 if (!card.state.memberInfoEvent) {\\n302:                     logger.warn(\\\"removed card from right panel because of missing memberInfoEvent in card state\\\");\\n303:                 }\\n304:                 return !!card.state.memberInfoEvent;\\n305:             case RightPanelPhases.Widget:\\n306:                 if (!card.state.widgetId) {\\n307:                     logger.warn(\\\"removed card from right panel because of missing widgetId in card state\\\");\\n308:                 }\\n309:                 return !!card.state.widgetId;\\n310:         }\\n311:         return true;\\n312:     }\\n313: \\n314:     private getVerificationRedirect(card: IRightPanelCard): IRightPanelCard {\\n315:         if (card.phase === RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo && card.state) {\\n316:             // RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo -> needs to be changed to RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel if there is a pending verification request\\n317:             const { member } = card.state;\\n318:             const pendingRequest = pendingVerificationRequestForUser(member);\\n319:             if (pendingRequest) {\\n320:                 return {\\n321:                     phase: RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel,\\n322:                     state: {\\n323:                         verificationRequest: pendingRequest,\\n324:                         member,\\n325:                     },\\n326:                 };\\n327:             }\\n328:         }\\n329:         return null;\\n330:     }\\n331: \\n332:     private isPhaseValid(targetPhase: RightPanelPhases, isViewingRoom: boolean): boolean {\\n333:         if (!RightPanelPhases[targetPhase]) {\\n334:             logger.warn(`Tried to switch right panel to unknown phase: ${targetPhase}`);\\n335:             return false;\\n336:         }\\n337:         if (!isViewingRoom) {\\n338:             logger.warn(\\n339:                 `Tried to switch right panel to a room phase: ${targetPhase}, ` +\\n340:                 `but we are currently not viewing a room`,\\n341:             );\\n342:             return false;\\n343:         }\\n344:         return true;\\n345:     }\\n346: \\n347:     private onVerificationRequestUpdate = () => {\\n348:         if (!this.currentCard?.state) return;\\n349:         const { member } = this.currentCard.state;\\n350:         if (!member) return;\\n351:         const pendingRequest = pendingVerificationRequestForUser(member);\\n352:         if (pendingRequest) {\\n353:             this.currentCard.state.verificationRequest = pendingRequest;\\n354:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n355:         }\\n356:     };\\n357: \\n358:     private handleViewedRoomChange(oldRoomId: Optional<string>, newRoomId: Optional<string>) {\\n359:         if (!this.mxClient) return; // not ready, onReady will handle the first room\\n360:         this.viewedRoomId = newRoomId;\\n361:         // load values from byRoomCache with the viewedRoomId.\\n362:         this.loadCacheFromSettings();\\n363: \\n364:         // when we're switching to a room, clear out any stale MemberInfo cards\\n365:         // in order to fix https://github.com/vector-im/element-web/issues/21487\\n366:         if (this.currentCard?.phase !== RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel) {\\n367:             const panel = this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId];\\n368:             if (panel?.history) {\\n369:                 panel.history = panel.history.filter(\\n370:                     (card) => card.phase != RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo &&\\n371:                         card.phase != RightPanelPhases.Room3pidMemberInfo,\\n372:                 );\\n373:             }\\n374:         }\\n375: \\n376:         // If the right panel stays open mode is used, and the panel was either\\n377:         // closed or never shown for that room, then force it open and display\\n378:         // the room member list.\\n379:         if (\\n380:             SettingsStore.getValue(\\\"feature_right_panel_default_open\\\") &&\\n381:             !this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId]?.isOpen\\n382:         ) {\\n383:             const history = [{ phase: RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberList }];\\n384:             const room = this.viewedRoomId && this.mxClient?.getRoom(this.viewedRoomId);\\n385:             if (!room?.isSpaceRoom()) {\\n386:                 history.unshift({ phase: RightPanelPhases.RoomSummary });\\n387:             }\\n388:             this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId] = {\\n389:                 isOpen: true,\\n390:                 history,\\n391:             };\\n392:         }\\n393:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\\n394:     }\\n395: \\n396:     public static get instance(): RightPanelStore {\\n397:         if (!this.internalInstance) {\\n398:             this.internalInstance = new RightPanelStore();\\n399:             this.internalInstance.start();\\n400:         }\\n401:         return this.internalInstance;\\n402:     }\\n403: }\\n404: \\n405: window.mxRightPanelStore = RightPanelStore.instance;\\n406: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2019-2022 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import { logger } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/logger\";\n18: import { CryptoEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto\";\n19: import { Optional } from \"matrix-events-sdk\";\n20: \n21: import defaultDispatcher from '../../dispatcher/dispatcher';\n22: import { pendingVerificationRequestForUser } from '../../verification';\n23: import SettingsStore from \"../../settings/SettingsStore\";\n24: import { RightPanelPhases } from \"./RightPanelStorePhases\";\n25: import { SettingLevel } from \"../../settings/SettingLevel\";\n26: import { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../AsyncStore';\n27: import { ReadyWatchingStore } from '../ReadyWatchingStore';\n28: import {\n29:     convertToStatePanel,\n30:     convertToStorePanel,\n31:     IRightPanelCard,\n32:     IRightPanelForRoom,\n33: } from './RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\n34: import { ActionPayload } from \"../../dispatcher/payloads\";\n35: import { Action } from \"../../dispatcher/actions\";\n36: import { ActiveRoomChangedPayload } from \"../../dispatcher/payloads/ActiveRoomChangedPayload\";\n37: import { SdkContextClass } from \"../../contexts/SDKContext\";\n38: \n39: /**\n40:  * A class for tracking the state of the right panel between layouts and\n41:  * sessions. This state includes a history for each room. Each history element\n42:  * contains the phase (e.g. RightPanelPhase.RoomMemberInfo) and the state (e.g.\n43:  * the member) associated with it.\n44: */\n45: export default class RightPanelStore extends ReadyWatchingStore {\n46:     private static internalInstance: RightPanelStore;\n47: \n48:     private global?: IRightPanelForRoom;\n49:     private byRoom: { [roomId: string]: IRightPanelForRoom };\n50:     private viewedRoomId: Optional<string>;\n51: \n52:     private constructor() {\n53:         super(defaultDispatcher);\n54:         this.reset();\n55:     }\n56: \n57:     /**\n58:      * Resets the store. Intended for test usage only.\n59:      */\n60:     public reset() {\n61:         this.global = null;\n62:         this.byRoom = {};\n63:         this.viewedRoomId = null;\n64:     }\n65: \n66:     protected async onReady(): Promise<any> {\n67:         this.viewedRoomId = SdkContextClass.instance.roomViewStore.getRoomId();\n68:         this.matrixClient.on(CryptoEvent.VerificationRequest, this.onVerificationRequestUpdate);\n69:         this.loadCacheFromSettings();\n70:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n71:     }\n72: \n73:     protected async onNotReady(): Promise<any> {\n74:         this.matrixClient.off(CryptoEvent.VerificationRequest, this.onVerificationRequestUpdate);\n75:     }\n76: \n77:     protected onDispatcherAction(payload: ActionPayload) {\n78:         if (payload.action !== Action.ActiveRoomChanged) return;\n79: \n80:         const changePayload = <ActiveRoomChangedPayload>payload;\n81:         this.handleViewedRoomChange(changePayload.oldRoomId, changePayload.newRoomId);\n82:     }\n83: \n84:     // Getters\n85:     /**\n86:      * If you are calling this from a component that already knows about a\n87:      * specific room from props / state, then it's best to prefer\n88:      * `isOpenForRoom` below to ensure all your data is for a single room\n89:      * during room changes.\n90:      */\n91:     public get isOpen(): boolean {\n92:         return this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId]?.isOpen ?? false;\n93:     }\n94: \n95:     public isOpenForRoom(roomId: string): boolean {\n96:         return this.byRoom[roomId]?.isOpen ?? false;\n97:     }\n98: \n99:     public get roomPhaseHistory(): Array<IRightPanelCard> {\n100:         return this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId]?.history ?? [];\n101:     }\n102: \n103:     /**\n104:      * If you are calling this from a component that already knows about a\n105:      * specific room from props / state, then it's best to prefer\n106:      * `currentCardForRoom` below to ensure all your data is for a single room\n107:      * during room changes.\n108:      */\n109:     public get currentCard(): IRightPanelCard {\n110:         const hist = this.roomPhaseHistory;\n111:         if (hist.length >= 1) {\n112:             return hist[hist.length - 1];\n113:         }\n114:         return { state: {}, phase: null };\n115:     }\n116: \n117:     public currentCardForRoom(roomId: string): IRightPanelCard {\n118:         const hist = this.byRoom[roomId]?.history ?? [];\n119:         if (hist.length > 0) {\n120:             return hist[hist.length - 1];\n121:         }\n122:         return { state: {}, phase: null };\n123:     }\n124: \n125:     public get previousCard(): IRightPanelCard {\n126:         const hist = this.roomPhaseHistory;\n127:         if (hist?.length >= 2) {\n128:             return hist[hist.length - 2];\n129:         }\n130:         return { state: {}, phase: null };\n131:     }\n132: \n133:     // Setters\n134:     public setCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose = true, roomId?: string) {\n135:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\n136:         // This function behaves as following:\n137:         // Update state: if the same phase is send but with a state\n138:         // Set right panel and erase history: if a \"different to the current\" phase is send (with or without a state)\n139:         // If the right panel is set, this function also shows the right panel.\n140:         const redirect = this.getVerificationRedirect(card);\n141:         const targetPhase = redirect?.phase ?? card.phase;\n142:         const cardState = redirect?.state ?? (Object.keys(card.state ?? {}).length === 0 ? null : card.state);\n143: \n144:         // Checks for wrong SetRightPanelPhase requests\n145:         if (!this.isPhaseValid(targetPhase, Boolean(rId))) return;\n146: \n147:         if ((targetPhase === this.currentCardForRoom(rId)?.phase && !!cardState)) {\n148:             // Update state: set right panel with a new state but keep the phase (don't know it this is ever needed...)\n149:             const hist = this.byRoom[rId]?.history ?? [];\n150:             hist[hist.length - 1].state = cardState;\n151:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n152:         } else if (targetPhase !== this.currentCardForRoom(rId)?.phase || !this.byRoom[rId]) {\n153:             // Set right panel and initialize/erase history\n154:             const history = [{ phase: targetPhase, state: cardState ?? {} }];\n155:             this.byRoom[rId] = { history, isOpen: true };\n156:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n157:         } else {\n158:             this.show(rId);\n159:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n160:         }\n161:     }\n162: \n163:     public setCards(cards: IRightPanelCard[], allowClose = true, roomId: string = null) {\n164:         // This function sets the history of the right panel and shows the right panel if not already visible.\n165:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\n166:         const history = cards.map(c => ({ phase: c.phase, state: c.state ?? {} }));\n167:         this.byRoom[rId] = { history, isOpen: true };\n168:         this.show(rId);\n169:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n170:     }\n171: \n172:     // Appends a card to the history and shows the right panel if not already visible\n173:     public pushCard(\n174:         card: IRightPanelCard,\n175:         allowClose = true,\n176:         roomId: string = null,\n177:     ) {\n178:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\n179:         const redirect = this.getVerificationRedirect(card);\n180:         const targetPhase = redirect?.phase ?? card.phase;\n181:         const pState = redirect?.state ?? card.state ?? {};\n182: \n183:         // Checks for wrong SetRightPanelPhase requests\n184:         if (!this.isPhaseValid(targetPhase, Boolean(rId))) return;\n185: \n186:         const roomCache = this.byRoom[rId];\n187:         if (!!roomCache) {\n188:             // append new phase\n189:             roomCache.history.push({ state: pState, phase: targetPhase });\n190:             roomCache.isOpen = allowClose ? roomCache.isOpen : true;\n191:         } else {\n192:             // setup room panel cache with the new card\n193:             this.byRoom[rId] = {\n194:                 history: [{ phase: targetPhase, state: pState }],\n195:                 // if there was no right panel store object the the panel was closed -> keep it closed, except if allowClose==false\n196:                 isOpen: !allowClose,\n197:             };\n198:         }\n199:         this.show(rId);\n200:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n201:     }\n202: \n203:     public popCard(roomId: string = null) {\n204:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\n205:         if (!this.byRoom[rId]) return;\n206: \n207:         const removedCard = this.byRoom[rId].history.pop();\n208:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n209:         return removedCard;\n210:     }\n211: \n212:     public togglePanel(roomId: string | null) {\n213:         const rId = roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId;\n214:         if (!this.byRoom[rId]) return;\n215: \n216:         this.byRoom[rId].isOpen = !this.byRoom[rId].isOpen;\n217:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n218:     }\n219: \n220:     public show(roomId: string | null) {\n221:         if (!this.isOpenForRoom(roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId)) {\n222:             this.togglePanel(roomId);\n223:         }\n224:     }\n225: \n226:     public hide(roomId: string | null) {\n227:         if (this.isOpenForRoom(roomId ?? this.viewedRoomId)) {\n228:             this.togglePanel(roomId);\n229:         }\n230:     }\n231: \n232:     private loadCacheFromSettings() {\n233:         if (this.viewedRoomId) {\n234:             const room = this.mxClient?.getRoom(this.viewedRoomId);\n235:             if (!!room) {\n236:                 this.global = this.global ??\n237:                     convertToStatePanel(SettingsStore.getValue(\"RightPanel.phasesGlobal\"), room);\n238:                 this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId] = this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId] ??\n239:                     convertToStatePanel(SettingsStore.getValue(\"RightPanel.phases\", this.viewedRoomId), room);\n240:             } else {\n241:                 logger.warn(\n242:                     \"Could not restore the right panel after load because there was no associated room object.\",\n243:                 );\n244:             }\n245:         }\n246:     }\n247: \n248:     private emitAndUpdateSettings() {\n249:         this.filterValidCards(this.global);\n250:         const storePanelGlobal = convertToStorePanel(this.global);\n251:         SettingsStore.setValue(\"RightPanel.phasesGlobal\", null, SettingLevel.DEVICE, storePanelGlobal);\n252: \n253:         if (!!this.viewedRoomId) {\n254:             const panelThisRoom = this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId];\n255:             this.filterValidCards(panelThisRoom);\n256:             const storePanelThisRoom = convertToStorePanel(panelThisRoom);\n257:             SettingsStore.setValue(\n258:                 \"RightPanel.phases\",\n259:                 this.viewedRoomId,\n260:                 SettingLevel.ROOM_DEVICE,\n261:                 storePanelThisRoom,\n262:             );\n263:         }\n264:         this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT, null);\n265:     }\n266: \n267:     private filterValidCards(rightPanelForRoom?: IRightPanelForRoom) {\n268:         if (!rightPanelForRoom?.history) return;\n269:         rightPanelForRoom.history = rightPanelForRoom.history.filter((card) => this.isCardStateValid(card));\n270:         if (!rightPanelForRoom.history.length) {\n271:             rightPanelForRoom.isOpen = false;\n272:         }\n273:     }\n274: \n275:     private isCardStateValid(card: IRightPanelCard) {\n276:         // this function does a sanity check on the card. this is required because\n277:         // some phases require specific state properties that might not be available.\n278:         // This can be caused on if element is reloaded and the tries to reload right panel data from id's stored in the local storage.\n279:         // we store id's of users and matrix events. If are not yet fetched on reload the right panel cannot display them.\n280:         // or potentially other errors.\n281:         // (A nicer fix could be to indicate, that the right panel is loading if there is missing state data and re-emit if the data is available)\n282:         switch (card.phase) {\n283:             case RightPanelPhases.ThreadPanel:\n284:                 if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_thread\")) return false;\n285:                 break;\n286:             case RightPanelPhases.ThreadView:\n287:                 if (!SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_thread\")) return false;\n288:                 if (!card.state.threadHeadEvent) {\n289:                     logger.warn(\"removed card from right panel because of missing threadHeadEvent in card state\");\n290:                 }\n291:                 return !!card.state.threadHeadEvent;\n292:             case RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo:\n293:             case RightPanelPhases.SpaceMemberInfo:\n294:             case RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel:\n295:                 if (!card.state.member) {\n296:                     logger.warn(\"removed card from right panel because of missing member in card state\");\n297:                 }\n298:                 return !!card.state.member;\n299:             case RightPanelPhases.Room3pidMemberInfo:\n300:             case RightPanelPhases.Space3pidMemberInfo:\n301:                 if (!card.state.memberInfoEvent) {\n302:                     logger.warn(\"removed card from right panel because of missing memberInfoEvent in card state\");\n303:                 }\n304:                 return !!card.state.memberInfoEvent;\n305:             case RightPanelPhases.Widget:\n306:                 if (!card.state.widgetId) {\n307:                     logger.warn(\"removed card from right panel because of missing widgetId in card state\");\n308:                 }\n309:                 return !!card.state.widgetId;\n310:         }\n311:         return true;\n312:     }\n313: \n314:     private getVerificationRedirect(card: IRightPanelCard): IRightPanelCard {\n315:         if (card.phase === RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo && card.state) {\n316:             // RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo -> needs to be changed to RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel if there is a pending verification request\n317:             const { member } = card.state;\n318:             const pendingRequest = pendingVerificationRequestForUser(member);\n319:             if (pendingRequest) {\n320:                 return {\n321:                     phase: RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel,\n322:                     state: {\n323:                         verificationRequest: pendingRequest,\n324:                         member,\n325:                     },\n326:                 };\n327:             }\n328:         }\n329:         return null;\n330:     }\n331: \n332:     private isPhaseValid(targetPhase: RightPanelPhases, isViewingRoom: boolean): boolean {\n333:         if (!RightPanelPhases[targetPhase]) {\n334:             logger.warn(`Tried to switch right panel to unknown phase: ${targetPhase}`);\n335:             return false;\n336:         }\n337:         if (!isViewingRoom) {\n338:             logger.warn(\n339:                 `Tried to switch right panel to a room phase: ${targetPhase}, ` +\n340:                 `but we are currently not viewing a room`,\n341:             );\n342:             return false;\n343:         }\n344:         return true;\n345:     }\n346: \n347:     private onVerificationRequestUpdate = () => {\n348:         if (!this.currentCard?.state) return;\n349:         const { member } = this.currentCard.state;\n350:         if (!member) return;\n351:         const pendingRequest = pendingVerificationRequestForUser(member);\n352:         if (pendingRequest) {\n353:             this.currentCard.state.verificationRequest = pendingRequest;\n354:             this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n355:         }\n356:     };\n357: \n358:     private handleViewedRoomChange(oldRoomId: Optional<string>, newRoomId: Optional<string>) {\n359:         if (!this.mxClient) return; // not ready, onReady will handle the first room\n360:         this.viewedRoomId = newRoomId;\n361:         // load values from byRoomCache with the viewedRoomId.\n362:         this.loadCacheFromSettings();\n363: \n364:         // when we're switching to a room, clear out any stale MemberInfo cards\n365:         // in order to fix https://github.com/vector-im/element-web/issues/21487\n366:         if (this.currentCard?.phase !== RightPanelPhases.EncryptionPanel) {\n367:             const panel = this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId];\n368:             if (panel?.history) {\n369:                 panel.history = panel.history.filter(\n370:                     (card) => card.phase != RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberInfo &&\n371:                         card.phase != RightPanelPhases.Room3pidMemberInfo,\n372:                 );\n373:             }\n374:         }\n375: \n376:         // If the right panel stays open mode is used, and the panel was either\n377:         // closed or never shown for that room, then force it open and display\n378:         // the room member list.\n379:         if (\n380:             SettingsStore.getValue(\"feature_right_panel_default_open\") &&\n381:             !this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId]?.isOpen\n382:         ) {\n383:             const history = [{ phase: RightPanelPhases.RoomMemberList }];\n384:             const room = this.viewedRoomId && this.mxClient?.getRoom(this.viewedRoomId);\n385:             if (!room?.isSpaceRoom()) {\n386:                 history.unshift({ phase: RightPanelPhases.RoomSummary });\n387:             }\n388:             this.byRoom[this.viewedRoomId] = {\n389:                 isOpen: true,\n390:                 history,\n391:             };\n392:         }\n393:         this.emitAndUpdateSettings();\n394:     }\n395: \n396:     public static get instance(): RightPanelStore {\n397:         if (!this.internalInstance) {\n398:             this.internalInstance = new RightPanelStore();\n399:             this.internalInstance.start();\n400:         }\n401:         return this.internalInstance;\n402:     }\n403: }\n404: \n405: window.mxRightPanelStore = RightPanelStore.instance;\n406: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore.ts"
  }
}
188. mcp__sourcegraph__sg_read_file @ -

  "path": "src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState.ts",
