Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: /*\\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\\n3: \\n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \\\"License\\\");\\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\\n7: \\n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\\n9: \\n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: import { MatrixEvent } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\\\";\\n18: import { User } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/user\\\";\\n19: import { Room } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\\\";\\n20: import { RoomMember } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-member\\\";\\n21: import { VerificationRequest } from \\\"matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto/verification/request/VerificationRequest\\\";\\n22: \\n23: import { RightPanelPhases } from \\\"./RightPanelStorePhases\\\";\\n24: \\n25: export interface IRightPanelCardState {\\n26:     member?: RoomMember | User;\\n27:     verificationRequest?: VerificationRequest;\\n28:     verificationRequestPromise?: Promise<VerificationRequest>;\\n29:     widgetId?: string;\\n30:     spaceId?: string;\\n31:     // Room3pidMemberInfo, Space3pidMemberInfo,\\n32:     memberInfoEvent?: MatrixEvent;\\n33:     // threads\\n34:     threadHeadEvent?: MatrixEvent;\\n35:     initialEvent?: MatrixEvent;\\n36:     isInitialEventHighlighted?: boolean;\\n37:     initialEventScrollIntoView?: boolean;\\n38: }\\n39: \\n40: export interface IRightPanelCardStateStored {\\n41:     memberId?: string;\\n42:     // we do not store the things associated with verification\\n43:     widgetId?: string;\\n44:     spaceId?: string;\\n45:     // 3pidMemberInfo\\n46:     memberInfoEventId?: string;\\n47:     // threads\\n48:     threadHeadEventId?: string;\\n49:     initialEventId?: string;\\n50:     isInitialEventHighlighted?: boolean;\\n51:     initialEventScrollIntoView?: boolean;\\n52: }\\n53: \\n54: export interface IRightPanelCard {\\n55:     phase: RightPanelPhases;\\n56:     state?: IRightPanelCardState;\\n57: }\\n58: \\n59: export interface IRightPanelCardStored {\\n60:     phase: RightPanelPhases;\\n61:     state?: IRightPanelCardStateStored;\\n62: }\\n63: \\n64: export interface IRightPanelForRoom {\\n65:     isOpen: boolean;\\n66:     history: Array<IRightPanelCard>;\\n67: }\\n68: \\n69: interface IRightPanelForRoomStored {\\n70:     isOpen: boolean;\\n71:     history: Array<IRightPanelCardStored>;\\n72: }\\n73: \\n74: export function convertToStorePanel(cacheRoom: IRightPanelForRoom): IRightPanelForRoomStored {\\n75:     if (!cacheRoom) return cacheRoom;\\n76:     const storeHistory = [...cacheRoom.history].map(panelState => convertCardToStore(panelState));\\n77:     return { isOpen: cacheRoom.isOpen, history: storeHistory };\\n78: }\\n79: \\n80: export function convertToStatePanel(storeRoom: IRightPanelForRoomStored, room: Room): IRightPanelForRoom {\\n81:     if (!storeRoom) return storeRoom;\\n82:     const stateHistory = [...storeRoom.history].map(panelStateStore => convertStoreToCard(panelStateStore, room));\\n83:     return { history: stateHistory, isOpen: storeRoom.isOpen };\\n84: }\\n85: \\n86: export function convertCardToStore(panelState: IRightPanelCard): IRightPanelCardStored {\\n87:     const state = panelState.state ?? {};\\n88:     const stateStored: IRightPanelCardStateStored = {\\n89:         widgetId: state.widgetId,\\n90:         spaceId: state.spaceId,\\n91:         isInitialEventHighlighted: state.isInitialEventHighlighted,\\n92:         initialEventScrollIntoView: state.initialEventScrollIntoView,\\n93:         threadHeadEventId: !!state?.threadHeadEvent?.getId() ?\\n94:             panelState.state.threadHeadEvent.getId() : undefined,\\n95:         memberInfoEventId: !!state?.memberInfoEvent?.getId() ?\\n96:             panelState.state.memberInfoEvent.getId() : undefined,\\n97:         initialEventId: !!state?.initialEvent?.getId() ?\\n98:             panelState.state.initialEvent.getId() : undefined,\\n99:         memberId: !!state?.member?.userId ?\\n100:             panelState.state.member.userId : undefined,\\n101:     };\\n102: \\n103:     return { state: stateStored, phase: panelState.phase };\\n104: }\\n105: \\n106: function convertStoreToCard(panelStateStore: IRightPanelCardStored, room: Room): IRightPanelCard {\\n107:     const stateStored = panelStateStore.state ?? {};\\n108:     const state: IRightPanelCardState = {\\n109:         widgetId: stateStored.widgetId,\\n110:         spaceId: stateStored.spaceId,\\n111:         isInitialEventHighlighted: stateStored.isInitialEventHighlighted,\\n112:         initialEventScrollIntoView: stateStored.initialEventScrollIntoView,\\n113:         threadHeadEvent: !!stateStored?.threadHeadEventId ?\\n114:             room.findEventById(stateStored.threadHeadEventId) : undefined,\\n115:         memberInfoEvent: !!stateStored?.memberInfoEventId ?\\n116:             room.findEventById(stateStored.memberInfoEventId) : undefined,\\n117:         initialEvent: !!stateStored?.initialEventId ?\\n118:             room.findEventById(stateStored.initialEventId) : undefined,\\n119:         member: !!stateStored?.memberId ?\\n120:             room.getMember(stateStored.memberId) : undefined,\\n121:     };\\n122: \\n123:     return { state: state, phase: panelStateStore.phase };\\n124: }\\n125: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState.ts\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2021 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: import { MatrixEvent } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event\";\n18: import { User } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/user\";\n19: import { Room } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room\";\n20: import { RoomMember } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-member\";\n21: import { VerificationRequest } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/crypto/verification/request/VerificationRequest\";\n22: \n23: import { RightPanelPhases } from \"./RightPanelStorePhases\";\n24: \n25: export interface IRightPanelCardState {\n26:     member?: RoomMember | User;\n27:     verificationRequest?: VerificationRequest;\n28:     verificationRequestPromise?: Promise<VerificationRequest>;\n29:     widgetId?: string;\n30:     spaceId?: string;\n31:     // Room3pidMemberInfo, Space3pidMemberInfo,\n32:     memberInfoEvent?: MatrixEvent;\n33:     // threads\n34:     threadHeadEvent?: MatrixEvent;\n35:     initialEvent?: MatrixEvent;\n36:     isInitialEventHighlighted?: boolean;\n37:     initialEventScrollIntoView?: boolean;\n38: }\n39: \n40: export interface IRightPanelCardStateStored {\n41:     memberId?: string;\n42:     // we do not store the things associated with verification\n43:     widgetId?: string;\n44:     spaceId?: string;\n45:     // 3pidMemberInfo\n46:     memberInfoEventId?: string;\n47:     // threads\n48:     threadHeadEventId?: string;\n49:     initialEventId?: string;\n50:     isInitialEventHighlighted?: boolean;\n51:     initialEventScrollIntoView?: boolean;\n52: }\n53: \n54: export interface IRightPanelCard {\n55:     phase: RightPanelPhases;\n56:     state?: IRightPanelCardState;\n57: }\n58: \n59: export interface IRightPanelCardStored {\n60:     phase: RightPanelPhases;\n61:     state?: IRightPanelCardStateStored;\n62: }\n63: \n64: export interface IRightPanelForRoom {\n65:     isOpen: boolean;\n66:     history: Array<IRightPanelCard>;\n67: }\n68: \n69: interface IRightPanelForRoomStored {\n70:     isOpen: boolean;\n71:     history: Array<IRightPanelCardStored>;\n72: }\n73: \n74: export function convertToStorePanel(cacheRoom: IRightPanelForRoom): IRightPanelForRoomStored {\n75:     if (!cacheRoom) return cacheRoom;\n76:     const storeHistory = [...cacheRoom.history].map(panelState => convertCardToStore(panelState));\n77:     return { isOpen: cacheRoom.isOpen, history: storeHistory };\n78: }\n79: \n80: export function convertToStatePanel(storeRoom: IRightPanelForRoomStored, room: Room): IRightPanelForRoom {\n81:     if (!storeRoom) return storeRoom;\n82:     const stateHistory = [...storeRoom.history].map(panelStateStore => convertStoreToCard(panelStateStore, room));\n83:     return { history: stateHistory, isOpen: storeRoom.isOpen };\n84: }\n85: \n86: export function convertCardToStore(panelState: IRightPanelCard): IRightPanelCardStored {\n87:     const state = panelState.state ?? {};\n88:     const stateStored: IRightPanelCardStateStored = {\n89:         widgetId: state.widgetId,\n90:         spaceId: state.spaceId,\n91:         isInitialEventHighlighted: state.isInitialEventHighlighted,\n92:         initialEventScrollIntoView: state.initialEventScrollIntoView,\n93:         threadHeadEventId: !!state?.threadHeadEvent?.getId() ?\n94:             panelState.state.threadHeadEvent.getId() : undefined,\n95:         memberInfoEventId: !!state?.memberInfoEvent?.getId() ?\n96:             panelState.state.memberInfoEvent.getId() : undefined,\n97:         initialEventId: !!state?.initialEvent?.getId() ?\n98:             panelState.state.initialEvent.getId() : undefined,\n99:         memberId: !!state?.member?.userId ?\n100:             panelState.state.member.userId : undefined,\n101:     };\n102: \n103:     return { state: stateStored, phase: panelState.phase };\n104: }\n105: \n106: function convertStoreToCard(panelStateStore: IRightPanelCardStored, room: Room): IRightPanelCard {\n107:     const stateStored = panelStateStore.state ?? {};\n108:     const state: IRightPanelCardState = {\n109:         widgetId: stateStored.widgetId,\n110:         spaceId: stateStored.spaceId,\n111:         isInitialEventHighlighted: stateStored.isInitialEventHighlighted,\n112:         initialEventScrollIntoView: stateStored.initialEventScrollIntoView,\n113:         threadHeadEvent: !!stateStored?.threadHeadEventId ?\n114:             room.findEventById(stateStored.threadHeadEventId) : undefined,\n115:         memberInfoEvent: !!stateStored?.memberInfoEventId ?\n116:             room.findEventById(stateStored.memberInfoEventId) : undefined,\n117:         initialEvent: !!stateStored?.initialEventId ?\n118:             room.findEventById(stateStored.initialEventId) : undefined,\n119:         member: !!stateStored?.memberId ?\n120:             room.getMember(stateStored.memberId) : undefined,\n121:     };\n122: \n123:     return { state: state, phase: panelStateStore.phase };\n124: }\n125: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/element-web--8ebdcab7@ad5bbea8a042bbf168fec65b99f459e75c3f2354/-/blob/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState.ts"
  }
}

{
  "content": "/*\nCopyright 2019, 2020 The Matrix.org Foundation C.I.C.\nLicensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n*/\n\nimport { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\nimport { IStartClientOpts } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\n\nexport interface IMatrixClientCreds {\n    homeserverUrl: string;\n    identityServerUrl?: string;\n    userId: string;\n    deviceId?: string;\n    accessToken: string;\n    guest?: boolean;\n    pickleKey?: string;\n    freshLogin?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface IMatrixClientPeg {\n    opts: IStartClientOpts;\n    getHomeserverName(): string;\n    get(): MatrixClient;\n    unset(): void;\n    assign(): Promise<any>;\n    start(): Promise<any>;\n    getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds;\n    setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;\n    currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;\n    userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;\n    userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;\n    replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;\n}\n\nclass MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {\n    public opts: IStartClientOpts = { initialSyncLimit: 20 };\n    private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\n\n    public get(): MatrixClient { return this.matrixClient; }\n    public unset(): void { this.matrixClient = null; }\n    public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {}\n    public async assign(): Promise<any> { return {}; }\n    public async start(): Promise<any> {}\n    public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds { return null; }\n    public getHomeserverName(): string { return ''; }\n    public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {}\n    public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean { return false; }\n    public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean { return false; }\n    public userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean { return false; }\n}\n\nexport const MatrixClientPeg: IMatrixClientPeg = new MatrixClientPegClass();\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/MatrixClientPeg.ts"
}

  "content": "import { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\nimport { IStartClientOpts } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\n\nexport interface IMatrixClientCreds {\n    homeserverUrl: string;\n    identityServerUrl?: string;\n    userId: string;\n    deviceId?: string;\n    accessToken: string;\n    guest?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface IMatrixClientPeg {\n    opts: IStartClientOpts;\n    getHomeserverName(): string;\n    get(): MatrixClient;\n    unset(): void;\n    assign(): Promise<any>;\n    start(): Promise<any>;\n    getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds;\n    setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;\n    currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;\n    userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;\n    userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;\n    replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;\n}\n\nclass MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {\n    public opts: IStartClientOpts = { initialSyncLimit: 20 };\n    private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\n\n    public get(): MatrixClient { return this.matrixClient; }\n    public unset(): void { this.matrixClient = null; }\n    public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {}\n    public async assign(): Promise<any> { return {}; }\n    public async start(): Promise<any> {}\n    public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds { return null; }\n    public getHomeserverName(): string { return ''; }\n    public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {}\n    public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean { return false; }\n    public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean { return false; }\n    public userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean { return false; }\n}\n\nexport const MatrixClientPeg: IMatrixClientPeg = new MatrixClientPegClass();\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/MatrixClientPeg.ts"
}

206. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\n\nexport const UPDATE_EVENT = \"update\";\n\nexport abstract class AsyncStore<T> extends EventEmitter {\n    private _state: T;\n\n    constructor(private dispatcher: any) {\n        super();\n    }\n\n    protected get state(): T { return this._state; }\n\n    protected async updateState(state: Partial<T>): Promise<void> {\n        this._state = Object.assign({}, this._state, state);\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT, this.state);\n    }\n\n    protected abstract onDispatch(payload: any): Promise<void>;\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/stores/AsyncStore.ts"
}
Output
{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\n\nexport const UPDATE_EVENT = \"update\";\n\nexport abstract class AsyncStore<T> extends EventEmitter {\n    private _state: T;\n\n    constructor(private dispatcher: any) {\n        super();\n    }\n\n    protected get state(): T { return this._state; }\n\n    protected async updateState(state: Partial<T>): Promise<void> {\n        this._state = Object.assign({}, this._state, state);\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT, this.state);\n    }\n\n    protected abstract onDispatch(payload: any): Promise<void>;\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/app/src/stores/AsyncStore.ts",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}

{
  "content": "import { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\nimport { AsyncStore } from './AsyncStore';\n\nexport abstract class AsyncStoreWithClient<T> extends AsyncStore<T> {\n    protected matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\n\n    protected abstract onAction(payload: any): Promise<void>;\n    protected abstract onReady(): Promise<any>;\n    protected abstract onNotReady(): Promise<any>;\n\n    protected async onDispatch(payload: any): Promise<void> {\n        await this.onAction(payload);\n    }\n\n    public useUnitTestClient(client: MatrixClient) {\n        this.matrixClient = client;\n    }\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/stores/AsyncStoreWithClient.ts"
}

{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\nimport { UPDATE_EVENT } from './AsyncStore';\n\nexport abstract class ReadyWatchingStore extends EventEmitter {\n    protected matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\n    protected mxClient: MatrixClient = null;\n\n    constructor(private dispatcher?: any) {\n        super();\n    }\n\n    public start(): void {}\n\n    protected abstract onReady(): Promise<any>;\n    protected abstract onNotReady(): Promise<any>;\n    protected onDispatcherAction(payload: any): void {}\n}\n",

209. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../AsyncStore';\nimport { RightPanelPhases } from './RightPanelStorePhases';\nimport { IRightPanelCard, IRightPanelCardState } from './RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\n\nexport default class RightPanelStore extends EventEmitter {\n    private static internalInstance: RightPanelStore;\n    private _isOpen: boolean = false;\n    private _currentCard: IRightPanelCard = { state: {}, phase: null };\n    private _viewedRoomId: string | null = null;\n\n    public get isOpen(): boolean { return this._isOpen; }\n    public get currentCard(): IRightPanelCard { return this._currentCard; }\n\n    public togglePanel(roomId: string | null): void {\n        this._isOpen = !this._isOpen;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public setCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {\n        this._currentCard = card;\n        this._isOpen = true;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public setCards(cards: IRightPanelCard[], allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {\n        if (cards.length > 0) {\n            this._currentCard = cards[cards.length - 1];\n        }\n        this._isOpen = true;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public pushCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {\n        this._currentCard = card;\n        this._isOpen = true;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public start(): void {}\n\n    public static get instance(): RightPanelStore {\n        if (!RightPanelStore.internalInstance) {\n            RightPanelStore.internalInstance = new RightPanelStore();\n        }\n        return RightPanelStore.internalInstance;\n    }\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore.ts"
}
Output
{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../AsyncStore';\nimport { RightPanelPhases } from './RightPanelStorePhases';\nimport { IRightPanelCard, IRightPanelCardState } from './RightPanelStoreIPanelState';\n\nexport default class RightPanelStore extends EventEmitter {\n    private static internalInstance: RightPanelStore;\n    private _isOpen: boolean = false;\n    private _currentCard: IRightPanelCard = { state: {}, phase: null };\n    private _viewedRoomId: string | null = null;\n\n    public get isOpen(): boolean { return this._isOpen; }\n    public get currentCard(): IRightPanelCard { return this._currentCard; }\n\n    public togglePanel(roomId: string | null): void {\n        this._isOpen = !this._isOpen;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public setCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {\n        this._currentCard = card;\n        this._isOpen = true;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public setCards(cards: IRightPanelCard[], allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {\n        if (cards.length > 0) {\n            this._currentCard = cards[cards.length - 1];\n        }\n        this._isOpen = true;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public pushCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {\n        this._currentCard = card;\n        this._isOpen = true;\n        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);\n    }\n\n    public start(): void {}\n\n    public static get instance(): RightPanelStore {\n        if (!RightPanelStore.internalInstance) {\n            RightPanelStore.internalInstance = new RightPanelStore();\n        }\n        return RightPanelStore.internalInstance;\n    }\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/app/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore.ts",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
210. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "import { RightPanelPhases } from './RightPanelStorePhases';\n\nexport interface IRightPanelCardState {\n    member?: any;\n    verificationRequest?: any;\n    verificationRequestPromise?: any;\n    widgetId?: string;\n    spaceId?: string;\n    memberInfoEvent?: any;\n    threadHeadEvent?: any;\n    initialEvent?: any;\n    isInitialEventHighlighted?: boolean;\n    initialEventScrollIntoView?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface IRightPanelCard {\n    phase: RightPanelPhases;\n    state?: IRightPanelCardState;\n}\n\nexport interface IRightPanelForRoom {\n    isOpen: boolean;\n    history: Array<IRightPanelCard>;\n}\n\nexport function convertToStorePanel(cacheRoom: IRightPanelForRoom): any { return null; }\nexport function convertToStatePanel(storeRoom: any, room: any): IRightPanelForRoom { return null; }\nexport function convertCardToStore(panelState: IRightPanelCard): any { return null; }\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStoreIPanelState.ts"
}

215. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { Room } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room';\nimport { NotificationColor } from './NotificationColor';\nimport { SummarizedNotificationState } from './SummarizedNotificationState';\nimport { ThreadsRoomNotificationState } from './ThreadsRoomNotificationState';\n\nexport const UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR = \"update_status_indicator\";\n\nclass RoomNotificationStateStoreClass extends EventEmitter {\n    private static _instance: RoomNotificationStateStoreClass;\n    private roomStates: Map<string, any> = new Map();\n    private threadsRoomStates: Map<string, ThreadsRoomNotificationState> = new Map();\n    public globalState: SummarizedNotificationState = new SummarizedNotificationState();\n\n    public getRoomState(room: Room): { color: NotificationColor } {\n        return { color: NotificationColor.None };\n    }\n\n    public getThreadsRoomState(room: Room): ThreadsRoomNotificationState {\n        if (!this.threadsRoomStates.has(room.roomId)) {\n            this.threadsRoomStates.set(room.roomId, new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room));\n        }\n        return this.threadsRoomStates.get(room.roomId);\n    }\n\n    public static get instance(): RoomNotificationStateStoreClass {\n        if (!RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance) {\n            RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance = new RoomNotificationStateStoreClass();\n        }\n        return RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance;\n    }\n}\n\nexport const RoomNotificationStateStore = RoomNotificationStateStoreClass;\n",
  "file_path": "/app/src/stores/notifications/RoomNotificationStateStore.ts"
}
Output
{
  "content": "import { EventEmitter } from 'events';\nimport { Room } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room';\nimport { NotificationColor } from './NotificationColor';\nimport { SummarizedNotificationState } from './SummarizedNotificationState';\nimport { ThreadsRoomNotificationState } from './ThreadsRoomNotificationState';\n\nexport const UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR = \"update_status_indicator\";\n\nclass RoomNotificationStateStoreClass extends EventEmitter {\n    private static _instance: RoomNotificationStateStoreClass;\n    private roomStates: Map<string, any> = new Map();\n    private threadsRoomStates: Map<string, ThreadsRoomNotificationState> = new Map();\n    public globalState: SummarizedNotificationState = new SummarizedNotificationState();\n\n    public getRoomState(room: Room): { color: NotificationColor } {\n        return { color: NotificationColor.None };\n    }\n\n    public getThreadsRoomState(room: Room): ThreadsRoomNotificationState {\n        if (!this.threadsRoomStates.has(room.roomId)) {\n            this.threadsRoomStates.set(room.roomId, new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room));\n        }\n        return this.threadsRoomStates.get(room.roomId);\n    }\n\n    public static get instance(): RoomNotificationStateStoreClass {\n        if (!RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance) {\n            RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance = new RoomNotificationStateStoreClass();\n        }\n        return RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance;\n    }\n}\n\nexport const RoomNotificationStateStore = RoomNotificationStateStoreClass;\n",
  "filePath": "/app/src/stores/notifications/RoomNotificationStateStore.ts",
  "originalFile": null,

216. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/app/src/stores/notifications/NotificationState.ts"
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "import { TypedEventEmitter } from \"matrix-js-sdk/src/models/typed-event-emitter\";\nimport { NotificationColor } from \"./NotificationColor\";\n\nexport interface INotificationStateSnapshotParams {\n    symbol: string | null;\n    count: number;\n    color: NotificationColor;\n}\n\nexport enum NotificationStateEvents {\n    Update = \"update\",\n}\n\ntype EventHandlerMap = {\n    [NotificationStateEvents.Update]: () => void;\n};\n\nexport abstract class NotificationState\n    extends TypedEventEmitter<NotificationStateEvents, EventHandlerMap>\n    implements INotificationStateSnapshotParams {\n    protected _symbol: string | null;\n    protected _count: number;\n    protected _color: NotificationColor;\n\n    public get symbol(): string { return this._symbol; }\n    public get count(): number { return this._count; }\n    public get color(): NotificationColor { return this._color; }\n    public get isIdle(): boolean { return this.color <= NotificationColor.None; }\n    public get isUnread(): boolean { return this.color >= NotificationColor.Bold; }\n    public get hasUnreadCount(): boolean { return this.color >= NotificationColor.Grey && (!!this.count || !!this.symbol); }\n    public get hasMentions(): boolean { return this.color >= NotificationColor.Red; }\n\n    protected emitIfUpdated(snapshot: NotificationStateSnapshot) {\n        if (snapshot.isDifferentFrom(this)) {\n            this.emit(NotificationStateEvents.Update);\n        }\n    }\n\n    protected snapshot(): NotificationStateSnapshot {\n        return new NotificationStateSnapshot(this);\n    }\n\n    public destroy(): void {\n        this.removeAllListeners(NotificationStateEvents.Update);\n    }\n}\n\nexport class NotificationStateSnapshot {\n    private readonly symbol: string;\n    private readonly count: number;\n    private readonly color: NotificationColor;\n\n    constructor(state: INotificationStateSnapshotParams) {\n        this.symbol = state.symbol;\n        this.count = state.count;\n        this.color = state.color;\n    }\n\n    public isDifferentFrom(other: INotificationStateSnapshotParams): boolean {\n        const before = { count: this.count, symbol: this.symbol, color: this.color };\n        const after = { count: other.count, symbol: other.symbol, color: other.color };\n        return JSON.stringify(before) !== JSON.stringify(after);\n    }\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/app/src/stores/notifications/NotificationState.ts",
    "numLines": 65,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 65
  },
  "type": "text"
}

{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/settings/handlers/MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\n\nexport default class MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler {\n    public static matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;\n\n    public getValue(settingName: string, roomId: string): any {\n        return undefined;\n    }\n\n    public setValue(settingName: string, roomId: string, newValue: any): Promise<void> {\n        return Promise.resolve();\n    }\n\n    public canSetValue(settingName: string, roomId: string): boolean {\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    public isSupported(): boolean {\n        return false;\n    }\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/utils/TypeUtils.ts << 'EOF'\nexport function makeType<T>(clazz: { new(): T }, obj: Partial<T>): T {\n    const instance = new clazz();\n    Object.assign(instance, obj);\n    return instance;\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/utils/ValidatedServerConfig.ts << 'EOF'\nexport class ValidatedServerConfig {\n    public hsUrl: string;\n    public hsName: string;\n    public hsNameIsDifferent: boolean;\n    public isUrl: string;\n    public isDefault: boolean;\n    public isNameResolvable: boolean;\n    public warning: string;\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/utils/maps.ts << 'EOF'\nexport class EnhancedMap<K, V> extends Map<K, V> {\n    public getOrCreate(key: K, defaultVal: V): V {\n        if (!this.has(key)) {\n            this.set(key, defaultVal);\n        }\n        return this.get(key);\n    }\n}\nEOF\n\necho \"all done\"",
  "description": "Write TypeUtils, ValidatedServerConfig, maps, MatrixClientBackedSettingsHandler stubs"
}

{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/components/views/elements/AccessibleButton.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\n\nexport type ButtonEvent = React.MouseEvent<Element> | React.KeyboardEvent<Element>;\n\ninterface IProps {\n    onClick?: (ev: ButtonEvent) => void;\n    className?: string;\n    disabled?: boolean;\n    role?: string;\n    children?: React.ReactNode;\n    [key: string]: any;\n}\n\nconst AccessibleButton = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, IProps>(\n    ({ children, onClick, className, ...props }, ref) => {\n        return <div className={className} onClick={onClick as any} ref={ref as any} {...props}>{children}</div>;\n    }\n);\nAccessibleButton.displayName = 'AccessibleButton';\n\nexport default AccessibleButton;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/components/views/elements/Tooltip.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\n\nexport enum Alignment {\n    Top = \"top\",\n    Bottom = \"bottom\",\n    Left = \"left\",\n    Right = \"right\",\n    Natural = \"natural\",\n    TopRight = \"topRight\",\n}\n\ninterface IProps {\n    label: string;\n    alignment?: Alignment;\n    className?: string;\n    children?: React.ReactNode;\n    [key: string]: any;\n}\n\nexport default function Tooltip({ label, children }: IProps) {\n    return <div>{children}</div>;\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/components/views/elements/AccessibleTooltipButton.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { ButtonEvent } from './AccessibleButton';\nimport { Alignment } from './Tooltip';\n\ninterface IProps {\n    title: string;\n    onClick: (ev: ButtonEvent) => void;\n    className?: string;\n    alignment?: Alignment;\n    role?: string;\n    'aria-selected'?: boolean;\n    children?: React.ReactNode;\n    [key: string]: any;\n}\n\nconst AccessibleTooltipButton = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, IProps>(\n    ({ title, onClick, className, children, ...props }, ref) => {\n        return (\n            <button\n                className={className}\n                onClick={onClick as any}\n                title={title}\n                ref={ref as any}\n                {...props}\n            >\n                {children}\n            </button>\n        );\n    }\n);\nAccessibleTooltipButton.displayName = 'AccessibleTooltipButton';\n\nexport default AccessibleTooltipButton;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/components/views/elements/Spinner.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\n\nconst Spinner: React.FC = () => <div className=\"mx_Spinner\" />;\nexport 224. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/contexts/MatrixClientContext.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';\n\nconst MatrixClientContext = React.createContext<MatrixClient>(null);\nexport default MatrixClientContext;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/contexts/RoomContext.ts << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\n\nexport enum TimelineRenderingType {\n    Room = \"Room\",\n    Thread = \"Thread\",\n    ThreadsList = \"ThreadsList\",\n    File = \"File\",\n    Notification = \"Notification\",\n    Search = \"Search\",\n    Pinned = \"Pinned\",\n}\n\nexport interface IRoomState {\n    roomId?: string;\n    timelineRenderingType: TimelineRenderingType;\n    [key: string]: any;\n}\n\nconst RoomContext = React.createContext<IRoomState>({\n    timelineRenderingType: TimelineRenderingType.Room,\n});\n\nexport default RoomContext;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/hooks/useEventEmitter.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { EventEmitter } from 'events';\n\nexport function useTypedEventEmitter<Events extends string | symbol>(\n    emitter: EventEmitter,\n    eventName: Events,\n    handler: (...args: any[]) => void,\n): void {\n    useEffect(() => {\n        if (!emitter) return;\n        emitter.on(eventName as string, handler);\n        return () => {\n            emitter.off(eventName as string, handler);\n        };\n    }, [emitter, eventName, handler]);\n}\n\nexport function useEventEmitter(\n    emitter: EventEmitter | undefined,\n    eventName: string | symbol,\n    handler: (...args: any[]) => void,\n): void {\n    useEffect(() => {\n        if (!emitter) return;\n        emitter.on(eventName, handler);\n        return () => {\n            emitter.off(eventName, handler);\n        };\n    }, [emitter, eventName, handler]);\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/hooks/useAsyncMemo.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\n\nexport function useAsyncMemo<T>(\n    fn: () => Promise<T>,\n    deps: any[],\n    initialValue: T = undefined,\n): T {\n    const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(initialValue);\n    useEffect(() => {\n        let cancelled = false;\n        fn().then(result => {\n            if (!cancelled) {\n                setValue(result);\n            }\n        });\n        return () => { cancelled = true; };\n    }, deps);\n    return value;\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/hooks/useRoomState.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { Room } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room';\nimport { RoomStateEvent } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room-state';\n\nexport function useRoomState<T>(room: Room, mapper: (state: any) => T): T {\n    const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(() => room ? mapper(room.currentState) : undefined);\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        if (!room) return;\n        const update = () => setValue(mapper(room.currentState));\n        room.currentState.on(RoomStateEvent.Events, update);\n        return () => {\n            room.currentState.off(RoomStateEvent.Events, update);\n        };\n    }, [room, mapper]);\n\n    return value;\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/utils/PinningUtils.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { MatrixEvent } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event';\n\nclass PinningUtils {\n    public isPinnable(event: MatrixEvent): boolean {\n        return true;\n    }\n}\n\nexport default new PinningUtils();\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/components/views/right_panel/types.ts << 'EOF'\nexport const ReadPinsEventId = \"im.vector.room.read_pins\";\nEOF\n\necho \"all done\"",
  "description": "Write context, hooks, PinningUtils, types stubs"
}

{
  "command": "cat > /app/src/components/views/rooms/PinnedEventTile.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { MatrixEvent } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/event';\n\ninterface IProps {\n    event: MatrixEvent;\n    onUnpinClicked?: () => void;\n    permalinkCreator?: any;\n}\n\nconst PinnedEventTile: React.FC<IProps> = ({ event, onUnpinClicked }) => {\n    return <div className=\"mx_PinnedEventTile\" />;\n};\n\nexport default PinnedEventTile;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/components/views/right_panel/BaseCard.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\n\ninterface IProps {\n    header?: React.ReactNode;\n    className?: string;\n    onClose?: () => void;\n    children?: React.ReactNode;\n    [key: string]: any;\n}\n\nconst BaseCard: React.FC<IProps> = ({ header, children, className, onClose }) => {\n    return (\n        <div className={className}>\n            {header}\n            {children}\n        </div>\n    );\n};\n\nexport default BaseCard;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/components/views/typography/Heading.tsx << 'EOF'\nimport React from 'react';\n\ninterface IProps {\n    size: 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4';\n    className?: string;\n    children?: React.ReactNode;\n}\n\nconst Heading: React.FC<IProps> = ({ size: Tag, className, children }) => {\n    return <Tag className={className}>{children}</Tag>;\n};\n\nexport default Heading;\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/utils/permalinks/Permalinks.ts << 'EOF'\nexport class RoomPermalinkCreator {\n    constructor(private room: any, private roomId?: string) {}\n    public forEvent(eventId: string): string { return `#event-${eventId}`; }\n    public forRoom(): string { return '#room'; }\n    public forShareableRoom(): string { return '#room'; }\n    public load(): void {}\n    public start(): void {}\n    public stop(): void {}\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/dispatcher/dispatch-actions/threads.ts << 'EOF'\nimport dis from '../dispatcher';\nimport { Action } from '../actions';\n\nexport function showThreadPanel(): void {\n    dis.dispatch({ action: 'view_thread_panel' });\n}\nEOF\n\ncat > /app/src/settings/SettingLevel.ts << 'EOF'\nexport enum SettingLevel {\n    DEVICE = \"device\",\n    ROOM_DEVICE = \"room-device\",\n    ROOM_ACCOUNT = \"room-account\",\n    ACCOUNT = \"account\",\n    ROOM = \"room\",\n    CONFIG = \"config\",\n    DEFAULT = \"default\",\n}\nEOF\n\necho \"all done\"",
  "description": "Write PinnedEventTile, BaseCard, Heading, Permalinks, threads, SettingLevel stubs"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,

jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getOpenIdToken: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n        registerWithIdentityServer: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({}),\n        getIdentityAccount: jest.fn(),\n        fetchRoomEvent: jest.fn(),\n        makeTxnId: jest.fn().mockImplementation(() => `t${txnId++}`),\n        sendToDevice: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n jest.fn().mockReturnValue({\n            setVideoInput: jest.fn(),\n            setAudioInput: jest.fn(),\n            setAudioSettings: jest.fn(),\n        } as unknown as MediaHandler),\n        uploadContent: jest.fn(),\n        getEventMapper: () => (opts) => new MatrixEvent(opts),\n        leaveRoomChain: jest.fn(roomId => ({ [roomId]: null })),\n    } as unknown as MatrixClient;\n\n    client.reEmitter = new ReEmitter(client);\n\n    client.canSupport = new Map();\n    Object.keys(Feature).forEach(feature => {\n        client.canSupport.set(feature as Feature, ServerSupport.Stable);\n    });\n\n    Object.defineProperty(client, \"pollingTurnServers\", {\n        configurable: true,\n        get: () => true,\n    });\n    return client;\n}\n\ntype MakeEventPassThruProps = {\n    user: User[\"userId\"];\n    relatesTo?: IEventRelation;\n    event?: boolean;\n    ts?: number;\n    skey?: string;\n};\ntype MakeEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n    type: string;\n    redacts?: string;\n    content: IContent;\n    room?: Room[\"roomId\"];\n    prev_content?: IContent;\n    unsigned?: IUnsigned;\n};\n\nexport const mkRoomCreateEvent = (userId: string, roomId: string): MatrixEvent => {\n    return mkEvent({\n        event: true,\n        type: EventType.RoomCreate,\n        content: {\n            creator: userId,\n            room_version: KNOWN_SAFE_ROOM_VERSION,\n        },\n        skey: \"\",\n        user: userId,\n        room: roomId,\n    });\n};\n\nexport function mkEvent(opts: MakeEventProps): MatrixEvent {\n    if (!opts.type || !opts.content) {\n        throw new Error(\"Missing .type or .content =>\" + JSON.stringify(opts));\n    }\n    const event: Partial<IEvent> = {\n        type: opts.type,\n        room_id: opts.room,\n        sender: opts.user,\n        content: opts.content,\n        prev_content: opts.prev_content,\n        event_id: \"$\" + Math.random() + \"-\" + Math.random(),\n        origin_server_ts: opts.ts ?? 0,\n        unsigned: opts.unsigned,\n        redacts: opts.redacts,\n    };\n    if (opts.skey !== undefined) {\n        event.state_key = opts.skey;\n    } else if ([\n        \"m.room.name\", \"m.room.topic\", \"m.room.create\", \"m.room.join_rules\",\n        \"m.room.power_levels\", \"m.room.topic\", \"m.room.history_visibility\",\n        \"m.room.encryption\", \"m.room.member\", \"com.example.state\",\n        \"m.room.guest_access\", \"m.room.tombstone\",\n    ].indexOf(opts.type) !== -1) {\n        event.state_key = \"\";\n    }\n\n    const mxEvent = opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event as unknown as MatrixEvent;\n    if (!mxEvent.sender && opts.user && opts.room) {\n        mxEvent.sender = {\n            userId: opts.user,\n            membership: \"join\",\n            name: opts.user,\n            rawDisplayName: opts.user,\n            roomId: opts.room,\n            getAvatarUrl: () => {},\n            getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {},\n        } as unknown as RoomMember;\n    }\n    return mxEvent;\n}\n\nexport function mkPresence(opts) {\n    if (!opts.user) {\n        throw new Error(\"Missing user\");\n    }\n    const event = {\n        event_id: \"$\" + Math.random() + \"-\" + Math.random(),\n        type: \"m.presence\",\n        sender: opts.user,\n        content: {\n            avatar_url: opts.url,\n            displayname: opts.name,\n            last_active_ago: opts.ago,\n            presence: opts.presence || \"offline\",\n        },\n    };\n    return opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event;\n}\n\nexport function mkMembership(opts: MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n    room: Room[\"roomId\"];\n    mship: string;\n    prevMship?: string;\n    name?: string;\n    url?: string;\n    skey?: string;\n    target?: RoomMember;\n}): MatrixEvent {\n    const event: MakeEventProps = {\n        ...opts,\n        type: \"m.room.member\",\n        content: {\n            membership: opts.mship,\n        },\n    };\n    if (!opts.skey) {\n        event.skey = opts.user;\n    }\n    if (!opts.mship) {\n        throw new Error(\"Missing .mship => \" + JSON.stringify(opts));\n    }\n\n    if (opts.prevMship) {\n        event.prev_content = { membership: opts.prevMship };\n    }\n    if (opts.name) { event.content.displayname = opts.name; }\n    if (opts.url) { event.content.avatar_url = opts.url; }\n    const e = mkEvent(event);\n    if (opts.target) {\n        e.target = opts.target;\n    }\n    return e;\n}\n\nexport function mkRoomMember(roomId: string, userId: string, membership = \"join\"): RoomMember {\n    return {\n        userId,\n        membership,\n        name: userId,\n        rawDisplayName: userId,\n        roomId,\n        events: {},\n        getAvatarUrl: () => {},\n        getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {},\n        getDMInviter: () => {},\n    } as unknown as RoomMember;\n}\n\nexport type MessageEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n    room: Room[\"roomId\"];\n    relatesTo?: IEventRelation;\n    msg?: string;\n};\n\nexport function mkMessage({ msg, relatesTo, ...opts }: MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n    room: Room[\"roomId\"];\n    msg?: string;\n}): MatrixEvent {\n    if (!opts.room || !opts.user) {\n        throw new Error(\"Missing .room or .user from options\");\n    }\n    const message = msg ?? \"Random->\" + Math.random();\n    const event: MakeEventProps = {\n        ...opts,\n        type: \"m.room.message\",\n        content: {\n            msgtype: \"m.text\",\n            body: message,\n            ['m.relates_to']: relatesTo,\n        },\n    };\n\n    return mkEvent(event);\n}\n\nexport function mkStubRoom(roomId: string = null, name: string, client: MatrixClient): Room {\n    const stubTimeline = { getEvents: () => [] } as unknown as EventTimeline;\n    return {\n        roomId,\n        getReceiptsForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getMember: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({\n            userId: '@member:domain.bla',\n            name: 'Member',\n            rawDisplayName: 'Member',\n            roomId: roomId,\n            getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png',\n            getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png',\n        }),\n        getMembersWithMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getJoinedMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\n        getInvitedAndJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\n        setUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(),\n        getMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getPendingEvents: () => [],\n        getLiveTimeline: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(stubTimeline),\n        getUnfilteredTimelineSet: jest.fn(),\n        findEventById: () => null,\n        getAccountData: () => null,\n        hasMembershipState: () => null,\n        getVersion: () => '1',\n        shouldUpgradeToVersion: () => null,\n        getMyMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"join\"),\n        maySendMessage: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n        currentState: {\n            getStateEvents: jest.fn(),\n            getMember: jest.fn(),\n            mayClientSendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            maySendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            maySendRedactionForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            maySendEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            members: {},\n            getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(JoinRule.Invite),\n            on: jest.fn(),\n            off: jest.fn(),\n        } as unknown as RoomState,\n        tags: {},\n        setBlacklistUnverifiedDevices: jest.fn(),\n        on: jest.fn(),\n        off: jest.fn(),\n        removeListener: jest.fn(),\n        getDMInviter: jest.fn(),\n        name,\n        normalizedName: normalize(name || \"\"),\n        getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\n        getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\n        isSpaceRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n        getType: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(undefined),\n        isElementVideoRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n        getUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(() => 0),\n        getEventReadUpTo: jest.fn(() => null),\n        getCanonicalAlias: jest.fn(),\n        getAltAliases: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        timeline: [],\n        getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"invite\"),\n        loadMembersIfNeeded: jest.fn(),\n        client,\n        myUserId: client?.getUserId(),\n        canInvite: jest.fn(),\n        getThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        eventShouldLiveIn: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\n        createThreadsTimelineSets: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\n        fetchRoomThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\n    } as unknown as Room;\n}\n\nexport function mkServerConfig(hsUrl, isUrl) {\n    return makeType(ValidatedServerConfig, {\n        hsUrl,\n        hsName: \"TEST_ENVIRONMENT\",\n        hsNameIsDifferent: false,\n        isUrl,\n    });\n}\n\nexport const setupAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>, client: MatrixClient) => {\n    // @ts-ignore\n    store.readyStore.useUnitTestClient(client);\n    // @ts-ignore\n    await store.onReady();\n};\n\nexport const resetAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>) => {\n    // @ts-ignore\n    await store.onNotReady();\n};\n\nexport const mockStateEventImplementation = (events: MatrixEvent[]) => {\n    const stateMap = new EnhancedMap<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>();\n    events.forEach(event => {\n        stateMap.getOrCreate(event.getType(), new Map()).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\n    });\n\n    function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string): MatrixEvent[];\n    function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey: string): MatrixEvent;\n    function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey?: string) {\n        if (stateKey || stateKey === \"\") {\n            return stateMap.get(eventType)?.get(stateKey) || null;\n        }\n        return Array.from(stateMap.get(eventType)?.values() || []);\n    }\n    return getStateEvents;\n};\n\nexport const mkRoom = (\n    client: MatrixClient,\n    roomId: string,\n    rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[],\n): MockedObject<Room> => {\n    const room = mocked(mkStubRoom(roomId, roomId, client));\n    mocked(room.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation([]));\n    rooms?.push(room);\n    return room;\n};\n\nexport const upsertRoomStateEvents = (room: Room, events: MatrixEvent[]): void => {\n    const eventsMap = events.reduce((acc, event) => {\n        const eventType = event.getType();\n        if (!acc.has(eventType)) {\n            acc.set(eventType, new Map());\n        }\n        acc.get(eventType).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\n        return acc;\n    }, room.currentState.events || new Map<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>());\n\n    room.currentState.events = eventsMap;\n};\n\nexport const mkSpace = (\n    client: MatrixClient,\n    spaceId: string,\n    rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[],\n    children: string[] = [],\n): MockedObject<Room> => {\n    const space = mocked(mkRoom(client, spaceId, rooms));\n    space.isSpaceRoom.mockReturnValue(true);\n    space.getType.mockReturnValue(RoomType.Space);\n    mocked(space.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation(children.map(roomId =>\n        mkEvent({\n            event: true,\n            type: EventType.SpaceChild,\n            room: spaceId,\n            user: \"@user:server\",\n            skey: roomId,\n            content: { via: [] },\n            ts: Date.now(),\n        }),\n    )));\n    return space;\n};\n\nexport const mkRoomMemberJoinEvent = (user: string, room: string): MatrixEvent => {\n    return mkEvent({\n        event: true,\n        type: EventType.RoomMember,\n        content: {\n            membership: \"join\",\n        },\n        skey: user,\n        user,\n        room,\n    });\n};\n\nexport const mkPusher = (extra: Partial<IPusher> = {}): IPusher => ({\n    app_display_name: \"app\",\n    app_id: \"123\",\n    data: {},\n    device_display_name: \"name\",\n    kind: \"http\",\n    lang: \"en\",\n    pushkey: \"pushpush\",\n    ...extra,\n});\n",
  "file_path": "/app/test/test-utils/test-utils.ts"

getHomeserverUrl: jest.fn(),\n        getIdentityServerUrl: jest.fn(),\n        getDomain: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"matrix.org\"),\n        getUserId: client.canSupport.set(feature as Feature, ServerSupport.Stable);\n    });\n    Object.defineProperty(client, \"pollingTurnServers\", { configurable: true, get: () => true });\n    return client;\n}\n\ntype MakeEventPassThruProps = {\n    user: User[\"userId\"];\n    relatesTo?: IEventRelation;\n    event?: boolean;\n    ts?: number;\n    skey?: string;\n};\ntype MakeEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & {\n    type: string;\n    redacts?: string;\n    content: IContent;\n    room?: Room[\"roomId\"];\n    prev_content?: IContent;\n    unsigned?: IUnsigned;\n};\n\nexport const mkRoomCreateEvent = (userId: string, roomId: string): MatrixEvent => {\n    return mkEvent({ event: true, type: EventType.RoomCreate, content: { creator: userId, room_version: KNOWN_SAFE_ROOM_VERSION }, skey: \"\", user: userId, room: roomId });\n};\n\nexport function mkEvent(opts: MakeEventProps): MatrixEvent {\n    if (!opts.type || !opts.content) throw new Error(\"Missing .type or .content =>\" + JSON.stringify(opts));\n    const event: Partial<IEvent> = {\n        type: opts.type, room_id: opts.room, sender: opts.user, content: opts.content,\n        prev_content: opts.prev_content, event_id: \"$\" + Math.random() + \"-\" + Math.random(),\n        origin_server_ts: opts.ts ?? 0, unsigned: opts.unsigned, redacts: opts.redacts,\n    };\n    if (opts.skey !== undefined) {\n        event.state_key = opts.skey;\n    } else if ([\"m.room.name\",\"m.room.topic\",\"m.room.create\",\"m.room.join_rules\",\"m.room.power_levels\",\"m.room.topic\",\"m.room.history_visibility\",\"m.room.encryption\",\"m.room.member\",\"com.example.state\",\"m.room.guest_access\",\"m.room.tombstone\"].indexOf(opts.type) !== -1) {\n        event.state_key = \"\";\n    }\n    const mxEvent = opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event as unknown as MatrixEvent;\n    if (!mxEvent.sender && opts.user && opts.room) {\n        mxEvent.sender = { userId: opts.user, membership: \"join\", name: opts.user, rawDisplayName: opts.user, roomId: opts.room, getAvatarUrl: () => {}, getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {} } as unknown as RoomMember;\n    }\n    return mxEvent;\n}\n\nexport function mkPresence(opts) {\n    if (!opts.user) throw new Error(\"Missing user\");\n    const event = { event_id: \"$\" + Math.random() + \"-\" + Math.random(), type: \"m.presence\", sender: opts.user, content: { avatar_url: opts.url, displayname: opts.name, last_active_ago: opts.ago, presence: opts.presence || \"offline\" } };\n    return opts.event ? new MatrixEvent(event) : event;\n}\n\nexport function mkMembership(opts: MakeEventPassThruProps & { room: Room[\"roomId\"]; mship: string; prevMship?: string; name?: string; url?: string; skey?: string; target?: RoomMember }): MatrixEvent {\n    const event: MakeEventProps = { ...opts, type: \"m.room.member\", content: { membership: opts.mship } };\n    if (!opts.skey) event.skey = opts.user;\n    if (!opts.mship) throw new Error(\"Missing .mship => \" + JSON.stringify(opts));\n    if (opts.prevMship) event.prev_content = { membership: opts.prevMship };\n    if (opts.name) event.content.displayname = opts.name;\n    if (opts.url) event.content.avatar_url = opts.url;\n    const e = mkEvent(event);\n    if (opts.target) e.target = opts.target;\n    return e;\n}\n\nexport function mkRoomMember(roomId: string, userId: string, membership = \"join\"): RoomMember {\n    return { userId, membership, name: userId, rawDisplayName: userId, roomId, events: {}, getAvatarUrl: () => {}, getMxcAvatarUrl: () => {}, getDMInviter: () => {} } as unknown as RoomMember;\n}\n\nexport type MessageEventProps = MakeEventPassThruProps & { room: Room[\"roomId\"]; relatesTo?: IEventRelation; msg?: string; };\n\nexport function mkMessage({ msg, relatesTo, ...opts }: MakeEventPassThruProps & { room: Room[\"roomId\"]; msg?: string }): MatrixEvent {\n    if (!opts.room || !opts.user) throw new Error(\"Missing .room or .user from options\");\n    const message = msg ?? \"Random->\" + Math.random();\n    return mkEvent({ ...opts, type: \"m.room.message\", content: { msgtype: \"m.text\", body: message, 'm.relates_to': relatesTo } });\n}\n\nexport function mkStubRoom(roomId: string = null, name: string, client: MatrixClient): Room {\n    const stubTimeline = { getEvents: () => [] } as unknown as EventTimeline;\n    return {\n        roomId,\n        getReceiptsForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getMember: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({ userId: '@member:domain.bla', name: 'Member', rawDisplayName: 'Member', roomId, getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png', getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/image.png' }),\n        getMembersWithMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getJoinedMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\n        getInvitedAndJoinedMemberCount: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(1),\n        setUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(),\n        getMembers: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        getPendingEvents: () => [],\n        getLiveTimeline: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(stubTimeline),\n        getUnfilteredTimelineSet: jest.fn(),\n        findEventById: () => null,\n        getAccountData: () => null,\n        hasMembershipState: () => null,\n        getVersion: () => '1',\n        shouldUpgradeToVersion: () => null,\n        getMyMembership: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"join\"),\n        maySendMessage: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n        currentState: {\n            getStateEvents: jest.fn(),\n            getMember: jest.fn(),\n            mayClientSendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            maySendStateEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            maySendRedactionForEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            maySendEvent: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(true),\n            members: {},\n            getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(JoinRule.Invite),\n            on: jest.fn(),\n            off: jest.fn(),\n        } as unknown as RoomState,\n        tags: {},\n        setBlacklistUnverifiedDevices: jest.fn(),\n        on: jest.fn(),\n        off: jest.fn(),\n        removeListener: jest.fn(),\n        getDMInviter: jest.fn(),\n        name,\n        normalizedName: normalize(name || \"\"),\n        getAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\n        getMxcAvatarUrl: () => 'mxc://avatar.url/room.png',\n        isSpaceRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n        getType: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(undefined),\n        isElementVideoRoom: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n        getUnreadNotificationCount: jest.fn(() => 0),\n        getEventReadUpTo: jest.fn(() => null),\n        getCanonicalAlias: jest.fn(),\n        getAltAliases: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        timeline: [],\n        getJoinRule: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(\"invite\"),\n        loadMembersIfNeeded: jest.fn(),\n        client,\n        myUserId: client?.getUserId(),\n        canInvite: jest.fn(),\n        getThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue([]),\n        eventShouldLiveIn: jest.fn().mockReturnValue({}),\n        createThreadsTimelineSets: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\n        fetchRoomThreads: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new Promise(() => {})),\n    } as unknown as Room;\n}\n\nexport function mkServerConfig(hsUrl, isUrl) {\n    return makeType(ValidatedServerConfig, { hsUrl, hsName: \"TEST_ENVIRONMENT\", hsNameIsDifferent: false, isUrl });\n}\n\nexport const setupAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>, client: MatrixClient) => {\n    (store as any).readyStore.useUnitTestClient(client);\n    await (store as any).onReady();\n};\n\nexport const resetAsyncStoreWithClient = async <T = unknown>(store: AsyncStoreWithClient<T>) => {\n    await (store as any).onNotReady();\n};\n\nexport const mockStateEventImplementation = (events: MatrixEvent[]) => {\n    const stateMap = new EnhancedMap<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>();\n    events.forEach(event => { stateMap.getOrCreate(event.getType(), new Map()).set(event.getStateKey(), event); });\n    function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string): MatrixEvent[];\n    function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey: string): MatrixEvent;\n    function getStateEvents(eventType: EventType | string, stateKey?: string) {\n        if (stateKey || stateKey === \"\") return stateMap.get(eventType)?.get(stateKey) || null;\n        return Array.from(stateMap.get(eventType)?.values() || []);\n    }\n    return getStateEvents;\n};\n\nexport const mkRoom = (client: MatrixClient, roomId: string, rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[]): MockedObject<Room> => {\n    const room = mocked(mkStubRoom(roomId, roomId, client));\n    mocked(room.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation([]));\n    rooms?.push(room);\n    return room;\n};\n\nexport const upsertRoomStateEvents = (room: Room, events: MatrixEvent[]): void => {\n    const eventsMap = events.reduce((acc, event) => {\n        const eventType = event.getType();\n        if (!acc.has(eventType)) acc.set(eventType, new Map());\n        acc.get(eventType).set(event.getStateKey(), event);\n        return acc;\n    }, room.currentState.events || new Map<string, Map<string, MatrixEvent>>());\n    room.currentState.events = eventsMap;\n};\n\nexport const mkSpace = (client: MatrixClient, spaceId: string, rooms?: ReturnType<typeof mkStubRoom>[], children: string[] = []): MockedObject<Room> => {\n    const space = mocked(mkRoom(client, spaceId, rooms));\n    space.isSpaceRoom.mockReturnValue(true);\n    space.getType.mockReturnValue(RoomType.Space);\n    mocked(space.currentState).getStateEvents.mockImplementation(mockStateEventImplementation(children.map(roomId =>\n        mkEvent({ event: true, type: EventType.SpaceChild, room: spaceId, user: \"@user:server\", skey: roomId, content: { via: [] }, ts: Date.now() })\n    )));\n    return space;\n};\n\nexport const mkRoomMemberJoinEvent = (user: string, room: string): MatrixEvent => {\n    return mkEvent({ event: true, type: EventType.RoomMember, content: { membership: \"join\" }, skey: user, user, room });\n};\n\nexport const mkPusher = (extra: Partial<IPusher> = {}): IPusher => ({\n    app_display_name: \"app\", app_id: \"123\", data: {}, device_display_name: \"name\", kind: \"http\", lang: \"en\", pushkey: \"pushpush\", ...extra,\n});\nENDOFFILE\necho \"done\"",

\"../../src/MatrixClientPeg\";\n\nexport class MockEventEmitter<T> extends EventEmitter {\n    constructor(mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<T>|PropertyLikeKeys<T>, unknown>> = {}) {\n        super();\n        Object.defineProperties(this, Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors(mockProperties));\n    }\n}\n\nexport class MockClientWithEventEmitter extends EventEmitter {\n    constructor(mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>> = {}) {\n        super();\n        Object.assign(this, mockProperties);\n    }\n}\n\nexport const getMockClientWithEventEmitter = (\n    mockProperties: Partial<Record<MethodLikeKeys<MatrixClient>, unknown>>,\n): MockedObject<MatrixClient> => {\n    const mock = mocked(new MockClientWithEventEmitter(mockProperties) as unknown as MatrixClient);\n    jest.spyOn(MatrixClientPeg, 'get').mockReturnValue(mock);\n    (mock as any).canSupport = new Map();\n    Object.keys(Feature).forEach(feature => {\n        (mock as any).canSupport.set(feature as Feature, ServerSupport.Stable);\n    });\n    return mock;\n};\n\nexport const unmockClientPeg = () => jest.spyOn(MatrixClientPeg, 'get').mockRestore();\n\nexport const mockClientMethodsUser = (userId = '@alice:domain') => ({\n    getUserId: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(userId),\n    getUser: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(new User(userId)),\n    isGuest: jest.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n    mxcUrlToHttp: jest.fn().mockReturnValue('mock-mxcUrlToHttp'),\n    credentials: { userId },\n    getThreePids: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ threepids: [] }),\n    getAccessToken: jest.fn(),\n    getDeviceId: jest.fn(),\n    getAccountData: jest.fn(),\n});\n\nexport const mockClientMethodsEvents jest.fn().mockReturnValue(deviceId),\n    getDeviceEd25519Key: jest.fn(),\n    getDevices: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ devices: [] }),\n});\n\nexport const mockClientMethodsCrypto = (): import RoomHeaderButtons from "../../../../src/components/views/right_panel/RoomHeaderButtons";

import SettingsStore from "../../../../src/settings/SettingsStore";
import { stubClient } from "../../../test-utils";

describe("RoomHeaderButtons-test.tsx", function() {
    const ROOM_ID = "!roomId:example.org";
    let room: Room;
    let client: MatrixClient;

    beforeEach(() => {
        jest.clearAllMocks();

        stubClient();
        client = MatrixClientPeg.get();
        room = new Room(ROOM_ID, client, client.getUserId(), {
            pendingEventOrdering: PendingEventOrdering.Detached,
        });

        jest.spyOn(SettingsStore, "getValue").mockImplementation((name: string) => {
            if (name === "feature_thread") return true;
        });
    });

    function getComponent(room: Room) {
        return render(<RoomHeaderButtons
            room={room}
            excludedRightPanelPhase

import classNames from 'classnames';

interface IProps {
    // Whether this button is highlighted
    isHighlighted: boolean;
    isUnread?: boolean;
    // click handler
    onClick: (ev: ButtonEvent) => void;

    // Button name
    name: string;
    // Button title
    title: string;
}

// TODO: replace this, the composer buttons and the right panel buttons with a unified representation

    public render() {
        const { isHighlighted, isUnread = false, onClick, name, title, ...props } = this.props;

        const classes = classNames({
            mx_RightPanel_headerButton: true,
            mx_RightPanel_headerButton_highlight: isHighlighted,
            mx_RightPanel_headerButton_unread: isUnread,
            [`mx_RightPanel_${name}`]: true,
        });

import { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';
import { IStartClientOpts } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';

export interface IMatrixClientCreds {
    homeserverUrl: string;
    identityServerUrl?: string;
    userId: string;
    deviceId?: string;
    accessToken: string;
    guest?: boolean;
    pickleKey?: string;
    freshLogin?: boolean;
}

export interface IMatrixClientPeg {
    opts: IStartClientOpts;
    getHomeserverName(): string;
    get(): MatrixClient;
    unset(): void;
    assign(): Promise<any>;
    start(): Promise<any>;
    getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds;
    setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;
    currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;
    userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;
    userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;
    replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;
}

class MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {
    public opts: IStartClientOpts = { initialSyncLimit: 20 };
    private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;

    public get(): MatrixClient { return this.matrixClient; }
    public unset(): void { this.matrixClient = null; }
    public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {}
    public async assign(): Promise<any> { return {}; }
    public async start(): Promise<any> {}
    public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds { return null; }
    public getHomeserverName(): string { return ''; }
    public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {}
    public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean { return false; }
    public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean { return false; }
    public userRegisteredAfter(date:

9. WRITE /app/src/MatrixClientPeg.ts
import { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';
import { IStartClientOpts } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';

export interface IMatrixClientCreds {
    homeserverUrl: string;
    identityServerUrl?: string;
    userId: string;
    deviceId?: string;
    accessToken: string;
    guest?: boolean;
}

export interface IMatrixClientPeg {
    opts: IStartClientOpts;
    getHomeserverName(): string;
    get(): MatrixClient;
    unset(): void;
    assign(): Promise<any>;
    start(): Promise<any>;
    getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds;
    setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void;
    currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean;
    userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean;
    userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean;
    replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void;
}

class MatrixClientPegClass implements IMatrixClientPeg {
    public opts: IStartClientOpts = { initialSyncLimit: 20 };
    private matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;

    public get(): MatrixClient { return this.matrixClient; }
    public unset(): void { this.matrixClient = null; }
    public replaceUsingCreds(creds: IMatrixClientCreds): void {}
    public async assign(): Promise<any> { return {}; }
    public async start(): Promise<any> {}
    public getCredentials(): IMatrixClientCreds { return null; }
    public getHomeserverName(): string { return ''; }
    public setJustRegisteredUserId(uid: string | null): void {}
    public currentUserIsJustRegistered(): boolean { return false; }
    public userRegisteredWithinLastHours(hours: number): boolean { return false; }
    public userRegisteredAfter(date: Date): boolean { return false; }
}

export const MatrixClientPeg: IMatrixClientPeg = new MatrixClientPegClass();

12. WRITE /app/src/stores/AsyncStore.ts
import { EventEmitter } from 'events';

export const UPDATE_EVENT = "update";

export abstract class AsyncStore<T> extends EventEmitter {
    private _state: T;

    constructor(private dispatcher: any) {
        super();
    }

    protected get state(): T { return this._state; }

    protected async updateState(state: Partial<T>): Promise<void> {
        this._state = Object.assign({}, this._state, state);
        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT, this.state);
    }

    protected abstract onDispatch(payload: any): Promise<void>;
}

13. WRITE /app/src/stores/AsyncStoreWithClient.ts
import { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';
import { AsyncStore } from './AsyncStore';

export abstract class AsyncStoreWithClient<T> extends AsyncStore<T> {
    protected matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;

    protected abstract onAction(payload: any): Promise<void>;
    protected abstract onReady(): Promise<any>;
    protected abstract onNotReady(): Promise<any>;

    protected async onDispatch(payload: any): Promise<void> {
        await this.onAction(payload);
    }

    public useUnitTestClient(client: MatrixClient) {
        this.matrixClient = client;
    }
}

14. WRITE /app/src/stores/ReadyWatchingStore.ts
import { EventEmitter } from 'events';
import { MatrixClient } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/client';
import { UPDATE_EVENT } from './AsyncStore';

export abstract class ReadyWatchingStore extends EventEmitter {
    protected matrixClient: MatrixClient = null;
    protected mxClient: MatrixClient = null;

    constructor(private dispatcher?: any) {
        super();
    }

    public start(): void {}

    protected abstract onReady(): Promise<any>;
    protected abstract onNotReady(): Promise<any>;
    protected onDispatcherAction(payload: any): void {}
}

15. WRITE /app/src/stores/right-panel/RightPanelStore.ts
import { EventEmitter } from 'events';
import { UPDATE_EVENT } from '../AsyncStore';
import { RightPanelPhases } from './RightPanelStorePhases';
import { IRightPanelCard, IRightPanelCardState } from './RightPanelStoreIPanelState';

export default class RightPanelStore extends EventEmitter {
    private static internalInstance: RightPanelStore;
    private _isOpen: boolean = false;
    private _currentCard: IRightPanelCard = { state: {}, phase: null };
    private _viewedRoomId: string | null = null;

    public get isOpen(): boolean { return this._isOpen; }
    public get currentCard(): IRightPanelCard { return this._currentCard; }

    public togglePanel(roomId: string | null): void {
        this._isOpen = !this._isOpen;
        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);
    }

    public setCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {
        this._currentCard = card;
        this._isOpen = true;
        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);
    }

    public setCards(cards: IRightPanelCard[], allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {
        if (cards.length > 0) {
            this._currentCard = cards[cards.length - 1];
        }
        this._isOpen = true;
        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);
    }

    public pushCard(card: IRightPanelCard, allowClose?: boolean, roomId?: string): void {
        this._currentCard = card;
        this._isOpen = true;
        this.emit(UPDATE_EVENT);
    }

    public start(): void {}

    public static get instance(): RightPanelStore {
        if (!RightPanelStore.internalInstance) {
            RightPanelStore.internalInstance = new RightPanelStore();
        }
        return RightPanelStore.internalInstance;
    }
}

}

}

    isOpen: boolean;
    history: Array<IRightPanelCard>;
}

export function convertToStorePanel(cacheRoom: IRightPanelForRoom): any { return null; }
export function convertToStatePanel(storeRoom: any, room: any): IRightPanelForRoom { return null; }
export function convertCardToStore(panelState: IRightPanelCard): any { return null; }

20. WRITE /app/src/stores/notifications/RoomNotificationStateStore.ts
import { EventEmitter } from 'events';
import { Room } from 'matrix-js-sdk/src/models/room';
import { NotificationColor } from './NotificationColor';
import { SummarizedNotificationState } from './SummarizedNotificationState';
import { ThreadsRoomNotificationState } from './ThreadsRoomNotificationState';

export const UPDATE_STATUS_INDICATOR = "update_status_indicator";

class RoomNotificationStateStoreClass extends EventEmitter {
    private static _instance: RoomNotificationStateStoreClass;
    private roomStates: Map<string, any> = new Map();
    private threadsRoomStates: Map<string, ThreadsRoomNotificationState> = new Map();
    public globalState: SummarizedNotificationState = new SummarizedNotificationState();

    public getRoomState(room: Room): { color: NotificationColor } {
        return { color: NotificationColor.None };
    }

    public getThreadsRoomState(room: Room): ThreadsRoomNotificationState {
        if (!this.threadsRoomStates.has(room.roomId)) {
            this.threadsRoomStates.set(room.roomId, new ThreadsRoomNotificationState(room));
        }
        return this.threadsRoomStates.get(room.roomId);
    }

    public static get instance(): RoomNotificationStateStoreClass {
        if (!RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance) {
            RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance = new RoomNotificationStateStoreClass();
        }
        return RoomNotificationStateStoreClass._instance;
    }
}

export const RoomNotificationStateStore = RoomNotificationStateStoreClass;
